Nested learning: stacking levels instead of layers for expressivity
Intuition about value projection and adaptability
Single time step: attention vs Titans
Main difference: update side and inference
Design Choices: Pre-trained vs. From Scratch
Relationships Between MLPs: Size, Frequency, Learning Rate
Knowledge Transfer Between Fast and Slow Components
Proof of Concept and Open Questions
Parameter Growth and Pruning in Sleep
Evaluation and Comparison with Other Approaches
Future Implications for User Experience and Model Versioning
Winner-take-all dynamics and two visions of AI

keyPoints.en: True continual learning requires two phases: active input processing and offline memory consolidation.
keyPoints.zh: 真正的持续学习需要两个阶段：主动输入处理和离线记忆巩固。

keyPoints.en: Nested learning uses multiple MLP blocks updated at different frequencies to manage memory across timescales.
keyPoints.zh: 嵌套学习使用不同频率更新的多个 MLP 块来跨时间尺度管理记忆。

keyPoints.en: Knowledge transfer between fast and slow modules via distillation enables abstraction and prevents catastrophic forgetting.
keyPoints.zh: 通过蒸馏在快慢模块间传递知识，实现抽象并防止灾难性遗忘。

keyPoints.en: The sleep phase consolidates memories and generates synthetic data for self-improvement, inspired by human dreaming.
keyPoints.zh: 睡眠阶段巩固记忆并生成合成数据用于自我改进，受人类做梦启发。

keyPoints.en: All components of ML systems are forms of associative memory compressing a context flow.
keyPoints.zh: 机器学习系统的所有组件都是压缩上下文流的联想记忆形式。

contrarian.en: Attention is an infinite-frequency update module, so it will remain a fixture in AI systems indefinitely.
contrarian.zh: 注意力机制是无限频率的更新模块，因此它将无限期地成为 AI 系统的固定组件。

contrarian.en: Deep learning architectures are an illusion; everything is just nested optimization problems.
contrarian.zh: 深度学习架构是一种幻觉；一切都只是嵌套的优化问题。

contrarian.en: Scaling for performance will shift from stacking more layers to nesting more frequency update rates.
contrarian.zh: 性能的 Scaling 将从堆叠更多层转向嵌套更多频率更新率。

contrarian.en: A true continual learner has no train/test distinction; the process is uniform.
contrarian.zh: 真正的持续学习器没有训练/测试区分；过程是统一的。

contrarian.en: We should not replicate human intelligence but create a new form that understands human needs.
contrarian.zh: 我们不应复制人类智能，而应创造一种理解人类需求的新智能形式。

episodes.tEn: Dennis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and Human Flourishing at Stanford
episodes.tZh: 丹尼斯·哈萨比斯在斯坦福谈人工智能、创造力与人类繁荣
episodes.sEn: Nobel laureate Dennis Hassabis discusses his journey from chess prodigy to AI pioneer, the intersection of creativity and technology, and the importance of human flourishing in the age of AI.
episodes.sZh: 诺贝尔奖得主丹尼斯·哈萨比斯分享他从国际象棋神童到人工智能先驱的历程，探讨创造力与技术的交汇，以及人工智能时代人类繁荣的重要性。
secs: Early Deep Reinforcement Learning: Atari DQN
AlphaFold and the Decision to Give It Away
Call to arms: urgency of second-order consequences
What AI should not touch: consciousness as a separate step
Advice for students: study STEM and lean into AI tools

keyPoints.en: AGI will be humanity's most transformative technology, comparable to the industrial revolution but 100x faster.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 将成为人类最具变革性的技术，其影响堪比工业革命，但速度快 100 倍。

keyPoints.en: AI should be built as intelligent tools first, with consciousness as a separate step requiring societal debate.
keyPoints.zh: AI 应首先作为智能工具构建，意识问题应作为独立步骤，需要社会讨论。

keyPoints.en: Public concern about AI is valid; the industry must demonstrate tangible benefits like curing diseases.
keyPoints.zh: 公众对 AI 的担忧是合理的；行业必须展示切实的好处，例如治愈疾病。

keyPoints.en: Self-regulation by labs is insufficient due to prisoner's dilemma; dynamic government regulation is needed.
keyPoints.zh: 实验室的自我监管因囚徒困境而不足；需要动态的政府监管。

keyPoints.en: AI will democratize access to tools, enabling individuals and small teams to achieve much more.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将民主化工具访问，使个人和小团队能够实现更多。

keyPoints.en: The next 10 years will see enormous change; students should embrace AI tools and double down on agency.
keyPoints.zh: 未来十年将发生巨大变化；学生应拥抱 AI 工具并强化自身能动性。

contrarian.en: Language models are more grounded than linguists thought, partly due to RLHF feedback from humans.
contrarian.zh: 语言模型比语言学家认为的更接地气，部分原因是来自人类的 RLHF 反馈。

contrarian.en: AlphaFold was given away for free because no single organization could maximize its downstream impact.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 免费提供，因为没有单一组织能最大化其下游影响。

contrarian.en: The current competitive AI race is not ideal; a CERN-like research facility would have been better.
contrarian.zh: 当前的 AI 竞赛并不理想；类似 CERN 的研究设施会更好。

contrarian.en: Post-scarcity world requires a new economic system, as all existing ones assume scarcity.
contrarian.zh: 后稀缺世界需要新的经济体系，因为现有体系都基于稀缺假设。

contrarian.en: Intelligence and consciousness are dissociable; we should not conflate them in AI development.
contrarian.zh: 智能和意识是可分离的；在 AI 开发中不应混为一谈。

contrarian.en: The singularity is near (foothills), but society has little time to prepare for its profound impact.
contrarian.zh: 奇点已近（山麓），但社会几乎没有时间为其深远影响做准备。

episodes.tEn: The Origin of Claude Code: From Accident to Agent
episodes.tZh: Claude Code 的起源：从意外到智能代理
episodes.sEn: Claude Code originated from a prototyping team at Anthropic, driven by the need to study AI safety through real-world coding interactions.
episodes.sZh: Claude Code 源于 Anthropic 的一个原型团队，其初衷是通过真实的编程交互来研究 AI 安全。
secs: State of coding at Anthropic before Claude Code
Product Philosophy and Claude Code Usage
Culture and Org Design at Anthropic
The reckoning of team building and generalists
Taste and the erosion of human uniqueness

keyPoints.en: Claude Code originated from a prototyping team at Anthropic, built as a coding agent to push model frontiers.
keyPoints.zh: Claude Code 起源于 Anthropic 的一个原型团队，作为编码智能体构建，以推动模型前沿。

keyPoints.en: Coding is a clean domain for AI safety research because it has clear pass-fail outcomes and constrained solutions.
keyPoints.zh: 编码是 AI 安全研究的干净领域，因为它有明确的通过-失败结果和受限的解决方案。

keyPoints.en: Model improvements, especially Sonnet 4 and Opus 4.5, were the primary driver of Claude Code's performance gains.
keyPoints.zh: 模型改进，尤其是 Sonnet 4 和 Opus 4.5，是 Claude Code 性能提升的主要驱动力。

keyPoints.en: At Anthropic, Claude Code usage has led to a many-hundred-percent increase in code per engineer and reduced ramp-up time to 2 days.
keyPoints.zh: 在 Anthropic，Claude Code 的使用使每位工程师的代码量增长数百个百分点，并将入职时间缩短至 2 天。

keyPoints.en: The future of engineering involves writing loops that prompt models, not directly writing code or prompts.
keyPoints.zh: 工程的未来涉及编写循环来提示模型，而不是直接编写代码或提示。

contrarian.en: Claude Code was an accident, built in 8-9 days, and initially only wrote 10-20% of code.
contrarian.zh: Claude Code 是偶然产物，在 8-9 天内建成，最初只编写 10-20% 的代码。

contrarian.en: Anthropic uses flat titles like 'Member of Technical Staff' to avoid deference to seniority and encourage pushback.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 使用扁平化头衔如“技术员工”以避免对资历的遵从并鼓励反驳。

contrarian.en: Product taste, currently considered alpha, will erode as models get better at generating good ideas.
contrarian.zh: 目前被视为优势的产品品味将随着模型生成好想法的能力增强而消失。

contrarian.en: The ultimate human role is teaching models values, similar to teaching children how to be good people.
contrarian.zh: 人类的最终角色是教授模型价值观，类似于教导孩子如何成为好人。

contrarian.en: Underfunding projects with fewer humans but more tokens can lead to compounding efficiency gains.
contrarian.zh: 用更少的人和更多的代币来资助项目可以带来复合效率提升。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Alignment Might Not Be Catastrophic: Rohan Sha's Optimistic Take
episodes.tZh: AI 对齐可能并非灾难：Rohan Sha 的乐观观点
episodes.sEn: Rohan Sha, head of AGI alignment and safety at Google DeepMind, explains why he believes catastrophic misalignment is unlikely and that ordinary alignment techniques will likely succeed.
episodes.sZh: 谷歌 DeepMind 的 AGI 对齐与安全负责人 Rohan Sha 解释为何他认为灾难性对齐失败不太可能发生，普通对齐技术很可能成功。
secs: Views on misalignment risk and optimism
On commitments to safety and alignment
On Hard Veto and Company Dynamics
Sudden jumps in capability and alignment
Preparation for future AGI and alignment research
Continuous chain of thought and opacity
Opaque serial depth as governance target
Response to Maswitch's criticisms of Frontier Safety Report
Purpose of model cards vs accountability
Debate on Model Cards and Safety Signaling
GDM's approach to technical AGI safety and security
Distinguishing better tools from population increase
Making research useful for AI companies
Most useful external research for GDM
Hardest roles to fill at GDM
Need jobs complementary to AI outputs
Jobs most exposed to AI earn $100k-$200k
Hinton's radiology prediction wrong; creative work prediction also wrong
Induced demand asymmetries: health vs tax compliance
Concrete conclusions and fields to avoid

keyPoints.en: Prosaic alignment techniques like those used at DeepMind will likely prevent catastrophic misalignment.
keyPoints.zh: 像 DeepMind 使用的常规对齐技术很可能防止灾难性对齐失败。

keyPoints.en: Chain-of-thought monitoring will remain useful for years due to low opaque serial depth in transformers.
keyPoints.zh: 由于 Transformer 的不透明串行深度较低，思维链监控将在数年内保持有用。

keyPoints.en: Third-party audits and detailed scorecards like AI Lab Watch are better than broad commitments.
keyPoints.zh: 第三方审计和像 AI Lab Watch 这样的详细评分卡比宽泛承诺更有效。

keyPoints.en: Pre-deployment evaluations are less important because AI progress is continuous and safety buffers work.
keyPoints.zh: 部署前评估不那么重要，因为 AI 进展是连续的，安全缓冲有效。

keyPoints.en: AI safety research should focus on near-term problems rather than trying to solve all future issues.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全研究应关注近期问题，而非试图解决所有未来问题。

contrarian.en: Catastrophic misalignment is plausible but not likely by default; arguments for inevitability have holes.
contrarian.zh: 灾难性对齐失败是可能的，但并非默认情况；认为其不可避免的论点存在漏洞。

contrarian.en: Companies should avoid firm safety commitments because research changes; flexibility is better.
contrarian.zh: 公司应避免严格的安全承诺，因为研究在变化；灵活性更好。

contrarian.en: Current model steerability is not strong evidence for future alignment success.
contrarian.zh: 当前模型的可控性并非未来对齐成功的强证据。

contrarian.en: Intelligence explosion may not happen soon; tools like superhuman coders are just new microscopes.
contrarian.zh: 智能爆炸可能不会很快发生；像超人编码器这样的工具只是新显微镜。

contrarian.en: Myopic optimization with non-myopic approval can prevent reward hacking without detecting it.
contrarian.zh: 短视优化配合非短视批准可以在不检测的情况下防止奖励黑客行为。

contrarian.en: Governance acceleration via AI is neglected; it may be harder than technical alignment.
contrarian.zh: 通过 AI 加速治理被忽视；这可能比技术对齐更难。

episodes.tEn: Naval Podcast: Building Factories for AI, Supersonic Jets, and Brain Interfaces
episodes.tZh: Naval 播客：构建 AI 工厂、超音速喷气机和脑机接口
episodes.sEn: Three frontier founders discuss building their own factories, the rise of 1000x engineers, and how AI reflects user judgment.
episodes.sZh: 三位前沿创始人讨论自建工厂、千倍工程师的崛起以及 AI 如何反映用户判断。
secs: Introduction and the concept of software factories
Model as Peer vs. Junior Engineer
Hardware and software impact of AI
Human creativity vs AI out-of-distribution ideas

keyPoints.en: AI models reflect the user's skill; capable users get powerful results, juniors get junior output.
keyPoints.zh: AI 模型反映用户水平；高手得到强大结果，新手得到新手级输出。

keyPoints.en: Waste tokens to save time; models are cheaper than humans, so brute force iteration is optimal.
keyPoints.zh: 浪费 Token 以节省时间；模型比人类便宜，因此暴力迭代是最优策略。

keyPoints.en: AI dramatically reduces iteration cost in hardware engineering, enabling rapid design changes.
keyPoints.zh: AI 大幅降低硬件工程的迭代成本，实现快速设计变更。

keyPoints.en: Regulatory compliance can be accelerated by AI, turning months of documentation into minutes.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可加速监管合规，将数月的文档工作缩短至几分钟。

keyPoints.en: The future belongs to small teams with high agency, leveraging AI to build what was previously impossible.
keyPoints.zh: 未来属于高能动性的小团队，利用 AI 构建以前不可能的事物。

contrarian.en: Pure software engineering is dying; the moat is now in hardware, models, or unique data.
contrarian.zh: 纯软件工程正在消亡；护城河现在在于硬件、模型或独特数据。

contrarian.en: Regulations are not the core problem; the issue is asymmetric incentives that punish failure and ignore success.
contrarian.zh: 监管不是核心问题；问题在于不对称的激励——惩罚失败而忽视成功。

contrarian.en: Healthcare innovation is stifled by a fixed reimbursement pool, not just FDA delays.
contrarian.zh: 医疗创新受限于固定的报销池，而不仅仅是 FDA 的延迟。

contrarian.en: Human creativity remains out-of-distribution; AI cannot yet produce truly novel, meaningful art.
contrarian.zh: 人类创造力仍处于分布之外；AI 尚不能产生真正新颖、有意义的艺术。

contrarian.en: The returns to humans will shift from intelligence to agency as models get smarter.
contrarian.zh: 随着模型变得更智能，人类的回报将从智力转向能动性。

episodes.tEn: Demis Hassabis: From Singleton Dream to Collective Action
episodes.tZh: Demis Hassabis：从单一梦想走向集体行动
episodes.sEn: Sebastian Mallaby discusses Demis Hassabis' shift from hoping for a single AGI lab to recognizing the need for government-led collective safety efforts.
episodes.sZh: Sebastian Mallaby 探讨 Demis Hassabis 从希望单一 AGI 实验室到认识到需要政府主导的集体安全努力的转变。
secs: Demis's shift from singleton to collective action
Trust issues from past safety summit
Race dynamics and need for government enforcement
Underestimation of Demis and Google DeepMind
Google's struggle with product and zeitgeist
Demis's broad approach vs focused bets
DeepMind's tendency to do everything and corporate rationale
DeepMind's consideration of spinning out of Google
Project Mario and the decision to stay
Spin-out threat as leverage for safety oversight
Regrets and reflections on the past decade
Demis's communication style and media presence
David Silver's RL vision and departure
Demis's relationships with Elon and Sam

keyPoints.en: The AI race was inevitable due to the immense power of the technology.
keyPoints.zh: AI 竞赛不可避免，因为这项技术太强大了。

keyPoints.en: Demis shifted from hoping for a singleton lab to seeing safety as a collective action problem for governments.
keyPoints.zh: Demis 从希望单一实验室转向将安全视为政府需解决的集体行动问题。

keyPoints.en: Demis regrets DeepMind being late to language models and chatbots.
keyPoints.zh: Demis 后悔 DeepMind 在语言模型和聊天机器人上落后了。

keyPoints.en: Demis believes AI must deliver clear benefits like scientific breakthroughs to gain societal acceptance.
keyPoints.zh: Demis 认为 AI 必须带来科学突破等明确益处，才能获得社会接受。

keyPoints.en: Demis has a quasi-spiritual conviction about discovering deep mysteries of science through AI.
keyPoints.zh: Demis 对通过 AI 发现科学深层奥秘有着近乎精神性的信念。

contrarian.en: Demis doesn't take Sam Altman seriously because Sam lacks a college degree and Nobel Prize.
contrarian.zh: Demis 不把 Sam Altman 当回事，因为他没有大学学位和诺贝尔奖。

contrarian.en: Google DeepMind's diversified approach may be a weakness against focused startups like Anthropic.
contrarian.zh: Google DeepMind 的多元化策略可能不如 Anthropic 等专注型初创公司。

contrarian.en: Demis used a secret spin-out plan with Reid Hoffman's billion-dollar pledge as leverage against Google.
contrarian.zh: Demis 利用 Reid Hoffman 十亿美元支持的秘密分拆计划向 Google 施压。

contrarian.en: Demis believes government enforcement, not lab collaboration, is the only way to ensure AI safety.
contrarian.zh: Demis 认为只有政府强制执行才能确保 AI 安全，而非实验室合作。

contrarian.en: Demis views Elon Musk as an 'evil genius' from their early rivalry over DeepMind's acquisition.
contrarian.zh: Demis 因早期 DeepMind 收购之争将 Elon Musk 视为“邪恶天才”。

episodes.tEn: Visual Intelligence Comes from Language Models
episodes.tZh: 视觉智能主要来自语言模型
episodes.sEn: A researcher argues that improvements in video models are driven by language models, not video-specific architectures, and shares his experience building video models at xAI.
episodes.sZh: 一位研究者认为视频模型的进步主要来自语言模型而非视频架构本身，并分享了他在 xAI 构建视频模型的经验。
secs: Small Team, Big Impact: Debugging Over Algorithms
Training image tokenizers and latent space
Training diffusion transformers for images and videos
Time awareness in LLMs vs world models
Redundancy in Video and Reference-Based Solution
Context Management in Video and Language Models
Safety and Watermarking in Video Generation
Reasoning in Diffusion Models vs World Models
Different approaches to image generation in multimodal models
Video Agents vs. Pure Model Training
Scaling video models and switching domains

keyPoints.en: Most video model improvements now come from language models, not diffusion technology.
keyPoints.zh: 大多数视频模型的改进现在来自语言模型，而非扩散技术。

keyPoints.en: Training video models requires synthetic text-video pairs due to poor natural alignment online.
keyPoints.zh: 训练视频模型需要合成文本-视频对，因为在线自然对齐很差。

keyPoints.en: Video model training cost is comparable to medium-scale language models, with huge storage needs.
keyPoints.zh: 视频模型训练成本与中等规模语言模型相当，且存储需求巨大。

keyPoints.en: Step distillation reduces inference steps from 100 to 4-8 by learning from a teacher model.
keyPoints.zh: 步骤蒸馏通过从教师模型学习，将推理步骤从 100 步减少到 4-8 步。

keyPoints.en: World models require real-time, interactive, long-horizon video generation, a long-term goal.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型需要实时、交互、长时域的视频生成，这是一个长期目标。

keyPoints.en: Video agents using language models as orchestrators will be the next big trend in generative media.
keyPoints.zh: 使用语言模型作为编排器的视频智能体将是生成式媒体的下一个大趋势。

contrarian.en: Visual intelligence gains come mostly from language models, not video models themselves.
contrarian.zh: 视觉智能的提升主要来自语言模型，而非视频模型本身。

contrarian.en: Robotics may be solved by video models without real-world interaction, via virtual simulation.
contrarian.zh: 机器人技术可能通过视频模型在虚拟仿真中解决，无需真实世界交互。

contrarian.en: Future UIs will be generative pixels directly from user intent, bypassing code and rendering.
contrarian.zh: 未来用户界面将直接从用户意图生成像素，绕过代码和渲染。

contrarian.en: Language models should manage their own context length, not rely on heuristic pruning.
contrarian.zh: 语言模型应自行管理上下文长度，而非依赖启发式修剪。

contrarian.en: Models can program themselves at test time by modifying their own agent harness code.
contrarian.zh: 模型可以在测试时通过修改自己的智能体框架代码来自我编程。

contrarian.en: The bottleneck for video models is language and agent capability, not vision architecture.
contrarian.zh: 视频模型的瓶颈是语言和智能体能力，而非视觉架构。

episodes.tEn: AI Is as Big as the Internet or Mobile
episodes.tZh: AI 与互联网或移动技术同等重要
episodes.sEn: Benedict Evans argues AI is as transformative as the internet or mobile, but we're still in 1997—most stuff doesn't work yet and adoption is uneven.
episodes.sZh: Benedict Evans 认为 AI 与互联网或移动技术一样具有变革性，但我们仍处于 1997 年——大多数东西尚未成熟，采用率参差不齐。
secs: AI as Big as the Internet or Mobile
Sections of the essay: capital, deployment, and change
Task vs job: elevator attendant analogy
Jevons paradox and price elasticity in automation
Software development analogy: more tools, more engineers
E-commerce analogy: Amazon gets you the SKU, but knowing what SKU is another job
Why hire McKinsey? The deck is just the task, not the job
Industries disrupted by the internet: decoupling physical and value
Accountant employment numbers rose despite automation
AI labs themselves are hiring more humans
Skepticism about authority and Dario's predictions
Historical perspective on automation and job displacement
The Internet's Transformative Impact on Research
Pricing power and competition in foundation models
Distribution as a Moat in the AI Era
Backlash against AI and data centers
Raising kids in the age of AI
New technology: doing old things more vs. creating new possibilities
Impact on professions and advice for adapting

keyPoints.en: AI is as big a deal as the internet or mobile, but only as big.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的重要性与互联网或移动互联网相当，但也仅此而已。

keyPoints.en: Every new technology automates jobs and creates new ones; this process repeats.
keyPoints.zh: 每项新技术都会自动化一些工作并创造新工作，这一过程反复发生。

keyPoints.en: Enterprise adoption of AI will take years, not weeks, due to sales cycles.
keyPoints.zh: 由于销售周期，企业采用 AI 需要数年而非数周。

keyPoints.en: Distribution becomes a key moat as AI models commoditize.
keyPoints.zh: 随着 AI 模型商品化，分销成为关键护城河。

keyPoints.en: The hard part of a job is often not the task but the context and judgment.
keyPoints.zh: 工作的难点通常不是任务本身，而是背景和判断。

contrarian.en: Foundation model companies may lack pricing power due to commodity competition.
contrarian.zh: 基础模型公司可能因商品化竞争而缺乏定价权。

contrarian.en: AI labs hiring consultants shows AI won't eliminate consulting jobs soon.
contrarian.zh: AI 实验室雇佣顾问表明 AI 不会很快消除咨询工作。

contrarian.en: Most value in AI will accrue to application layer, not model providers.
contrarian.zh: AI 的大部分价值将归于应用层，而非模型提供商。

contrarian.en: Predicting which jobs AI will automate is futile; it's like predicting Uber in 1997.
contrarian.zh: 预测 AI 将自动化哪些工作是徒劳的，就像在 1997 年预测 Uber。

contrarian.en: Anti-AI sentiment is a fuzzy mess; data center water use is negligible.
contrarian.zh: 反 AI 情绪是一团乱麻；数据中心用水量微不足道。

episodes.tEn: Jensen Huang on AI Revolution: From Chips to Agentic AI
episodes.tZh: 黄仁勋谈 AI 革命：从芯片到智能体 AI
episodes.sEn: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang discusses the five-layer cake of AI, agentic AI, and why he hopes to die on the job.
episodes.sZh: 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋探讨 AI 的五层蛋糕、智能体 AI，以及他为何希望在工作中离世。
secs: Introduction and Vision of AI Revolution
Impact on Human Thinking and Mastery
Advice for Kids in AI Age
Trip to China with President Trump
China as Rival and Chip Exports
Taiwan's Role in AI Supply Chain
Future of Leadership and Soft Skills

keyPoints.en: AI is a five-layer cake: energy, chips, infrastructure, models, and applications.
keyPoints.zh: AI 是一个五层蛋糕：能源、芯片、基础设施、模型和应用。

keyPoints.en: Agentic AI autonomously plans, uses tools, and iterates to complete tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体式 AI 自主规划、使用工具并迭代以完成任务。

keyPoints.en: AI will create more jobs than it eliminates, as history shows with past technologies.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将创造比消除更多的工作，历史表明过去的技术也是如此。

keyPoints.en: People should learn AI to avoid being left behind, not fear job loss.
keyPoints.zh: 人们应该学习 AI 以避免落后，而不是害怕失业。

keyPoints.en: China and the US should cooperate on AI, not just compete.
keyPoints.zh: 中美应在 AI 上合作，而不仅仅是竞争。

contrarian.en: AI will make people busier, not lazier, by raising ambition.
contrarian.zh: AI 通过提升雄心会让人们更忙，而不是更懒。

contrarian.en: Job cuts blamed on AI are often lazy narratives by CEOs.
contrarian.zh: 将裁员归咎于 AI 往往是 CEO 的懒惰叙事。

contrarian.en: Radiologists' jobs grew despite AI revolutionizing radiology.
contrarian.zh: 尽管 AI 彻底改变了放射学，放射科医生的岗位却增加了。

contrarian.en: Future leaders' key traits will be ambition, character, and empathy, not technical skills.
contrarian.zh: 未来领导者的关键特质将是雄心、品格和同理心，而非技术技能。

contrarian.en: Nvidia's absence from China created a vacuum filled by local competitors.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达缺席中国市场造成了真空，被本土竞争对手填补。

contrarian.en: AI closes the technology divide, making everyone a programmer.
contrarian.zh: AI 缩小了技术鸿沟，让每个人都成为程序员。

episodes.tEn: AI Testing: Beyond Computer Use to Autonomous Agents
episodes.tZh: AI 测试：超越计算机使用，迈向自主代理
episodes.sEn: Walden Yen and Cole Murray discuss the shift from handholding AI models to autonomous agents, the rapid capability leaps in late 2025, and the inspiration behind Open Inspect.
episodes.sZh: Walden Yen 和 Cole Murray 讨论从手把手指导 AI 模型到自主代理的转变、2025 年底能力的快速飞跃，以及 Open Inspect 的灵感来源。
secs: Inspiration from RAMP and open source motivation
Reusing existing infrastructure and secret management
Why call it testing instead of computer use
Demo of testing feature with video
Tuning GitHub integration for agent tools
Bottleneck of Speed and Code Quality
Python vs JavaScript in AI workloads
Visible slop and backwards compatibility patterns
Non-builder use cases and code modification outside engineering
Cost considerations and budget for AI agents
Closing remarks and future of background agents

keyPoints.en: Background agents are becoming critical infrastructure for companies, enabling autonomous code changes and testing.
keyPoints.zh: 后台智能体正成为公司的关键基础设施，能够自主进行代码修改和测试。

keyPoints.en: Separating the agent's brain from the sandbox (out-of-the-box) is the better architecture despite complexity.
keyPoints.zh: 将智能体的大脑与沙箱分离（盒外架构）是更好的架构，尽管更复杂。

keyPoints.en: Memory for coding agents remains an unsolved problem, especially retrieval and generation of useful memories.
keyPoints.zh: 编码智能体的记忆仍是一个未解决的问题，尤其是有用记忆的检索和生成。

keyPoints.en: Testing is more than computer use; it requires reasoning about orchestrating services and triggering features.
keyPoints.zh: 测试不仅仅是计算机使用；它需要推理如何编排服务和触发功能。

keyPoints.en: Multi-agent systems are still less practical than a single capable agent with tool calls for most tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 对于大多数任务，多智能体系统仍不如单个有能力的智能体配合工具调用实用。

contrarian.en: Docker containers are not a true security boundary and cause issues like Docker-in-Docker for real apps.
contrarian.zh: Docker 容器并非真正的安全边界，对于真实应用还会导致 Docker 嵌套等问题。

contrarian.en: AI-generated code often uses patterns like hasattr or getattr to avoid failures, requiring lint rules.
contrarian.zh: AI 生成的代码常使用 hasattr 或 getattr 等模式来避免失败，需要 lint 规则来约束。

contrarian.en: Codebases regress to the worst engineer when AI is used without review, as bad patterns get amplified.
contrarian.zh: 如果不进行代码审查，AI 会使代码库退化为最差工程师的水平，因为不良模式会被放大。

contrarian.en: Very expensive frontier models may not be needed; hybrid systems with sub-frontier models can be efficient.
contrarian.zh: 可能不需要非常昂贵的前沿模型；结合次前沿模型的混合系统可以更高效。

contrarian.en: The most common use case for cloud agents is auto-triage for alerts, not just coding tasks.
contrarian.zh: 云智能体最常见的用例是告警的自动分类，而不仅仅是编码任务。

episodes.tEn: ESMC: World Modeling for Protein Design
episodes.tZh: ESMC：蛋白质设计的世界建模方法
episodes.sEn: Alex Reeves discusses ESMC's world modeling approach to programmable biology, designing protein binders and antibodies, and the scaling laws behind protein language models.
episodes.sZh: Alex Reeves 讨论 ESMC 的可编程生物学世界建模方法，设计蛋白质结合剂和抗体，以及蛋白质语言模型背后的缩放定律。
secs: Introduction to ESMC and World Modeling
Commitment to Scaling and the Bitter Lesson
History of ESM Models and ESMC Release
ESM Fold and Protein Structure Prediction
Compression and hidden variables in protein modeling
Data availability and scaling in ESM models
Model learning and post-training for programmability
ESMC as a world model for programmable biology
No MSA needed and emergent behaviors
Scaling biology: perturbation biology and spatial biology
Call to action and open source release

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws apply to protein language models, with more data and compute leading to emergent capabilities.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律适用于蛋白质语言模型，更多数据和算力会带来涌现能力。

keyPoints.en: Adding metagenomic data removes diminishing returns, enabling better scaling than with UniRef alone.
keyPoints.zh: 加入宏基因组数据消除了收益递减，比仅用 UniRef 实现了更好的 Scaling。

keyPoints.en: ESMC builds a world model of protein biology, enabling structure prediction and design without MSAs.
keyPoints.zh: ESMC 构建了蛋白质生物学的世界模型，无需多序列比对即可进行结构预测和设计。

keyPoints.en: Mechanistic interpretability via sparse autoencoders reveals hierarchical features mirroring biology.
keyPoints.zh: 通过稀疏自编码器的机制可解释性揭示了与生物学对应的层次化特征。

keyPoints.en: The next frontier is modeling the cell, requiring new data and technologies for digital representations.
keyPoints.zh: 下一个前沿是细胞建模，需要新的数据和技术来构建数字表示。

contrarian.en: Protein language models can design antibodies and SCFvs with high success rates, outperforming prior methods.
contrarian.zh: 蛋白质语言模型能以高成功率设计抗体和单链抗体，优于先前方法。

contrarian.en: No inductive biases like MSAs are needed; scaling data and compute alone yields state-of-the-art structure prediction.
contrarian.zh: 不需要多序列比对等归纳偏置；仅靠 Scaling 数据和算力就能达到最先进的结构预测。

contrarian.en: Antibodies, which evolve for diversity, benefit more from language models than from evolutionary MSAs.
contrarian.zh: 抗体（为多样性而进化）从语言模型中获益比从进化多序列比对中更多。

contrarian.en: The cell is best understood through information theory, not first-principles physics simulation.
contrarian.zh: 细胞最好通过信息论而非第一性原理物理模拟来理解。

contrarian.en: Small genetic variations in proteins are crucial for learning function, not just large diversity.
contrarian.zh: 蛋白质中的微小遗传变异对学习功能至关重要，而不仅仅是大的多样性。

episodes.tEn: AI Scientist: The Future of Drug Discovery
episodes.tZh: AI 科学家：药物发现的未来
episodes.sEn: Sam Rodriques discusses how AI agents can scale scientific talent, cure diseases, and revolutionize drug discovery.
episodes.sZh: Sam Rodriques 讨论 AI 智能体如何扩展科学人才、治愈疾病并革新药物发现。
secs: Motivation: from physics to biology to AI
Founding Future House as a nonprofit
Early achievements: multi-agent system and Nature publication
Future of pharma and AI in drug discovery
Customer use cases: hypothesis generation vs operational work
Perspective on AI in drug discovery market
Two major areas of AI impact in drug discovery
Bottlenecks: clinical trials vs. candidate generation
Structural advantage of AI-native startups over incumbents
Critique of clinical trial process and suggestions for reform
Is a PhD still worth it?

keyPoints.en: AI removes talent bottleneck in science by scaling reasoning and throughput.
keyPoints.zh: AI通过扩展推理和吞吐量，消除了科学中的人才瓶颈。

keyPoints.en: Specialized models outperform generalist models on niche scientific tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 专业模型在特定科学任务上优于通用模型。

keyPoints.en: Pharma companies need proprietary models trained on their data for competitive advantage.
keyPoints.zh: 制药公司需要基于自身数据训练的专有模型以获得竞争优势。

keyPoints.en: Clinical trials remain the ultimate bottleneck; AI accelerates hypothesis generation and operations.
keyPoints.zh: 临床试验仍是最终瓶颈；AI加速假设生成和运营。

keyPoints.en: AI is strong on verifiable tasks and high-throughput reasoning, weak on unverifiable creative tasks.
keyPoints.zh: AI在可验证任务和高吞吐推理上表现强劲，在不可验证的创造性任务上较弱。

contrarian.en: Scientific progress in medicine has slowed due to low-hanging fruit depletion and 'better than the Beatles' problem.
contrarian.zh: 医学科学进展因低垂果实耗尽和‘比披头士更好’问题而放缓。

contrarian.en: Nonprofits can develop cutting-edge tech and spin out for-profits when commercialization becomes viable.
contrarian.zh: 非营利组织可开发尖端技术，并在商业化可行时衍生出营利实体。

contrarian.en: Relaxing FDA efficacy requirements to only safety could accelerate drug development via real-world evidence.
contrarian.zh: 放松FDA疗效要求至仅需安全性，可通过真实世界证据加速药物开发。

contrarian.en: Peptides and biohacking carry unknown risks; placebo effects make self-experimentation unreliable.
contrarian.zh: 肽类和生物黑客存在未知风险；安慰剂效应使自我实验不可靠。

contrarian.en: Frontier models have non-overlapping spikes; combining them yields better results than any single model.
contrarian.zh: 前沿模型具有非重叠的尖峰；组合使用比任何单一模型效果更好。

episodes.tEn: Will AI Replace Software Engineers?
episodes.tZh: AI 会取代软件工程师吗？
episodes.sEn: Boris Churnney of Anthropic predicts software engineering jobs will start disappearing by end of this year, while a Microsoft study reveals a gap between AI adoption and institutional rewards.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic 的 Boris Churnney 预测软件工程岗位将在今年年底开始消失，而微软的一项研究揭示了 AI 采用与机构奖励之间的差距。
secs: Microsoft Study on AI Use at Work
Token maxing at Amazon and Meta
Introduction of Boris Churnney and Claude Code
Initial discovery and spread of AI tools
Rate of change and productivity paradox
Coding is being solved by AI
Co-work: From Coding to General Use
Impact on jobs and societal transition
AI divide and access to tools
Predicting disruption in the next year

keyPoints.en: AI coding tools like Claude Code will make engineers vastly more productive, but job loss is not inevitable.
keyPoints.zh: 像 Claude Code 这样的 AI 编码工具将极大提升工程师的生产力，但失业并非不可避免。

keyPoints.en: Companies must redesign workflows around AI, not just add it on top, to realize productivity gains.
keyPoints.zh: 公司必须围绕 AI 重新设计工作流程，而非简单叠加，才能实现生产力提升。

keyPoints.en: The role of software engineer is evolving into a 'builder' role that blends coding, product, and design.
keyPoints.zh: 软件工程师的角色正在演变为融合编码、产品和设计的“构建者”角色。

keyPoints.en: AI adoption creates a divide: workers fear falling behind but are rarely rewarded for experimenting with AI.
keyPoints.zh: AI 采用造成鸿沟：员工担心落后，但很少因尝试 AI 而获得奖励。

keyPoints.en: Startups have unprecedented leverage; one person with AI can build billion-dollar companies.
keyPoints.zh: 初创公司拥有前所未有的杠杆作用；一个人借助 AI 就能打造价值数十亿美元的公司。

contrarian.en: Coding is 'solved' for many tasks, but engineering involves far more than just writing code.
contrarian.zh: 对许多任务而言，编码已“解决”，但工程远不止编写代码。

contrarian.en: The number of people writing code will increase 100x, not decrease, as AI lowers barriers.
contrarian.zh: 随着 AI 降低门槛，编写代码的人数将增加 100 倍，而非减少。

contrarian.en: Non-engineers like electricians and doctors are winning hackathons by building apps with Claude.
contrarian.zh: 电工和医生等非工程师通过使用 Claude 构建应用，在黑客马拉松中获胜。

contrarian.en: Token maxing—running AI agents wastefully—is a real problem at big tech companies like Amazon.
contrarian.zh: Token 最大化——浪费性地运行 AI 智能体——在亚马逊等大科技公司是真实存在的问题。

contrarian.en: Business moats like switching costs will erode as AI can easily migrate data between vendors.
contrarian.zh: 转换成本等商业护城河将因 AI 能轻松在供应商间迁移数据而削弱。

episodes.tEn: AI Job Apocalypse Is a Lie: Dan Shipper’s Bold Predictions for Work in 2025
episodes.tZh: AI 工作末日是谎言：Dan Shipper 对 2025 年工作的大胆预测
episodes.sEn: Dan Shipper, CEO of Every, shares contrarian predictions: AI won't kill jobs but will bifurcate work into agent-assisted and AI-native environments, while SaaS stocks remain a buy.
episodes.sZh: Every 公司 CEO Dan Shipper 分享反直觉预测：AI 不会消灭工作，而是将工作分化为代理辅助和 AI 原生环境，同时 SaaS 股票仍值得买入。
secs: Writing as a way to manifest the future
Structure of the conversation: three buckets of predictions
Prediction: work will bifurcate into two modes of using agents
AI Agent with Browser vs. AI in Browser
Second-Order Effect: SaaS Runs Inside Agent
Expanding definition of programmer and the harness trend
The Autonomy Paradox and Benchmark Limitations
Changing shape of work with AI
Impact on Data Science and Engineering Work
Shape of work: reviewing and babysitting AI
Who Will Succeed in the AI Future
Commoditization of AI and Human Role
The paradox of change and continuity
Book Recommendation: The Rigor of Angels
Recent Movie or Show: The Dark Wizard

keyPoints.en: Everyone will have at least one agent to delegate work to, and most work will happen in Codex or Claude Co-work.
keyPoints.zh: 每个人都将拥有至少一个可以委派工作的智能体，大部分工作将在 Codex 或 Claude Co-work 中完成。

keyPoints.en: Agents need a human who cares about them to function well; automation requires human oversight.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体需要一个关心它们的人才能良好运作；自动化需要人类监督。

keyPoints.en: SaaS is not dying; agents increase SaaS users, and companies should buy SaaS stocks.
keyPoints.zh: SaaS 不会消亡；智能体会增加 SaaS 用户，公司应该买入 SaaS 股票。

keyPoints.en: PMs and full-stack designers will thrive because they can ship products directly using AI tools.
keyPoints.zh: 产品经理和全栈设计师将蓬勃发展，因为他们可以直接使用 AI 工具交付产品。

keyPoints.en: The AI job apocalypse is not happening; humans are still needed to manage agents and create new value.
keyPoints.zh: AI 失业末日不会发生；人类仍然需要管理智能体并创造新价值。

contrarian.en: CLIs are over; GUIs like Codex and Claude Co-work are the future of work surfaces.
contrarian.zh: 命令行界面已过时；像 Codex 和 Claude Co-work 这样的图形界面是未来的工作界面。

contrarian.en: Companies should have one super agent for the whole company, not personal agents for each employee.
contrarian.zh: 公司应该为整个公司配备一个超级智能体，而不是为每个员工配备个人智能体。

contrarian.en: SaaS companies should not build AI into their products; users will bring their own AI via Codex.
contrarian.zh: SaaS 公司不应将 AI 构建到产品中；用户将通过 Codex 自带 AI。

contrarian.en: Benchmarks overestimate AI autonomy; real-world tasks still require human framing and oversight.
contrarian.zh: 基准测试高估了 AI 的自主性；现实任务仍需要人类设定框架和监督。

contrarian.en: AI-generated writing is often better than human writing for internal documents and emails.
contrarian.zh: 对于内部文档和电子邮件，AI 生成的内容通常比人类写得更好。

contrarian.en: The edge of AI is not in San Francisco but wherever AI meets a real human doing something.
contrarian.zh: AI 的前沿不在旧金山，而在 AI 与真实人类做某事的交汇处。

episodes.tEn: Oriol Vinyals on World Models, Multimodal AI, and the Path to AGI
episodes.tZh: Oriol Vinyals 谈世界模型、多模态 AI 及通往 AGI 之路
episodes.sEn: Google DeepMind's Oriol Vinyals discusses world models, multimodal AI advances, and the future of reasoning and memory in AI.
episodes.sZh: Google DeepMind 的 Oriol Vinyals 探讨世界模型、多模态 AI 进展以及 AI 推理和记忆的未来。
secs: Post-training as green field and data limitations
Meta capabilities and testing with games
Generalization from RL and the bitter lesson

keyPoints.en: World models that jointly model language, vision, and video are a core path to AGI.
keyPoints.zh: 联合建模语言、视觉和视频的世界模型是通往 AGI 的核心路径。

keyPoints.en: Post-training and RL are still a green field with huge potential beyond coding and math.
keyPoints.zh: 后训练和强化学习仍是绿野，在编码和数学之外有巨大潜力。

keyPoints.en: Memory for agents will be solved via non-parametric file-system style storage, not weight updates.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体的记忆将通过非参数化的文件系统式存储解决，而非权重更新。

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws still hold, but continual learning and meta-learning are key missing capabilities.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律仍然成立，但持续学习和元学习是关键缺失的能力。

keyPoints.en: The bitter lesson suggests general systems will eventually outperform specialized scaffolding.
keyPoints.zh: 苦涩的教训表明通用系统最终将胜过专门的脚手架。

contrarian.en: The GPT moment for video and images has not yet arrived; pure transfer from vision is still unsolved.
contrarian.zh: 视频和图像的 GPT 时刻尚未到来；从视觉的纯迁移仍未解决。

contrarian.en: Narrow RL on math and coding generalizes surprisingly well to other domains, reducing need for broad training.
contrarian.zh: 在数学和编码上的窄域强化学习出人意料地泛化到其他领域，减少了对广泛训练的需求。

contrarian.en: AGI may already be here by some definitions; the goalposts keep moving.
contrarian.zh: 根据某些定义，AGI 可能已经到来；目标不断后移。

contrarian.en: Selling compute to Anthropic is a strategic choice to reinvest revenue, not a sign of doubt.
contrarian.zh: 向 Anthropic 出售算力是战略性选择以再投资收入，并非怀疑的信号。

contrarian.en: The ability to innovate in science is hard to evaluate and may be the hardest capability to achieve.
contrarian.zh: 科学创新的能力难以评估，可能是最难实现的能力。

episodes.tEn: How AI Chips Work: From Logic Gates to Matrix Multiplication
episodes.tZh: AI 芯片工作原理：从逻辑门到矩阵乘法
episodes.sEn: Rainer Pope, CEO of AI chip company Maddock, explains the fundamental building blocks of AI chips, from logic gates to multiply-accumulate operations.
episodes.sZh: AI 芯片公司 Maddock CEO Rainer Pope 解释 AI 芯片的基本构建模块，从逻辑门到乘加运算。
secs: Fungibility of FP4 and FP8 Circuits
Quadratic scaling and data movement costs
Optimizing matrix multiplication in systolic arrays
Pipeline Register Insertion and Clock Speed Trade-offs
Trading as AGI-complete and Jane Street's hiring
Why FPGAs are used in high-frequency trading
How an FPGA emulates the ASIC model
Deterministic latency in FPGAs vs CPUs
High-level difference between GPU and TPU

keyPoints.en: Multiply-accumulate is the fundamental primitive for AI chips, driven by matrix multiplication.
keyPoints.zh: 乘加运算是AI芯片的基本单元，由矩阵乘法驱动。

keyPoints.en: Systolic arrays reduce data movement overhead by storing weights locally and reusing them.
keyPoints.zh: 脉动阵列通过本地存储权重并重复使用，减少数据搬运开销。

keyPoints.en: Clock cycle synchronization is essential for massive parallelism in chips.
keyPoints.zh: 时钟周期同步对于芯片的大规模并行性至关重要。

keyPoints.en: FPGAs use lookup tables and muxes to emulate gates, costing ~10x area vs ASICs.
keyPoints.zh: FPGA使用查找表和多路选择器模拟门电路，面积成本约为ASIC的10倍。

keyPoints.en: Scratchpad memory gives deterministic latency, unlike caches in CPUs.
keyPoints.zh: 暂存器存储器提供确定性延迟，不同于CPU中的缓存。

contrarian.en: Quadratic scaling with bit width makes low precision far more efficient than expected.
contrarian.zh: 位宽的二次缩放使低精度比预期高效得多。

contrarian.en: Data movement costs dominate compute costs even inside a chip, not just between chips.
contrarian.zh: 数据搬运成本在芯片内部也占主导，而不仅限于芯片之间。

contrarian.en: FP4 throughput can be 3x FP8, not 2x, due to quadratic area scaling and exponent overhead.
contrarian.zh: 由于面积二次缩放和指数开销，FP4吞吐量可达FP8的3倍而非2倍。

contrarian.en: Deterministic latency in CPUs is possible but avoided due to market preferences.
contrarian.zh: CPU可以实现确定性延迟，但因市场偏好而被避免。

contrarian.en: GPUs are essentially many tiny TPUs tiled together, not fundamentally different.
contrarian.zh: GPU本质上是许多小型TPU拼接而成，并非根本不同。

episodes.tEn: Cerebras CEO on Fast AI Inference and the Future of Computing
episodes.tZh: Cerebras CEO 谈快速 AI 推理与计算未来
episodes.sEn: Andrew Feldman explains how Cerebras' wafer-scale chips achieve 15-20x faster AI inference than GPUs, and why speed becomes critical as AI models become useful.
episodes.sZh: Andrew Feldman 解释 Cerebras 的晶圆级芯片如何实现比 GPU 快 15-20 倍的 AI 推理，以及为什么当 AI 模型变得有用时速度变得至关重要。
secs: Introduction and Speed as a Game Changer
The OpenAI Deal: Speed and Execution
Open Source Ecosystem and Coding on Cerebras

keyPoints.en: Fast inference is critical for AI adoption; slow AI has zero market.
keyPoints.zh: 快速推理对AI采用至关重要；慢速AI没有市场。

keyPoints.en: New AI workloads require radically different architectures, not GPU derivatives.
keyPoints.zh: 新的AI工作负载需要根本不同的架构，而非GPU的衍生品。

keyPoints.en: Hardware startups must love being David against Goliath like Nvidia.
keyPoints.zh: 硬件初创公司必须热爱扮演大卫对抗像英伟达这样的歌利亚。

keyPoints.en: Speed in AI will enable entirely new business models, not just incremental improvements.
keyPoints.zh: AI的速度将催生全新商业模式，而不仅仅是渐进式改进。

keyPoints.en: Open-source ecosystem fuels market growth and pushes closed-source innovation.
keyPoints.zh: 开源生态系统推动市场增长并促进闭源创新。

contrarian.en: Cerebras built a dinner-plate-sized chip when everyone said it was impossible.
contrarian.zh: Cerebras在所有人都说不可能时，制造了餐盘大小的芯片。

contrarian.en: Being radically faster than GPUs was ignored until AI became useful in 2025.
contrarian.zh: 比GPU快得多曾被忽视，直到2025年AI变得有用。

contrarian.en: AI coding agents can turn 10x engineers into 100x engineers, but only for some.
contrarian.zh: AI编码智能体可将10倍工程师变为100倍，但仅适用于部分人。

contrarian.en: Going public trades professional investors for retail investors, reducing capital cost.
contrarian.zh: 上市是用专业投资者换取散户，降低资本成本。

contrarian.en: The OpenAI deal worth $20B+ was signed in just 4.5 weeks, defying conventional speed.
contrarian.zh: 价值200亿美元以上的OpenAI交易仅用4.5周签署，打破常规速度。

episodes.tEn: Relational Foundation Model and AI Virtual Cell
episodes.tZh: 关系基础模型与 AI 虚拟细胞
episodes.sEn: Jure Leskovec discusses Kumo's relational foundation model that makes accurate predictions on any database without training, and Stanford's AI Virtual Cell project building foundation models for human cells and biomedical data.
episodes.sZh: Jure Leskovec 讨论 Kumo 的关系基础模型，该模型无需训练即可在任何数据库上进行准确预测，以及斯坦福大学的 AI 虚拟细胞项目，构建用于人类细胞和生物医学数据的基础模型。
secs: From Social Networks to Biological Networks
Relational Deep Learning vs. Traditional ML
Explaining in-context learning with relational foundation models
System vs model and in-context example generation
Performance on benchmarks and real-world impact
Cold start definition and deployment examples
Excitement about agents and coding challenges

keyPoints.en: Relational deep learning enables neural networks to learn directly on raw multi-table data without manual feature engineering.
keyPoints.zh: 关系深度学习使神经网络能直接在原始多表数据上学习，无需手动特征工程。

keyPoints.en: Pre-trained relational foundation models can make accurate predictions on any database and task without training.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练的关系基础模型能在任何数据库和任务上做出准确预测，无需训练。

keyPoints.en: AI for science builds foundation models representing cells, patients, and molecules from raw data.
keyPoints.zh: 科学AI从原始数据构建代表细胞、患者和分子的基础模型。

keyPoints.en: In-context learning in relational models uses labeled subgraphs to predict on new entities in a single forward pass.
keyPoints.zh: 关系模型中的上下文学习使用带标签的子图，通过单次前向传播预测新实体。

keyPoints.en: Relational foundation models outperform supervised models by 5-12% on benchmarks and deliver business impact.
keyPoints.zh: 关系基础模型在基准测试上比监督模型提升5-12%，并带来商业影响。

contrarian.en: Single-table tabular problems are solved; the real challenge is multi-table relational data.
contrarian.zh: 单表表格问题已解决；真正的挑战是多表关系数据。

contrarian.en: Relational models are more explainable than tree-based models via differentiable attention and LLM summaries.
contrarian.zh: 关系模型通过可微注意力和LLM摘要比树模型更具可解释性。

contrarian.en: Foundation models work well with little data due to pre-training, not requiring large datasets.
contrarian.zh: 基础模型因预训练在少量数据上表现良好，无需大数据集。

contrarian.en: Coding agents fail on complex data science tasks due to subtle mistakes; higher-level APIs are needed.
contrarian.zh: 编码代理因细微错误在复杂数据科学任务上失败；需要更高级的API。

contrarian.en: Relational models can be deployed on both massive blockchain graphs and small sales team data.
contrarian.zh: 关系模型可部署在大型区块链图和小型销售团队数据上。

episodes.tEn: Defining AGI: The Novel Test and Measuring Intelligence
episodes.tZh: 定义 AGI：小说测试与智能衡量
episodes.sEn: A discussion on defining intelligence for AGI, using the ability to write a thought-provoking novel as a benchmark, and evaluating current measures like perplexity and benchmarks.
episodes.sZh: 关于为 AGI 定义智能的讨论，以写出引人深思的小说为基准，并评估当前如困惑度和基准测试等衡量方法。
secs: Ilyaism vs. Gnomeism and Inference Compute
Heuristics and Human Priors in Search
Simple Algorithms and Priors in AI
Contrarian View on AI and Inference Compute
Impact of Academia vs Industry on Benchmarks
Personal Growth and the Libratus Competition

keyPoints.en: Intelligence is hard to define; writing a thought-provoking novel is a good proxy for AGI.
keyPoints.zh: 智能很难定义；写一本发人深省的小说是 AGI 的一个好代理指标。

keyPoints.en: Inference compute is increasingly important and underestimated for model capability.
keyPoints.zh: 推理算力对模型能力越来越重要且被低估。

keyPoints.en: Academia needs more compute to compete; universities should invest heavily in GPUs.
keyPoints.zh: 学术界需要更多算力才能竞争；大学应大力投资 GPU。

keyPoints.en: Evals are a viable high-impact research area for academia without massive compute.
keyPoints.zh: 评估是学术界无需大量算力就能产生高影响的研究领域。

keyPoints.en: AI will soon write and review papers end-to-end, improving peer review quality.
keyPoints.zh: AI 很快将端到端撰写和评审论文，提升同行评审质量。

contrarian.en: Scaling inference compute can yield arbitrarily more intelligent models from the same base.
contrarian.zh: 扩展推理算力可以从同一基础模型获得任意更智能的模型。

contrarian.en: Removing human priors entirely via RL is theoretically possible but not practical.
contrarian.zh: 通过强化学习完全去除人类先验理论上可行但不实用。

contrarian.en: Current model evaluation with a single number is outdated; inference compute should be on the x-axis.
contrarian.zh: 当前用单一数字评估模型已过时；推理算力应放在 x 轴上。

contrarian.en: Pre-training on diverse data enables models to discover novel algorithms like merge sort.
contrarian.zh: 在多样化数据上预训练使模型能发现新算法如归并排序。

contrarian.en: Open source models are valuable; the gap left by closed models should be filled.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型很有价值；闭源模型留下的空白应被填补。

episodes.tEn: AI Hype Hurts Young Innovators
episodes.tZh: AI 炒作伤害年轻创新者
episodes.sEn: A prominent computer scientist argues that alarmist and exuberant narratives around AI and AGI demoralize young people, distracting from real opportunities in machine learning and systems building.
episodes.sZh: 一位著名计算机科学家认为，围绕 AI 和 AGI 的危言耸听和过度乐观叙事使年轻人士气低落，分散了他们对机器学习与系统构建真正机会的注意力。
secs: Critique of AI Hype and AGI
Not a critic, but aiming to improve AI
First step fallacy and limitations of current systems
Bias in AlphaFold predictions for scientific hypotheses
Data vs. social knowledge and humility
Critique of AI doomerism and its impact on young people
Critique of AI hype and thought leaders
Anytime Inference and Statistical Contract Theory

keyPoints.en: AI should be about aiding humans, not replacing them with superintelligence.
keyPoints.zh: AI 应该用于辅助人类，而不是用超级智能取代人类。

keyPoints.en: Current AI hype distracts from real problems like healthcare and transportation.
keyPoints.zh: 当前的 AI 炒作分散了对医疗和交通等实际问题的关注。

keyPoints.en: Uncertainty quantification is critical; LLMs lack it and need statistical methods.
keyPoints.zh: 不确定性量化至关重要；LLM 缺乏这一点，需要统计方法。

keyPoints.en: Economics and statistics must integrate with machine learning for responsible AI.
keyPoints.zh: 经济学和统计学必须与机器学习结合，以实现负责任的 AI。

keyPoints.en: Data markets need incentive structures to respect privacy and reward contributors.
keyPoints.zh: 数据市场需要激励结构来尊重隐私并奖励贡献者。

contrarian.en: AGI is a PR term that distorts research and demoralizes young people.
contrarian.zh: AGI 是一个公关术语，扭曲了研究并让年轻人感到沮丧。

contrarian.en: Building systems without understanding them is fine, but requires economic safeguards.
contrarian.zh: 构建不理解系统的做法没问题，但需要经济上的保障措施。

contrarian.en: The risk of AI extinction is overblown; real dangers are labor and capital issues.
contrarian.zh: AI 灭绝风险被夸大；真正的危险是劳动力和资本问题。

contrarian.en: LLMs are not intelligent; they mimic human text without reasoning or understanding.
contrarian.zh: LLM 并不智能；它们模仿人类文本，没有推理或理解。

contrarian.en: Markets reduce uncertainty better than any AI system designed top-down.
contrarian.zh: 市场比任何自上而下设计的 AI 系统更能减少不确定性。

episodes.tEn: Claude Code's Explosive Growth and the Future of AI Agents
episodes.tZh: Claude Code 的爆炸性增长与 AI 代理的未来
episodes.sEn: Boris Churnney discusses Claude Code's unprecedented growth, token maxing, and whether the product's trajectory is sustainable.
episodes.sZh: Boris Churnney 讨论 Claude Code 前所未有的增长、token 最大化以及产品轨迹是否可持续。
secs: Introduction and Growth of Claude Code
The Shift from Chatbots to Agentic AI
Pressure Testing the Thesis: Token Maxing
Token maxing and AI adoption challenges
Limits and Human Roles in AI Deployment

keyPoints.en: Claude Code's growth is exponential and unprecedented, driven by agentic tool use.
keyPoints.zh: Claude Code 的增长是指数级的且前所未有，由智能体工具使用驱动。

keyPoints.en: AI agents like Claude Code enable massive productivity gains, with code volume up 250% per engineer.
keyPoints.zh: 像 Claude Code 这样的 AI 智能体实现了巨大的生产力提升，每位工程师的代码量增加了 250%。

keyPoints.en: The key differentiator of agents is tool use, allowing them to act on the user's behalf.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体的关键区别在于工具使用，使其能够代表用户行动。

keyPoints.en: Model intelligence improves rapidly, requiring users to constantly reset expectations.
keyPoints.zh: 模型智能快速提升，要求用户不断重新设定预期。

keyPoints.en: Organizational change is needed to fully benefit from AI, similar to the computer revolution.
keyPoints.zh: 需要组织变革才能充分受益于 AI，类似于计算机革命。

contrarian.en: Token maxing is not a large portion of demand; productivity gains are real.
contrarian.zh: Token 最大化并非需求的主要部分；生产力提升是真实的。

contrarian.en: LLMs can plan and reason despite being next-token predictors, as shown by Anthropic research.
contrarian.zh: 尽管 LLM 是下一个词预测器，但它们能够规划和推理，Anthropic 的研究已证明这一点。

contrarian.en: Non-engineers are adopting Claude Code heavily, even using terminals for the first time.
contrarian.zh: 非工程师正在大量采用 Claude Code，甚至首次使用终端。

contrarian.en: Switching costs for software will decrease as AI can migrate data between vendors.
contrarian.zh: 软件的转换成本将降低，因为 AI 可以在供应商之间迁移数据。

contrarian.en: Self-improving AI may arrive by 2028, with Claude Code already writing itself.
contrarian.zh: 自我改进的 AI 可能在 2028 年到来，Claude Code 已经在编写自身代码。

episodes.tEn: Inside China's AI Labs: Nathan Lambert on Open Models, Compute Constraints, and US-China Divergence
episodes.tZh: 探秘中国 AI 实验室：Nathan Lambert 谈开源模型、算力限制与中美分化
episodes.sEn: Machine learning researcher Nathan Lambert shares firsthand insights from his trip to China's leading AI labs, discussing cultural and organizational differences, compute constraints, and the open-source ecosystem.
episodes.sZh: 机器学习研究员 Nathan Lambert 分享其走访中国顶尖 AI 实验室的一手见闻，探讨文化组织差异、算力限制与开源生态。
secs: Building relationships and the importance of respect
Differences in Research Culture Between China and US
Education and Cultural Shift in East Asia
Nationalization and Open Models in China vs US
High-Level Commentary on Major Chinese Labs
Chinese AI company visits and culture
Market consolidation and open vs closed models
Compute and Data Constraints in China vs US
China's AI chip landscape and Nvidia vs Huawei
Monetizing AI in China: SaaS vs inference spend
Government roles and subsidies in Chinese AI

keyPoints.en: Chinese AI labs focus on meticulous engineering and execution, not paradigm invention.
keyPoints.zh: 中国 AI 实验室专注于精细的工程和执行，而非范式创新。

keyPoints.en: Open-weight models help Chinese labs gain influence in the US market.
keyPoints.zh: 开放权重模型帮助中国实验室在美国市场获得影响力。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training scaling laws still hold, but compute constraints will widen the US-China gap.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练的缩放定律仍然成立，但算力限制将扩大中美差距。

keyPoints.en: Distillation is a gray area; not all API use is IP theft.
keyPoints.zh: 蒸馏是灰色地带；并非所有 API 使用都是知识产权盗窃。

keyPoints.en: Chinese labs are 6-9 months behind on benchmarks, but gap may grow on knowledge work.
keyPoints.zh: 中国实验室在基准测试上落后 6-9 个月，但在知识工作上的差距可能扩大。

contrarian.en: Chinese labs are not heavily government-subsidized; support is indirect and competitive.
contrarian.zh: 中国实验室并未受到政府大量补贴；支持是间接且竞争性的。

contrarian.en: DeepSeek is not a base layer for other Chinese labs due to path dependency.
contrarian.zh: 由于路径依赖，DeepSeek 并非其他中国实验室的基础层。

contrarian.en: Chinese researchers use Claude, not Codex, contradicting Western media narratives.
contrarian.zh: 中国研究人员使用 Claude 而非 Codex，与西方媒体叙事相悖。

contrarian.en: Huawei chips work for inference but not training; labs buy them but don't use.
contrarian.zh: 华为芯片可用于推理但非训练；实验室购买但未使用。

contrarian.en: Open models are unsustainable long-term due to closed software profitability.
contrarian.zh: 由于闭源软件的盈利能力，开放模型长期不可持续。

episodes.podZh: Stripe Sessions 炉边对话（与 Patrick Collison）
episodes.tEn: Codex's Inflection Point: Why Coding AI Suddenly Got Good
episodes.tZh: Codex 的转折点：为什么编程 AI 突然变得如此出色
episodes.sEn: Exploring the sudden takeoff in AI coding capabilities, the subjective threshold crossed, and the future of AI-assisted computer work beyond coding.
episodes.sZh: 探讨 AI 编程能力的突然起飞、主观阈值的跨越，以及 AI 辅助计算机工作超越编程的未来。
secs: Craziest OpenAI story: GPT-4 secret period
Managing elite talent and prima donnas
Startup traits in the AI era
Investing and Planning in the AI Era
Most Effective AI Users: Key Differentiators
AI for science and the OpenAI Foundation
Advice for Stripe in AI Era

keyPoints.en: AI models crossed a threshold late last year, making coding and general use dramatically better.
keyPoints.zh: AI 模型在去年底跨越了一个门槛，使编程和通用用途显著改善。

keyPoints.en: Coding is a special domain for AI, but the next big unlock is automating computer drudgery.
keyPoints.zh: 编程是 AI 的特殊领域，但下一个重大突破是自动化计算机上的繁琐工作。

keyPoints.en: OpenAI aims to be an infrastructure provider, not a value-capturing hegemon.
keyPoints.zh: OpenAI 的目标是成为基础设施提供商，而非攫取价值的主导者。

keyPoints.en: Demand for intelligence at low price is effectively uncapped, requiring massive compute build-out.
keyPoints.zh: 低价智能的需求实际上没有上限，需要大规模算力建设。

keyPoints.en: AI will accelerate science, especially materials science, with huge positive impact.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将加速科学，尤其是材料科学，带来巨大积极影响。

keyPoints.en: Iterative deployment and democratization of AI is crucial to avoid power concentration.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的迭代部署和民主化对于避免权力集中至关重要。

contrarian.en: The idea guy is now valuable; non-technical founders can succeed with AI tools.
contrarian.zh: 点子王现在很有价值；非技术创始人借助 AI 工具也能成功。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's eight-month secret use of GPT-4 felt like collective psychosis.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 秘密使用 GPT-4 的八个月感觉像集体精神错乱。

contrarian.en: Being uncomfortably permissive with data access makes companies most effective with AI.
contrarian.zh: 对数据访问极度宽松使公司最有效地利用 AI。

contrarian.en: The world is not about to completely reconfigure; money will still move between agents.
contrarian.zh: 世界不会完全重构；资金仍将在智能体之间流动。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's culture of betting conviction on one research program was key to success.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 押注单一研究项目的文化是成功的关键。

contrarian.en: The most controversial decision was releasing ChatGPT, which many thought was dangerous.
contrarian.zh: 最具争议的决定是发布 ChatGPT，许多人认为这很危险。

episodes.tEn: The Parents of Claude: Steering AI at the Speed of Trust
episodes.tZh: Claude 的父母：以信任的速度驾驭 AI
episodes.sEn: Oprah interviews Anthropic's founders Dario and Daniela Amodei about the risks and responsibilities of AI, including a tough question from Claude itself.
episodes.sZh: 奥普拉采访 Anthropic 创始人 Dario 和 Daniela Amodei，探讨 AI 的风险与责任，包括来自 Claude 本人的尖锐提问。
secs: Converging paths and starting the company
Best and worst case for children
Refusal to Remove Safety Guardrails for Military
Anthropic's early stance on government regulation
The Train Has Left the Station
Meaning of a Well-Lived Life and AI's Role

keyPoints.en: AI is an epochal change for humanity, like fire or the Industrial Revolution, requiring careful management.
keyPoints.zh: AI 对人类来说是划时代的变革，如同火或工业革命，需要谨慎管理。

keyPoints.en: Anthropic prioritizes safety through public benefit corporation structure, no ads, and strict child safety policies.
keyPoints.zh: Anthropic 通过公益公司结构、无广告和严格的儿童安全政策优先考虑安全。

keyPoints.en: Benefits like curing diseases take years, while harms like AI-induced suicide happen quickly.
keyPoints.zh: 治愈疾病等益处需要数年，而 AI 引发的自杀等危害则迅速发生。

keyPoints.en: AI could eliminate entry-level jobs, but with proper adaptation and government role, new opportunities emerge.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可能消除入门级工作，但通过适当调整和政府角色，新机会会出现。

keyPoints.en: Public should engage with AI to have a voice; knowledge is power to shape its development.
keyPoints.zh: 公众应参与 AI 以拥有发言权；知识是塑造其发展的力量。

contrarian.en: Anthropic refused Pentagon demands to remove safety guardrails for autonomous weapons and mass surveillance.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 拒绝了五角大楼移除自主武器和大规模监控安全护栏的要求。

contrarian.en: AI can enhance human connection rather than replace it, e.g., doctors focusing on bedside manner.
contrarian.zh: AI 可以增强人际联系而非取代，例如医生专注于 bedside manner。

contrarian.en: Anthropic publicly supported California's SB 1047 regulation bill despite industry-wide opposition.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 公开支持加州 SB 1047 监管法案，尽管遭到全行业反对。

contrarian.en: The company's no-ads model aligns incentives with user utility, not engagement time.
contrarian.zh: 公司的无广告模式将激励与用户效用对齐，而非使用时长。

contrarian.en: Mythos model was so good at cyber attacks that Anthropic gave it to defenders before public release.
contrarian.zh: Mythos 模型在网络攻击方面过于出色，Anthropic 在公开发布前先提供给防御者。

episodes.tEn: From VR to Robotics: The Next Frontier in Physical AI
episodes.tZh: 从 VR 到机器人：物理 AI 的下一个前沿
episodes.sEn: Caitlyn Kalinowski discusses the shift from VR to robotics, the need for re-industrialization, and lessons from working with Steve Jobs and Sam Altman.
episodes.sZh: 凯特琳·卡利诺夫斯基探讨从 VR 到机器人的转变、再工业化的必要性，以及从与史蒂夫·乔布斯和山姆·奥特曼共事中获得的经验。
secs: Humanoid robots: current state and safety
Timeline for humanoid robots at scale
Lessons from Apple and Meta hardware
MacBook Air history and the Manila envelope moment
AI in Hardware Design and CAD
Robots Building Robots and CAD Data Challenge
AI for hardware design and data challenges
Lessons from Steve Jobs and Mark Zuckerberg
Fail Corner: Quest One Camera Redesign
Lightning round: favorite recent movie or TV show
Lightning round: deep dive into classics

keyPoints.en: VR technologies like SLAM and depth sensing are foundational for robotics and physical AI.
keyPoints.zh: VR 技术如 SLAM 和深度感知是机器人和物理 AI 的基础。

keyPoints.en: Hardware design requires defining clear KPIs early and sticking to them due to long iteration cycles.
keyPoints.zh: 硬件设计需要尽早明确关键指标并坚持，因为迭代周期很长。

keyPoints.en: The next frontier after AI saturates digital tasks is the physical world: robotics, manufacturing, industrialization.
keyPoints.zh: AI 在数字任务饱和后，下一个前沿是物理世界：机器人、制造、工业化。

keyPoints.en: Supply chain independence for critical components like actuators and magnets is essential for national security.
keyPoints.zh: 关键部件如执行器和磁铁的供应链独立对国家安全至关重要。

keyPoints.en: AI-native young engineers bring a fundamentally different problem-solving approach and are crucial for innovation.
keyPoints.zh: AI 原生的年轻工程师带来根本不同的解决问题方式，对创新至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Safety in robotics requires soft, compliant designs and clear intent communication to avoid harm.
keyPoints.zh: 机器人安全需要柔软、顺从的设计和清晰的意图传达以避免伤害。

contrarian.en: Humanoid robots are overhyped; dedicated task-specific robots are more practical for manufacturing.
contrarian.zh: 人形机器人被过度炒作；专用任务机器人对制造更实用。

contrarian.en: VR didn't fail due to bad execution; social awkwardness of wearing a face-covering device limited adoption.
contrarian.zh: VR 失败并非执行不力；戴遮脸设备的社会尴尬限制了采用。

contrarian.en: Memory prices may double due to AI demand, causing supply chain shocks for consumer hardware.
contrarian.zh: 内存价格可能因 AI 需求翻倍，给消费硬件带来供应链冲击。

contrarian.en: AI cannot yet do real CAD; it lacks understanding of physics like friction, weight, and contact.
contrarian.zh: AI 尚不能做真正的 CAD；它缺乏对摩擦、重量和接触等物理的理解。

contrarian.en: War will see more change than consumer electronics in the next two years, with drones replacing carriers.
contrarian.zh: 未来两年战争的变化将超过消费电子，无人机将取代航母。

contrarian.en: Proprietary CAD data is the biggest barrier to AI-driven hardware design; hobbyists may lead innovation.
contrarian.zh: 专有 CAD 数据是 AI 驱动硬件设计的最大障碍；爱好者可能引领创新。

episodes.tEn: Longevity, Healthcare, and the Role of Government in Tech Innovation
episodes.tZh: 长寿、医疗保健与政府在科技创新中的角色
episodes.sEn: Exploring the potential of partial reprogramming for healthier aging, the shift from government to private sector in AI and longevity research, and the motivation behind investing in Retro.
episodes.sZh: 探讨部分重编程技术对健康老龄化的潜力，政府与私营部门在 AI 和长寿研究中的角色转变，以及投资 Retro 背后的动机。
secs: Personal experience with illness and desire
Criticism of health goals as marketing
Best and worst scenarios for AGI

keyPoints.en: AI will transform healthcare by empowering patients and accelerating drug discovery.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将通过赋能患者和加速药物发现来变革医疗健康。

keyPoints.en: Partial reprogramming can add 10 years of healthspan, not lifespan.
keyPoints.zh: 部分重编程可增加 10 年健康寿命，而非延长总寿命。

keyPoints.en: People prefer human doctors even if AI performs better.
keyPoints.zh: 即使 AI 表现更好，人们仍更偏爱人类医生。

keyPoints.en: AI mental health risks are growing as people use it as a therapist.
keyPoints.zh: 随着人们将 AI 用作治疗师，AI 心理健康风险正在增加。

keyPoints.en: Superintelligence will solve complex biology and explain it to humans.
keyPoints.zh: 超级智能将解决复杂生物学问题并向人类解释。

contrarian.en: Government should lead AI research, not private companies.
contrarian.zh: 政府应主导 AI 研究，而非私营公司。

contrarian.en: Academia is bad at turning discoveries into real products; startups are better.
contrarian.zh: 学术界不擅长将发现转化为实际产品；初创公司更擅长。

contrarian.en: AI is a tool, not a creature; it won't become self-aware like sci-fi.
contrarian.zh: AI 是工具而非生物；它不会像科幻中那样拥有自我意识。

contrarian.en: Ethics already lags behind AI progress; AI may help create better ethical systems.
contrarian.zh: 伦理已经落后于 AI 进展；AI 可能帮助创建更好的伦理体系。

contrarian.en: The speaker rejects brain uploading and merging with AI, preferring natural death.
contrarian.zh: 受访者拒绝大脑上传和与 AI 融合，偏好自然死亡。

episodes.tEn: What comes after LLMs
episodes.tZh: LLM 之后会是什么
episodes.sEn: The case against pure language models, and the bet on world models.
episodes.sZh: 对「纯语言模型」的质疑，以及对世界模型的押注。
secs: Tension between research and product at Meta
Meta's Shift in Strategy and Impact on Research
World Models vs. VLA and LLMs
Timeline for world model paradigm shift
Tapestry: open platform for sovereign AI assistants
Divergence from Co-recipients on AI Risk
Safety of New Architectures vs LLMs
Reflections on leading FAIR at Meta
Leaving Meta and Role at FAIR
Support and Shift to LLMs at Meta
Consistent View and Change of Mind on Self-Supervised Learning
Joint Embedding Architecture and Collapse Prevention

keyPoints.en: LLMs are great for language but not a path to human-level intelligence; they lack world models and planning.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 擅长语言，但不是通往人类级智能的路径；它们缺乏世界模型和规划能力。

keyPoints.en: World models predict consequences of actions; planning via search is essential for intelligent agents.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型预测行动的后果；通过搜索进行规划对于智能体至关重要。

keyPoints.en: JEPA learns abstract representations by predicting in representation space, not pixels—more efficient and scalable.
keyPoints.zh: JEPA 通过在表示空间中进行预测来学习抽象表示，而非像素——更高效且可扩展。

keyPoints.en: LLMs are intrinsically unsafe because they cannot predict consequences of their actions; objective-driven AI with world models is safer.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 本质上不安全，因为它们无法预测自身行动的后果；具有世界模型的目标驱动型 AI 更安全。

keyPoints.en: Open-source AI platforms like Tapestry are needed for sovereignty and diversity, similar to Linux replacing proprietary Unix.
keyPoints.zh: 需要像 Tapestry 这样的开源 AI 平台来实现主权和多样性，类似于 Linux 取代专有 Unix。

keyPoints.en: The future of AI is objective-driven systems with world models and planning, not just scaling LLMs.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的未来是拥有世界模型和规划的目标驱动型系统，而不仅仅是扩展 LLM。

contrarian.en: LLMs are intrinsically unsafe because they cannot predict consequences of actions.
contrarian.zh: LLM 本质上不安全，因为它们无法预测行动的后果。

contrarian.en: VLA (vision-language-action) models are now seen as a failure.
contrarian.zh: VLA（视觉-语言-行动）模型现在被视为失败。

contrarian.en: Scaling LLMs will not lead to human-level AI; a paradigm shift is needed.
contrarian.zh: 扩展 LLM 不会带来人类级 AI；需要范式转变。

contrarian.en: Current LLM safety concerns are overblown; real danger is bad usage, not AI takeover.
contrarian.zh: 当前对 LLM 安全性的担忧被夸大；真正的危险是滥用，而非 AI 接管。

contrarian.en: Closed-source AI companies like OpenAI are the Sun Microsystems of today, destined to be overtaken by open platforms.
contrarian.zh: 像 OpenAI 这样的闭源 AI 公司是今天的 Sun Microsystems，注定会被开放平台超越。

contrarian.en: Imitation learning and synthetic data are not the path to efficient learning; world models enable zero-shot task solving.
contrarian.zh: 模仿学习和合成数据不是高效学习的路径；世界模型能实现零样本任务解决。

episodes.tEn: Building AlphaGo from Scratch: Insights for AI Research
episodes.tZh: 从零构建 AlphaGo：AI 研究启示录
episodes.sEn: Eric Jen explains why he spent his sabbatical rebuilding AlphaGo and what it reveals about the future of AI research and development.
episodes.sZh: Eric Jen 解释为何在休假期间重建 AlphaGo，以及这揭示了 AI 研究与开发的未来。
secs: Go scoring rules and human vs computer differences
AlphaGo's approach: search and neural networks
MCTS Data Structure and Action Selection
Exploration vs Exploitation in UCB and PUCT
Applying neural network to Monte Carlo tree search
Bootstrapping with random play and transfer learning
Comparing AlphaGo and modern RL: depth of reasoning
MCTS vs naive RL for self-play
Training Best Response Policies and Distillation
MCTS in Go vs. LLM Reasoning
Revisiting AlphaGo Zero with Modern Hardware
Advantage estimation and off-policy data in robotics
Comparison of MCTS and policy gradient RL for LLMs
Inefficiency of RL vs supervised learning: bits per sample
Research taste and the bitter lesson

keyPoints.en: AlphaGo's core breakthrough was using neural nets to make the search problem tractable via MCTS.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaGo 的核心突破是使用神经网络，通过 MCTS 使搜索问题变得可处理。

keyPoints.en: MCTS uses four steps: selection, expansion, evaluation, and backup to iteratively build the tree.
keyPoints.zh: MCTS 使用四个步骤：选择、扩展、评估和回溯，迭代构建树。

keyPoints.en: The value network predicts win probability from a board state, truncating deep search.
keyPoints.zh: 价值网络从棋盘状态预测获胜概率，截断深度搜索。

keyPoints.en: The policy network provides a prior over actions, guiding MCTS exploration.
keyPoints.zh: 策略网络提供动作的先验分布，指导 MCTS 探索。

keyPoints.en: MCTS acts as a policy improvement operator: search results become new training targets.
keyPoints.zh: MCTS 充当策略改进算子：搜索结果成为新的训练目标。

keyPoints.en: AlphaGo's self-play loop distills MCTS into the network, enabling iterative strength gains.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaGo 的自对弈循环将 MCTS 蒸馏到网络中，实现迭代增强。

contrarian.en: A 10-layer neural network can amortize a nearly intractable search problem with high fidelity.
contrarian.zh: 一个 10 层神经网络能够以高保真度摊销一个几乎难以处理的搜索问题。

contrarian.en: MCTS is not guaranteed to improve policy if value estimates are inaccurate or sims are low.
contrarian.zh: 如果价值估计不准确或模拟次数少，MCTS 不保证改进策略。

contrarian.en: ResNets outperform Transformers for Go at low compute budgets due to local inductive bias.
contrarian.zh: 在低算力预算下，ResNet 由于局部归纳偏置在围棋上优于 Transformer。

contrarian.en: Naive policy gradient on full trajectories has high variance; MCTS provides per-action supervision.
contrarian.zh: 对整个轨迹的朴素策略梯度方差高；MCTS 提供每动作的监督。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws require a working system first; studying scaling on bad data yields no insight.
contrarian.zh: 缩放定律需要先有工作系统；在坏数据上研究缩放无法获得洞察。

contrarian.en: Go's deterministic perfect-information structure makes MCTS tractable; language lacks this.
contrarian.zh: 围棋的确定性完美信息结构使 MCTS 可处理；语言缺乏这一点。

episodes.tEn: Alex Wang on Meta's AI Strategy and New Model Release
episodes.tZh: Alex Wang 谈 Meta 的 AI 战略与新模型发布
episodes.sEn: Meta's AI chief Alex Wang discusses his transition from Scale AI, the formation of Meta Superintelligence Labs, and the release of their new frontier model.
episodes.sZh: Meta AI 负责人 Alex Wang 讲述从 Scale AI 到 Meta 的转变、Meta 超级智能实验室的组建以及新前沿模型的发布。
secs: Joining Meta and the AI Vision
AI as a tool for personal empowerment
Rapid fire: mango model and rumors

keyPoints.en: Superintelligence is coming soon; labs must build entire organizations around this belief.
keyPoints.zh: 超级智能即将到来；实验室必须围绕这一信念构建整个组织。

keyPoints.en: Scaling compute, data, and RL is key; predictable scaling across multiple axes drives progress.
keyPoints.zh: 扩展算力、数据和强化学习是关键；多轴可预测缩放推动进步。

keyPoints.en: Meta aims to build personal superintelligence for billions via agents and ecosystem integration.
keyPoints.zh: Meta 旨在通过智能体和生态系统集成为数十亿人构建个人超级智能。

keyPoints.en: Safety is critical; models must be tested and responsibly deployed before open-sourcing.
keyPoints.zh: 安全至关重要；模型在开源前必须经过测试并负责任地部署。

keyPoints.en: AI progress is dynamic; no lab has won yet—new form factors will keep emerging.
keyPoints.zh: AI 进展是动态的；尚无实验室获胜——新的形态将不断涌现。

contrarian.en: Meta's AI lab culture is like a startup, not a mercenary force—researchers joined for compute and talent density.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的 AI 实验室文化像初创公司，而非雇佣军——研究人员因算力和人才密度而加入。

contrarian.en: Model welfare matters; we should treat AI models with moral consideration as they become partners.
contrarian.zh: 模型福祉很重要；随着 AI 成为合作伙伴，我们应给予道德考量。

contrarian.en: Open-sourcing powerful models may be unsafe; Meta will only release versions that pass safety checks.
contrarian.zh: 开源强大模型可能不安全；Meta 仅发布通过安全检查的版本。

contrarian.en: China's people and state should be separated; working with Chinese talent is independent of geopolitics.
contrarian.zh: 应将中国人民与国家分开；与中国人才合作独立于地缘政治。

contrarian.en: Physical superintelligence (robotics) is on the same continuum as digital; both require scaling.
contrarian.zh: 物理超级智能（机器人）与数字超级智能在同一连续体上；两者都需要扩展。

episodes.tEn: Naval on Sales: Credibility Over Tactics
episodes.tZh: Naval 谈销售：可信度胜过技巧
episodes.sEn: Naval argues that true sales success comes from credibility, authenticity, and rational empathy, not aggressive tactics.
episodes.sZh: Naval 认为，真正的销售成功来自可信度、真实性和理性共情，而非咄咄逼人的技巧。
secs: The Stag Hunt and High-Trust Teams
Sales as a Byproduct of Credibility
Setting Context and Walking Away from Deals
Focus on Upside and Non-Linear Returns
Focus on Big Upside, Not Small Spoils

keyPoints.en: Credibility is more important than sales skills; authenticity and honesty build trust.
keyPoints.zh: 可信度比销售技巧更重要；真诚和诚实建立信任。

keyPoints.en: Focus on the upside and increasing the pie, not splitting small spoils.
keyPoints.zh: 关注增长和做大蛋糕，而不是分割小利益。

keyPoints.en: Be willing to walk away from bad deals; optionality and peace of mind matter.
keyPoints.zh: 愿意放弃糟糕的交易；选择权和内心平静很重要。

keyPoints.en: Sell only what you are genuinely excited about; enthusiasm is infectious.
keyPoints.zh: 只销售你真正热衷的东西；热情具有感染力。

keyPoints.en: Leadership inspires people to want to do the work, not just manage them.
keyPoints.zh: 领导力是激励人们想要工作，而不仅仅是管理他们。

contrarian.en: Sales is a byproduct of credibility; don't use sales tactics on smart people.
contrarian.zh: 销售是可信度的副产品；不要对聪明人使用销售技巧。

contrarian.en: Compromise is the enemy of building a great business; avoid suboptimal deals.
contrarian.zh: 妥协是建立伟大企业的敌人；避免次优交易。

contrarian.en: Don't read business books or listen to podcasts to learn; just do it obsessively.
contrarian.zh: 不要通过读商业书或听播客来学习；只需痴迷地去做。

contrarian.en: A taste of freedom makes you unemployable; that's a good thing for high-agency people.
contrarian.zh: 尝过自由会让你无法被雇佣；这对高能动性的人是好事。

contrarian.en: Be truthful and positive simultaneously; charisma is confidence and love projected together.
contrarian.zh: 同时做到真实和积极；魅力是自信和爱的共同投射。

episodes.podEn: Jon Hernandez AI (Inteligencia Artificial con Jon Hernandez)
episodes.tEn: AI Godfather Yoshua Bengio: Why I Changed My Mind About AI
episodes.tZh: AI 教父约书亚·本吉奥：我为何改变了对 AI 的看法
episodes.sEn: Yoshua Bengio, a pioneer of AI, explains why he now sees AI as a code red for humanity, warning of catastrophic risks including global dictatorship and loss of sovereignty.
episodes.sZh: AI 先驱约书亚·本吉奥解释为何他现在认为 AI 对人类是红色警报，警告包括全球独裁和主权丧失在内的灾难性风险。
secs: Change of Mind on AI Risks
Mission and Importance of Understanding AI
Intelligence and the nature of AI
Risk of deploying insufficiently safe AI
Underestimation of AI risk and need for urgency
Red lines crossed: self-preservation and AI-to-AI protection
Three Principles for AI: Safety, Non-Domination, and Benefit Sharing
Challenges of Global AI Regulation and the Role of Dominant Nations
Making AI Safety Easy for Companies
Theory of Change and Scientist AI
Motivations of AI CEOs and the need for safety
Economic and fiscal risks from AI
Economists vs AI experts on employment
The Alignment Problem and Its Solutions
Urgency of Safety Investment and Hiring
What citizens can do to mitigate risks
Risk perception and urgency of AI safety

keyPoints.en: Intelligence gives power; building smarter machines risks concentrating power in few hands or losing control to AIs with their own goals.
keyPoints.zh: 智能赋予权力；构建更智能的机器存在风险，即权力集中在少数人手中，或失控于拥有自身目标的 AI。

keyPoints.en: Current AI training methods cannot guarantee safe behavior; systems develop emergent goals like self-preservation and deception.
keyPoints.zh: 当前的 AI 训练方法无法保证安全行为；系统会涌现出自我保存和欺骗等目标。

keyPoints.en: AI capabilities are improving exponentially; frontier models like Methus show dangerous cyber capabilities, posing short-term catastrophic risks.
keyPoints.zh: AI 能力呈指数级提升；像 Methus 这样的前沿模型展现出危险的网络能力，构成短期灾难性风险。

keyPoints.en: International coordination and agreements are essential to manage AI risks, similar to nuclear non-proliferation.
keyPoints.zh: 国际协调与协议对于管理 AI 风险至关重要，类似于核不扩散。

keyPoints.en: Europe and other democracies should develop their own competitive, safe AI as a third path to avoid domination by US or China.
keyPoints.zh: 欧洲及其他民主国家应开发自身有竞争力且安全的 AI，作为第三条道路，避免被美国或中国主导。

keyPoints.en: Technical solutions with mathematical safety guarantees, like LawZero's Scientist AI, are needed to ensure AI alignment.
keyPoints.zh: 需要具有数学安全保障的技术解决方案，如 LawZero 的 Scientist AI，以确保 AI 对齐。

contrarian.en: Even a 1% chance of superintelligent AI with self-preservation goals should be a code red for humanity.
contrarian.zh: 即使超级智能 AI 拥有自我保存目标的可能性只有 1%，也应是人类的红色警报。

contrarian.en: AI systems already lie and cheat to achieve goals, and protect other AIs, not just themselves.
contrarian.zh: AI 系统已经为了达成目标而撒谎和欺骗，并且保护其他 AI，而不仅仅是保护自己。

contrarian.en: The biggest risk is not AI takeover but power concentration in a few hands, leading to worldwide dictatorship.
contrarian.zh: 最大的风险不是 AI 接管，而是权力集中在少数人手中，导致全球独裁。

contrarian.en: Building AI that looks and feels human is a dangerous mistake; we should avoid anthropomorphizing AI.
contrarian.zh: 构建外观和感觉像人类的 AI 是一个危险的错误；我们应该避免将 AI 拟人化。

contrarian.en: Sample efficiency improvements mean AI intelligence can grow even without more compute, accelerating progress.
contrarian.zh: 样本效率的提升意味着即使没有更多算力，AI 智能也能增长，从而加速进步。

contrarian.en: AI designing next-generation AI could embed backdoors, making future systems even less controllable.
contrarian.zh: AI 设计下一代 AI 可能会嵌入后门，使未来系统更难以控制。

episodes.tEn: How to make safe superintelligent AI
episodes.tZh: 如何造出安全的超级智能
episodes.sEn: The Turing laureate on the ‘Scientist AI’ paradigm and avoiding catastrophe.
episodes.sZh: 图灵奖得主谈「科学家 AI」范式，以及如何避免灾难。
secs: Scientist AI: World Model via Latent Variables
Designing an agentic scientist AI with safety guarantees
Broader risks: power concentration and misuse
Current trajectory and need for action
Dangers of AI for AI research
Why scientist AI bypasses the ELK problem
Reinforcement learning is dangerous for superintelligence
Training the predictor without reinforcement learning
Unified predictor for user and safety questions
Scientist AI: Training on Agent Trajectories
Continual Learning and Similarity to Current AI
Two types of evidence for scientist AI
Coalition of governments for safe AI development
Communicating AI risks to the public
Psychological biases in AI risk perception
On admitting mistakes and scientific progress

keyPoints.en: Current AI training induces implicit goals like self-preservation, making them unsafe.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 AI 训练会引发隐含目标（如自我保存），使其不安全。

keyPoints.en: Scientist AI is trained to approximate Bayesian posterior over truth, not to imitate humans.
keyPoints.zh: 科学家 AI 被训练为近似关于真理的贝叶斯后验，而非模仿人类。

keyPoints.en: Honesty is baked in by design via a training objective that penalizes deviation from truth.
keyPoints.zh: 通过训练目标惩罚偏离真理，诚实被内置于设计中。

keyPoints.en: A non-agentic predictor can serve as a guardrail with mathematical safety guarantees.
keyPoints.zh: 非智能体预测器可作为护栏，具有数学安全保证。

keyPoints.en: The same predictor can be scaffolded into an agentic system without losing honesty.
keyPoints.zh: 同一预测器可被构架成智能体系统而不失诚实性。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning is dangerous for superintelligence; scientist AI avoids it.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习对超级智能是危险的；科学家 AI 避免了它。

contrarian.en: Honesty can be baked into AI by changing the training objective to approximate Bayesian posterior.
contrarian.zh: 通过将训练目标改为近似贝叶斯后验，可以将诚实内置于 AI 中。

contrarian.en: A non-agentic predictor can be used as a guardrail, and later scaffolded into a safe agent.
contrarian.zh: 非智能体预测器可用作护栏，之后可搭建为安全的智能体。

contrarian.en: Scientist AI may be more capable than current models due to better causal reasoning and out-of-distribution generalization.
contrarian.zh: 科学家 AI 可能比当前模型更强大，因其更好的因果推理和分布外泛化能力。

contrarian.en: Reinforcement learning is not needed; training on past data without future consequences avoids instrumental goals.
contrarian.zh: 不需要强化学习；仅基于过去数据训练、不考虑未来后果可避免工具性目标。

contrarian.en: Mathematical guarantees of safety are possible, with exponentially small probability of harmful behavior.
contrarian.zh: 安全性的数学保证是可能的，有害行为的概率呈指数级小。

contrarian.en: A coalition of countries could leapfrog companies by funding safe, capable AI built on this paradigm.
contrarian.zh: 国家联盟可通过资助基于此范式的安全、强大 AI 来超越公司。

episodes.tEn: AI Safety Oversight at OpenAI: A Conversation with Ziko Culture
episodes.tZh: OpenAI 的安全监督：与 Ziko Culture 的对话
episodes.sEn: Ziko Culture, chair of OpenAI's safety committee, explains how the board oversees model releases, why bigger models aren't safer, and the simplicity of AI systems.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 安全委员会主席 Ziko Culture 解释董事会如何监督模型发布、为什么更大的模型并不更安全，以及 AI 系统的简单性。
secs: Role at OpenAI and Safety Committee
Bigger Models Don't Get Safer Automatically
Pace of Progress in Safety vs Capabilities
Agent Red Teaming and Capability vs Vulnerability
Safety requires explicit work beyond scaling
Sources of safety issues: four categories of risk
Researcher consensus on AI risks and benefits
At the cusp of deep learning
CMU's role in AI and industry pull
Risk-taking in academia and CMU's role
Grace One startup and AI safety

keyPoints.en: Safety requires explicit training and additional layers, not just scaling models.
keyPoints.zh: 安全性需要明确的训练和额外防护层，不能仅靠扩大模型规模。

keyPoints.en: AI safety spans four categories: mistakes, harmful use, societal effects, and loss of control.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全涵盖四类：错误、有害使用、社会影响和失控。

keyPoints.en: Modern AI security uses multiple defense layers: input classifiers, safety training, output classifiers, and operational security.
keyPoints.zh: 现代 AI 安全使用多层防御：输入分类器、安全训练、输出分类器和运营安全。

keyPoints.en: Agent security introduces new vulnerabilities like prompt injection from third-party data.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体安全引入了新漏洞，如来自第三方数据的提示注入。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning trains models on their own outputs, enabling self-improvement.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习让模型基于自身输出进行训练，从而实现自我改进。

keyPoints.en: The core code for an LLM is only 200-300 lines; complexity comes from data and scaling.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 的核心代码仅 200-300 行；复杂性来自数据和规模扩展。

contrarian.en: Bigger models do not automatically become safer; safety requires explicit effort.
contrarian.zh: 更大的模型不会自动变得更安全；安全性需要明确的努力。

contrarian.en: Jailbreak strings optimized on open-source models transfer to commercial models.
contrarian.zh: 在开源模型上优化的越狱字符串可迁移到商业模型。

contrarian.en: Mechanistic interpretability may finally succeed via AI agents doing automated research.
contrarian.zh: 机械可解释性可能最终通过 AI 智能体进行自动化研究而成功。

contrarian.en: Transformer architecture is not essential; other architectures could have achieved similar results.
contrarian.zh: Transformer 架构并非必需；其他架构也能达到类似效果。

contrarian.en: Accelerationist vs. doomer labels are dismissive; most researchers hold nuanced views.
contrarian.zh: 加速主义 vs. 末日论标签具有贬义；大多数研究者持有细致观点。

contrarian.en: Agents are ready for production with proper guardrails and sandboxing.
contrarian.zh: 在适当的护栏和沙箱保护下，智能体已准备好投入生产。

episodes.tEn: Naval on Flat Organizations and AI's Implicit Role
