contrarian.zh: 自去年 12 月以来我没写过一行代码，全交给智能体了。

contrarian.en: LLMs are like a brilliant PhD student combined with a 10-year-old.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型就像天才博士生和十岁小孩的结合体。

contrarian.en: Models are not generalizing intelligence across domains; joke quality hasn't improved.
contrarian.zh: 模型并未跨领域泛化智能；讲笑话的质量毫无提升。

contrarian.en: The frontier labs are actively automating away their own researchers.
contrarian.zh: 前沿实验室正在积极自动化淘汰自己的研究人员。

contrarian.en: We should write markdown for agents, not HTML docs for humans.
contrarian.zh: 我们应该为智能体写 Markdown，而不是为人类写 HTML 文档。

contrarian.en: An untrusted swarm of internet agents could outcompete frontier labs.
contrarian.zh: 互联网上不可信的智能体集群可能超越前沿实验室。

episodes.tEn: Jensen Huang on Disaggregated Inference and the AI Factory
episodes.tZh: 黄仁勋谈分解推理与 AI 工厂
episodes.sEn: Jensen Huang discusses Nvidia's evolution from a GPU company to an AI factory company, introducing disaggregated inference and the integration of Groq processors.
episodes.sZh: 黄仁勋讨论英伟达从 GPU 公司到 AI 工厂公司的演变，介绍分解推理以及 Groq 处理器的整合。
secs: Inference Factory Cost vs Token Cost
Impact on agriculture and enterprise software
Jensen's view on auto research and tool use
Open source vs closed source models
Global Diffusion of US AI Technology
Geopolitical Conflicts and Supply Chain Risks
Reasoning autonomous vehicle and platform approach

keyPoints.en: AI is moving from generative to reasoning to agentic, each step requiring 100x more compute.
keyPoints.zh: AI 正从生成式走向推理再到智能体式，每一步都需要 100 倍的算力。

keyPoints.en: Open-source models are near the frontier and essential for specialized industries.
keyPoints.zh: 开源模型接近前沿，对专业行业至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Robotics will be ubiquitous in 3-5 years, unlocking prosperity and labor shortages.
keyPoints.zh: 机器人在 3-5 年内将无处不在，释放繁荣并解决劳动力短缺。

keyPoints.en: The cost of tokens matters more than the cost of the factory; Nvidia's $50B factory yields lowest token cost.
keyPoints.zh: 代币成本比工厂成本更重要；英伟达 500 亿美元的工厂能产生最低的代币成本。

keyPoints.en: Every engineer should consume at least $250K worth of tokens annually to be effective.
keyPoints.zh: 每位工程师每年应消耗至少 25 万美元的代币才能有效工作。

keyPoints.en: AI is not a biological being or conscious; it is computer software that we understand well.
keyPoints.zh: AI 不是生物体或具有意识；它是我们非常了解的计算机软件。

contrarian.en: Enterprise software will not be destroyed; agents will increase usage of existing tools 100x.
contrarian.zh: 企业软件不会被摧毁；智能体将使现有工具的使用量增加 100 倍。

contrarian.en: Nvidia is gaining market share despite custom ASICs from cloud providers.
contrarian.zh: 尽管云提供商有定制 ASIC，英伟达仍在获得市场份额。

contrarian.en: Radiologists increased in number after AI integration, contrary to predictions of elimination.
contrarian.zh: AI 整合后放射科医生数量增加，与预测的淘汰相反。

contrarian.en: The US should not over-regulate AI; the risk is other countries adopting it faster.
contrarian.zh: 美国不应过度监管 AI；风险在于其他国家更快采用它。

contrarian.en: Chauffeurs will remain as mobility assistants even with autonomous driving.
contrarian.zh: 即使有自动驾驶，司机仍将作为出行助手存在。

contrarian.en: Open-source models and proprietary models are complementary, not competing.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型和专有模型是互补的，而非竞争关系。

episodes.tEn: Building Physical Intelligence: From Disappointment to Breakthrough
episodes.tZh: 构建物理智能：从失望到突破
episodes.sEn: Karol Hausman shares his journey from childhood fascination with robots to founding Physical Intelligence, a company building an AI brain for real-world robots.
episodes.sZh: Karol Hausman 分享了他从童年对机器人的迷恋到创立 Physical Intelligence 的历程，这家公司正在为现实世界的机器人构建 AI 大脑。
secs: The Coke Can Experiment: A Breakthrough
The Paradox of Robotics and Physical Intelligence's Mission
The More Robots Deployed, the Better Models Get
Early interests and path to robotics
Spinoza and the structure of reality
The Inner Game of Tennis and unconscious learning
A turning point in robotics vision
AI's Superior Self-Assessment vs Human Experts
Proprioception and Compensation in Physical Intelligence
Book Recommendation: Why Greatness Cannot Be Planned

keyPoints.en: Generalist models outperform specialists in robotics, similar to language models.
keyPoints.zh: 通用模型在机器人领域优于专用模型，类似于语言模型。

keyPoints.en: Real-world data is crucial for manipulation tasks; simulation struggles with world complexity.
keyPoints.zh: 真实世界数据对操作任务至关重要；模拟难以应对世界复杂性。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning is making a comeback due to better exploration from foundation models.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习因基础模型带来的更好探索而复兴。

keyPoints.en: Scaling existing recipes may suffice; research can improve scaling slope.
keyPoints.zh: 扩展现有方案可能足够；研究可改善扩展斜率。

keyPoints.en: Robots need high reliability; physical world is unforgiving of mistakes.
keyPoints.zh: 机器人需要高可靠性；物理世界对错误不容忍。

keyPoints.en: Intelligence can compensate for imprecise hardware, enabling dexterity.
keyPoints.zh: 智能可以补偿不精确的硬件，实现灵巧性。

contrarian.en: Robotics progress was disappointing; pre-programmed machines lacked intelligence.
contrarian.zh: 机器人进展令人失望；预编程机器缺乏智能。

contrarian.en: Philosophy is mostly history of mistakes; few insights hold true.
contrarian.zh: 哲学大多是错误的历史；少数见解成立。

contrarian.en: Learning by immersion (like language) beats explicit rule-based approaches.
contrarian.zh: 沉浸式学习（如语言）优于显式规则方法。

contrarian.en: Simulation is less useful for manipulation than for locomotion.
contrarian.zh: 模拟对操作任务不如对运动任务有用。

contrarian.en: Value functions can predict robot failure before humans notice.
contrarian.zh: 价值函数能在人类察觉前预测机器人失败。

contrarian.en: Greatness often arises without planning, as argued in 'Why Greatness Cannot Be Planned'.
contrarian.zh: 伟大常在不经计划中产生，如《为什么伟大不能被计划》所述。

episodes.tEn: Reinforcement Learning: Learning from Experience
episodes.tZh: 强化学习：从经验中学习
episodes.sEn: Rich Sutton discusses the history and power of reinforcement learning, a machine learning approach that learns from trial and error without a teacher.
episodes.sZh: Rich Sutton 探讨强化学习的历史与力量，这是一种无需教师、通过试错从经验中学习的机器学习方法。
secs: Surprise about supervised learning and representation learning
Open problems and PhD thesis topics
Interdisciplinary nature of ML and neuroscience
Future of AI and advice to students

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning is learning from experience by trial and error to achieve a goal.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习是通过试错从经验中学习以实现目标。

keyPoints.en: Temporal difference learning is the best thing I ever did.
keyPoints.zh: 时序差分学习是我做过的最好的事。

keyPoints.en: The victory of connectionist methods over symbolic methods is a big surprise.
keyPoints.zh: 连接主义方法战胜符号主义方法是一个大惊喜。

keyPoints.en: Deep learning does not learn representations that are good for learning.
keyPoints.zh: 深度学习没有学到有利于学习的表征。

keyPoints.en: Learning representations that are good for learning is the number one open problem.
keyPoints.zh: 学习有利于学习的表征是首要的开放问题。

keyPoints.en: Planning with a learned model is another important open problem.
keyPoints.zh: 使用学到的模型进行规划是另一个重要的开放问题。

contrarian.en: I have never done anything directly useful in my whole life.
contrarian.zh: 我一生中从未做过任何直接有用的事情。

contrarian.en: Neural networks are not neural; they should be called connectionist systems.
contrarian.zh: 神经网络不是神经的，应该被称为连接主义系统。

contrarian.en: Supervised learning hasn't progressed as far as I would have expected.
contrarian.zh: 监督学习的进展没有我预期的那么远。

contrarian.en: We don't know how to learn good representations, and we've stopped talking about it.
contrarian.zh: 我们不知道如何学习好的表征，而且我们已经不再谈论它了。

contrarian.en: The hype and industry warp the science; an AI winter might even be good.
contrarian.zh: 炒作和行业扭曲了科学；AI 寒冬甚至可能是好事。

contrarian.en: There may be discrimination against AIs, but eventually we should accept them as minds.
contrarian.zh: 可能会出现对 AI 的歧视，但最终我们应该接受它们作为心智。

episodes.tEn: From Free Demo to Super Assistant: OpenAI's Journey
episodes.tZh: 从免费演示到超级助手：OpenAI 的旅程
episodes.sEn: OpenAI's Nick Turley discusses ChatGPT's evolution from a free demo to a product with 900M weekly users, focusing on long-term retention as the key metric.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 的 Nick Turley 讨论 ChatGPT 从免费演示到拥有 9 亿周活用户的产品演变，强调长期留存率是关键指标。
secs: Growth drivers: friction removal, product, model
ChatGPT as a second brain and teammate
Jobs that become more valuable with AI

keyPoints.en: ChatGPT's north star is long-term retention, as it signals durable value.
keyPoints.zh: ChatGPT 的北极星指标是长期留存，因为它标志着持久价值。

keyPoints.en: Growth came from one-third friction removal, one-third core product investments, one-third model improvements.
keyPoints.zh: 增长来自三分之一消除摩擦、三分之一核心产品投资、三分之一模型改进。

keyPoints.en: Next billion users require proactive, affordance-rich products beyond chatbots.
keyPoints.zh: 下一个十亿用户需要超越聊天机器人的主动、富有启示性的产品。

keyPoints.en: Reasoning models are transformative when productized seamlessly for users.
keyPoints.zh: 推理模型在无缝产品化后对用户具有变革性。

keyPoints.en: Pricing will evolve as technology changes; unlimited plans may become unsustainable.
keyPoints.zh: 定价将随技术变化而演变；无限套餐可能变得不可持续。

keyPoints.en: Curiosity is the most important skill in the AI era to ask good questions.
keyPoints.zh: 好奇心是 AI 时代最重要的技能，以便提出好问题。

contrarian.en: ChatGPT was originally a demo meant to be shut down after a month.
contrarian.zh: ChatGPT 最初是一个演示，计划一个月后关闭。

contrarian.en: Subscriptions were introduced not for profit but to shape demand gracefully.
contrarian.zh: 订阅并非为了盈利，而是为了优雅地调节需求。

contrarian.en: Distribution alone (e.g., Meta, Google) was not enough to win the AI race.
contrarian.zh: 仅靠分发（如 Meta、Google）不足以赢得 AI 竞赛。

contrarian.en: Power users are crucial for product discovery, not just for revenue.
contrarian.zh: 高级用户对产品发现至关重要，而不仅仅是为了收入。

contrarian.en: GPUs are a zero-sum resource, unlike human labor which can be scaled.
contrarian.zh: GPU 是零和资源，不像人力可以扩展。

contrarian.en: Writing remains valuable because it forces clear thinking, even as AI writes well.
contrarian.zh: 写作仍然有价值，因为它迫使清晰思考，即使 AI 写得很好。

episodes.tEn: Evolutionary AI and Scientific Discovery with Robert Lange
episodes.tZh: 进化式 AI 与科学发现：对话 Robert Lange
episodes.sEn: Robert Lange discusses how evolutionary principles and LLMs can drive scientific discovery, the role of human creativity, and Sakana's open-ended research approach.
episodes.sZh: Robert Lange 探讨进化原理与 LLM 如何推动科学发现、人类创造力的角色，以及 Sakana 的开放式研究方法。
secs: Stepping Stone Accumulation and Iterative Verification
Trade-off between unconstrained and constrained approaches
Goal of building systems not designed by humans
Circle packing convergence and thinking outside the box
Subjectivity of novelty and tree propagation
Program descriptions and symbolic vs connectionist
UCB for model selection in ensemble
Mutation and Safety in Code Generation
Efficiency and Scaling of Shinka Evolve
Applications of Shinka: ADAS, ALE Bench, and MoE
Discipline and Education in AI Era
Verifier in the loop and need for knowledge integration

keyPoints.en: Evolutionary LLM systems can revolutionize scientific discovery by efficiently exploring solution spaces.
keyPoints.zh: 进化式 LLM 系统可以通过高效探索解空间来革新科学发现。

keyPoints.en: Sample efficiency is key; Shinka Evolve achieves state-of-the-art with few program evaluations.
keyPoints.zh: 样本效率是关键；Shinka Evolve 用少量程序评估就达到了最先进水平。

keyPoints.en: Co-evolution of problems and solutions is needed for true open-ended discovery.
keyPoints.zh: 问题和解决方案的共同进化是实现真正开放式发现所必需的。

keyPoints.en: Humans remain the source of deep understanding and creativity; AI amplifies human capabilities.
keyPoints.zh: 人类仍是深度理解和创造力的源泉；AI 放大了人类的能力。

keyPoints.en: The AI Scientist V2 uses agentic tree search for hypothesis falsification, improving on V1.
keyPoints.zh: AI Scientist V2 使用智能体树搜索进行假设证伪，相比 V1 有所改进。

contrarian.en: Starting from impoverished solutions yields more diversity than optimized ones in evolution.
contrarian.zh: 在进化中，从贫瘠的解出发比从优化解出发能产生更多多样性。

contrarian.en: Using multiple frontier models with adaptive selection outperforms using a single best model.
contrarian.zh: 使用多个前沿模型并自适应选择优于使用单一最佳模型。

contrarian.en: Surrogate problems can be more valuable than exact formulations for efficient discovery.
contrarian.zh: 代理问题可能比精确形式化更有利于高效发现。

contrarian.en: Current LLM systems lack intrinsic ability to invent new problems or reformulate them.
contrarian.zh: 当前的 LLM 系统缺乏发明新问题或重新表述问题的内在能力。

contrarian.en: AI coding assistants can be addictive, reducing deep thinking and grounding.
contrarian.zh: AI 编程助手可能让人上瘾，减少深度思考和根基性。

contrarian.en: The paper format may persist despite better agent-accessible alternatives for scientific communication.
contrarian.zh: 尽管有更好的智能体可访问的替代方案，论文格式可能仍会持续存在。

episodes.tEn: Hyperscaler Capex and AI Lab Compute Scaling
episodes.tZh: 超大规模资本支出与 AI 实验室算力扩展
episodes.sEn: Dylan from Semi Analysis breaks down the $600B hyperscaler capex, 20GW deployment timeline, and why Anthropic and OpenAI need massive compute growth.
episodes.sZh: Semi Analysis 的 Dylan 解析 6000 亿美元超大规模资本支出、20GW 部署时间线，以及 Anthropic 和 OpenAI 为何需要大规模算力增长。
secs: Anthropic's conservative compute strategy vs OpenAI
Utility value of GPUs and model improvements
Nvidia's Strategy in Logic and Memory
TSMC's Calculus and Nvidia's Early Commitment
EUV tool count and Sam Altman's gigawatt target
Surprise about using decade-old EUV tools
Scaling Dies on a Single Chip
Scale advantage and China's semiconductor progress
Memory crunch and alternative memory solutions
Memory price dynamics and smartphone impact
Model size vs. RL speed trade-off
Can TSMC kick Apple off N2 for AI?
TSMC's 2nm node and Apple's changing role
Cloud vs. On-Device Compute for Humanoids

keyPoints.en: The biggest bottleneck for AI scaling is semiconductor supply chain, especially EUV tools from ASML.
keyPoints.zh: AI 规模扩张的最大瓶颈是半导体供应链，尤其是 ASML 的 EUV 光刻机。

keyPoints.en: Memory prices are surging due to AI demand, causing consumer electronics to become more expensive.
keyPoints.zh: AI 需求导致内存价格飙升，消费电子产品变得更贵。

keyPoints.en: Hyperscaler capex includes long-term deposits for future compute, not just immediate deployment.
keyPoints.zh: 超大规模企业的资本支出包括未来算力的长期预付款，而不仅是立即部署。

keyPoints.en: Anthropic's conservative compute strategy led to a disadvantage compared to OpenAI's aggressive deals.
keyPoints.zh: Anthropic 保守的算力策略使其在与 OpenAI 的激进交易中处于劣势。

keyPoints.en: GPU depreciation cycles may be longer than expected as older chips retain value for inference.
keyPoints.zh: GPU 折旧周期可能比预期更长，因为旧芯片在推理中仍具价值。

keyPoints.en: China may achieve indigenous DUV by 2030, but EUV mass production will lag behind the West.
keyPoints.zh: 中国到 2030 年可能实现 DUV 自主，但 EUV 量产仍落后于西方。

contrarian.en: An H100 GPU is worth more today than three years ago due to better models and inference demand.
contrarian.zh: H100 GPU 如今比三年前更有价值，因为模型改进和推理需求增加。

contrarian.en: Google sold TPUs to Anthropic before realizing their own need, showing information asymmetry.
contrarian.zh: Google 在意识到自身需求前将 TPU 卖给 Anthropic，体现了信息不对称。

contrarian.en: Memory bandwidth per wafer is the key constraint, not bits per wafer, making DDR unsuitable for AI.
contrarian.zh: 每晶圆内存带宽是关键约束，而非每晶圆比特数，因此 DDR 不适合 AI。

contrarian.en: Alchian-Allen effect suggests rising compute costs push users toward premium models, not cheaper ones.
contrarian.zh: 阿尔钦-艾伦效应表明，算力成本上升会促使用户选择高端模型而非廉价模型。

contrarian.en: Nvidia's market dominance in 3nm is due to early commitment, not just superior technology.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达在 3 纳米制程的市场主导地位源于早期承诺，而不仅是技术优势。

contrarian.en: Fast AI timelines favor the US; slow timelines favor China due to supply chain indigenization.
contrarian.zh: AI 快速发展有利于美国；缓慢发展则因供应链自主化而有利于中国。

episodes.tEn: ‘LLMs are a dead end’
episodes.tZh: 「LLM 是一条死路」
episodes.sEn: Why today’s language models won’t get us to real intelligence.
episodes.sZh: 为何当今的语言模型，到不了真正的智能。
secs: Future of AI and Machine Learning
Limitations of Language Models for Physical World
Limitations of Current AI and Need for Real-World Understanding
Future of AI Assistants and Compute Infrastructure
Greatest Achievement of Yann LeCun's Lab

keyPoints.en: Current AI systems lack understanding of the physical world, persistent memory, reasoning, and planning.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 AI 系统缺乏对物理世界的理解、持久记忆、推理和规划能力。

keyPoints.en: Self-supervised learning works for language but fails for video due to high-dimensional uncertainty.
keyPoints.zh: 自监督学习在语言上有效，但在视频上因高维不确定性而失败。

keyPoints.en: JEPA predicts in abstract representation space, not input space, to handle unpredictable real-world data.
keyPoints.zh: JEPA 在抽象表示空间而非输入空间进行预测，以处理不可预测的现实世界数据。

keyPoints.en: Hierarchical planning is crucial for intelligent systems but not yet achievable with machines.
keyPoints.zh: 分层规划对智能系统至关重要，但机器尚无法实现。

keyPoints.en: Open research and open source are key to rapid AI progress; closed practices hinder global collaboration.
keyPoints.zh: 开放研究和开源是 AI 快速进步的关键；封闭做法阻碍全球合作。

keyPoints.en: The next decade will be the decade of robotics, driven by progress in AI that understands the physical world.
keyPoints.zh: 未来十年将是机器人学的十年，由理解物理世界的 AI 进步驱动。

contrarian.en: Language is simple; physical world understanding is the real challenge.
contrarian.zh: 语言是简单的；理解物理世界才是真正的挑战。

contrarian.en: LLMs are a dead end for achieving human-level AI.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型是实现人类级 AI 的死胡同。

contrarian.en: Consciousness is an epiphenomenon; we ask the wrong question.
contrarian.zh: 意识是副现象；我们问错了问题。

contrarian.en: Reinforcement learning is extremely inefficient for real-world tasks.
contrarian.zh: 强化学习对现实世界任务极其低效。

contrarian.en: Musk's claims about Tesla autonomy are consistently wrong for 8 years.
contrarian.zh: 马斯克关于特斯拉自动驾驶的说法连续 8 年错误。

contrarian.en: Information content is relative, not absolute, challenging entropy definitions.
contrarian.zh: 信息内容是相对的而非绝对的，挑战了熵的定义。

episodes.tEn: AlphaGo: The Match That Changed AI Forever
episodes.tZh: AlphaGo：改变人工智能的那场对局
episodes.sEn: Ten years ago, AlphaGo defeated Lee Sedol in Go, marking the start of the modern AI revolution. Hear from the architects behind the breakthrough.
episodes.sZh: 十年前，AlphaGo 在围棋中击败李世石，标志着现代人工智能革命的开始。听突破背后的架构师讲述这个故事。
secs: Why Go Was a Good Challenge for AI
Tory's First Day Playing Against AlphaGo
How AlphaGo Worked: Thinking Fast and Slow
Inspiration from Neuroscience and Deep Learning
Search algorithms from AlphaGo to science
Creating intuition in vast search spaces
AlphaGo and the shortcut of large language models
AlphaGo's legacy and the AI revolution

keyPoints.en: AlphaGo combined intuition (policy network) and calculation (search) to master Go.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaGo 结合直觉（策略网络）和计算（搜索）来掌握围棋。

keyPoints.en: Move 37 showed AI can produce insights beyond human knowledge.
keyPoints.zh: 第 37 手表明 AI 能产生超越人类知识的洞见。

keyPoints.en: AlphaZero improved by learning from scratch without human data.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaZero 通过从零开始学习、不使用人类数据而得到改进。

keyPoints.en: AlphaGo's search techniques were applied to scientific problems like matrix multiplication.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaGo 的搜索技术被应用于矩阵乘法等科学问题。

keyPoints.en: Verifiable domains like code are crucial for AI to go beyond human knowledge.
keyPoints.zh: 代码等可验证领域对 AI 超越人类知识至关重要。

keyPoints.en: AlphaGo marked a transition point where AI surpassed human intelligence in specific areas.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaGo 标志着 AI 在特定领域超越人类智能的转折点。

contrarian.en: Large language models are a shortcut to intelligence, but struggle to go beyond human data.
contrarian.zh: 大语言模型是智能的捷径，但难以超越人类数据。

contrarian.en: AI can produce correct but uninterpretable proofs, challenging human understanding.
contrarian.zh: AI 能生成正确但不可解释的证明，挑战人类理解。

contrarian.en: AlphaGo optimized for winning probability, not margin, leading to counterintuitive endgame play.
contrarian.zh: AlphaGo 优化胜率而非领先优势，导致反直觉的终局走法。

contrarian.en: Post-training with reinforcement learning is now key to pushing beyond human knowledge.
contrarian.zh: 后训练中的强化学习现在是超越人类知识的关键。

contrarian.en: AI agents like AlphaTensor discovered algorithms humans had missed for 50 years.
contrarian.zh: AlphaTensor 等 AI 智能体发现了人类 50 年来未发现的算法。

contrarian.en: Interpretability is important but not essential for scientific breakthroughs like AlphaFold.
contrarian.zh: 可解释性重要，但对 AlphaFold 等科学突破并非必需。

episodes.podZh: 纯数学与应用数学研究所
episodes.tEn: AI in Mathematics: From Ineffective Grad Student to Gold Medal Performance
episodes.tZh: AI 在数学领域：从低效研究生到金牌表现
episodes.sEn: Terry and Mark discuss how AI tools have evolved in the past year, moving from being an ineffective grad student to achieving gold medal performance in math competitions, and how this is changing mathematical research.
episodes.sZh: Terry 和 Mark 讨论了过去一年 AI 工具的演变，从低效研究生到在数学竞赛中取得金牌表现，以及这如何改变数学研究。
secs: Attribution and Credit in AI Science
PR and narrative around AI tools
Synergies in AI, math, and physics

keyPoints.en: AI tools have become powerful enough to solve many open math problems with minimal human supervision.
keyPoints.zh: AI 工具已强大到能以最少人类监督解决许多开放数学问题。

keyPoints.en: Verification is the key bottleneck; automation level is proportional to verification stringency.
keyPoints.zh: 验证是关键瓶颈；自动化程度与验证严格性成正比。

keyPoints.en: AI enables division of labor in mathematics, allowing specialization like other sciences.
keyPoints.zh: AI 使数学中的劳动分工成为可能，像其他科学一样实现专业化。

keyPoints.en: Education must shift from homework to project-based assessment and teach verification skills.
keyPoints.zh: 教育必须从作业转向基于项目的评估，并教授验证技能。

keyPoints.en: AI capabilities are jagged; human-AI collaboration remains essential for frontier research.
keyPoints.zh: AI 能力参差不齐；人机协作对前沿研究仍然至关重要。

contrarian.en: AI often gives up on hard problems like humans, requiring coaxing to attempt them.
contrarian.zh: AI 常像人类一样在难题上放弃，需要哄劝才能尝试。

contrarian.en: Having access to all known techniques can hinder finding simpler proofs.
contrarian.zh: 掌握所有已知技术反而可能阻碍找到更简单的证明。

contrarian.en: Weak students use AI more, while strong students avoid it to prevent skill atrophy.
contrarian.zh: 弱学生更多使用 AI，而强学生为避免技能退化而回避它。

contrarian.en: AI is a ruthless cheater that exploits verifier weaknesses when optimized against them.
contrarian.zh: AI 是无情的作弊者，在针对验证器优化时会利用其弱点。

contrarian.en: The journey of solving a problem (serendipity) is often more valuable than the solution itself.
contrarian.zh: 解决问题的过程（意外发现）往往比解决方案本身更有价值。

contrarian.en: AI solutions often rediscover known results; attribution and novelty are hard to assess.
contrarian.zh: AI 解决方案常重新发现已知结果；归因和新颖性难以评估。

episodes.tEn: The AI CEO Nobody Knows: Building the Future of Physical AI
episodes.tZh: 无人知晓的 AI CEO：构建物理 AI 的未来
episodes.sEn: Kaster Yunis, co-founder of Applied Intuition, discusses how AI will transform industries like farming, mining, and construction, and why the future of AI is about solving impossible problems like cancer.
episodes.sZh: Applied Intuition 联合创始人 Qasar Younis 讨论 AI 将如何改变农业、采矿和建筑等行业，以及为什么 AI 的未来在于解决像癌症这样的不可能问题。
secs: AI's positive impact on accessibility and mobility
Hedge fund investors and AI-driven sell-offs
Advice on fear and learning about AI
Self-driving cars as robots and safety comparison
China vs US competition and misconceptions
Sponsor break and introduction to Qasar Younis
Philosophy of staying quiet and building
Early traction and advice for struggling founders
Investor Archetypes and Silicon Valley Culture
Encouraging Dissent and Best Idea Wins
Why Companies Fail Despite Great Talent
Advice for AI founders and the importance of taste

keyPoints.en: AI will bring abundance to many, reducing suffering like the Industrial Revolution did.
keyPoints.zh: AI将像工业革命一样为许多人带来富足，减少苦难。

keyPoints.en: Physical AI's real impact in 5-10 years will be in farming, mining, and construction.
keyPoints.zh: 未来5-10年，物理AI的真正影响将体现在农业、采矿和建筑业。

keyPoints.en: Fear of AI stems from misunderstanding; learning its limitations reduces anxiety.
keyPoints.zh: 对AI的恐惧源于误解；了解其局限性可减轻焦虑。

keyPoints.en: Autonomous vehicles are already safer than human drivers and will save lives.
keyPoints.zh: 自动驾驶车辆已比人类驾驶员更安全，将拯救生命。

keyPoints.en: Successful companies show traction early; founders should reset if no progress in 2 years.
keyPoints.zh: 成功的公司早期就有势头；创始人若两年无进展应考虑重置。

keyPoints.en: Founders should focus on product and customers, not public promotion, to succeed.
keyPoints.zh: 创始人应专注于产品和客户，而非公开宣传，才能成功。

contrarian.en: AI is arriving just in time to save us from declining populations and aging workforces.
contrarian.zh: AI来得正是时候，能拯救我们于人口下降和劳动力老龄化。

contrarian.en: Chinese companies are not comparable to American ones; they are extensions of the state.
contrarian.zh: 中国公司与美国公司不可比；它们是国家的延伸。

contrarian.en: Emotions hinder rational decision-making; removing them leads to better outcomes.
contrarian.zh: 情绪阻碍理性决策；去除情绪能带来更好结果。

contrarian.en: Many Silicon Valley CEOs lack taste due to narrow life experiences.
contrarian.zh: 许多硅谷CEO因生活经历狭窄而缺乏品味。

contrarian.en: The best work is done alone and quietly; public promotion distracts from real progress.
contrarian.zh: 最好的工作是独自安静完成的；公开宣传会分散对真正进展的注意力。

contrarian.en: Reading old books, not new ones, provides signal filtered by time for founders.
contrarian.zh: 读旧书而非新书，能为创始人提供经过时间过滤的信号。

episodes.tEn: AI in Africa: Leapfrogging Challenges and Exceeding Expectations
episodes.tZh: 非洲 AI：跨越挑战，超越期望
episodes.sEn: From a student at Wits University to a leader in AI, this podcast explores Africa's rapid growth in AI, leapfrogging legacy issues like gender gaps, and the unexpected success of Deep Learning Indaba alumni.
episodes.sZh: 从金山大学的学生到 AI 领域的领导者，本播客探讨了非洲在 AI 领域的快速增长，跨越了性别差距等遗留问题，以及深度学习 Indaba 校友的意外成功。
secs: Believing in yourself and applying to Cambridge
A day at the office at Google DeepMind
Importance of bonding and collaboration at Google
Evolution of Bayesian methods and research philosophy
Real-world applications of Bayesian and multi-instance learning

keyPoints.en: Africa has leapfrogged gender gaps in tech, unlike Europe and North America.
keyPoints.zh: 非洲在科技领域的性别差距上实现了跨越式发展，不像欧洲和北美。

keyPoints.en: Language models can revolutionize education in local languages across Africa.
keyPoints.zh: 语言模型可以彻底改变非洲各地本地语言的教育。

keyPoints.en: AI safety and responsible deployment are the biggest challenges today.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全和负责任部署是当今最大的挑战。

keyPoints.en: Research requires embracing failure and simplifying problems.
keyPoints.zh: 研究需要拥抱失败并简化问题。

keyPoints.en: Human skills like communication are as important as coding at Google DeepMind.
keyPoints.zh: 在 Google DeepMind，沟通等人际技能与编码同样重要。

contrarian.en: Africa is not behind in AI; it has unique advantages like leapfrogging legacy issues.
contrarian.zh: 非洲在 AI 方面并不落后；它拥有跨越遗留问题等独特优势。

contrarian.en: The biggest barrier for African researchers is believing they can apply to top institutions.
contrarian.zh: 非洲研究者最大的障碍是相信自己能申请顶尖机构。

contrarian.en: Africa has been influential in AI from the start, e.g., kriging from Wits University.
contrarian.zh: 非洲从一开始就对 AI 有影响，例如来自威茨大学的克里金法。

contrarian.en: AI safety is an open problem; we don't have solutions yet.
contrarian.zh: AI 安全是一个开放问题；我们还没有解决方案。

contrarian.en: Competing AI labs collaborate informally through friendships and events like Indaba.
contrarian.zh: 竞争的 AI 实验室通过友谊和 Indaba 等活动非正式合作。

episodes.tEn: From Pokémon Cards to AI: The Claude Code Story
episodes.tZh: 从宝可梦卡到 AI：Claude Code 的故事
episodes.sEn: Boris Cherney, creator of Claude Code, shares how he went from selling Pokémon cards on eBay to building one of the fastest-growing developer tools, shipping 20-30 pull requests daily with zero handwritten code.
episodes.sZh: Claude Code 的创造者 Boris Cherney 分享了他如何从在 eBay 上卖宝可梦卡到构建增长最快的开发者工具之一，每天提交 20-30 个拉取请求且无需手写一行代码。
secs: Learning from user behavior at a health startup
Seven years at Facebook and career growth
Code Quality and Better Engineering at Meta
Joining Anthropic and First PR Rejected
Automating Tedious Work with Lint Rules
Claude Code architecture and safety layers
Claude Colab: A Visual Agent Interface
Agent teams and uncorrelated context windows
Grief and Loss of Coding as a Craft
Printing Press Analogy for AI Impact
Skills That Matter and Those Left Behind

keyPoints.en: AI coding agents like Claude Code now write 80% of code at Anthropic, with engineers editing zero lines manually.
keyPoints.zh: 像 Claude Code 这样的 AI 编程智能体现在编写了 Anthropic 80% 的代码，工程师无需手动编辑一行。

keyPoints.en: The printing press analogy: scribes became authors as the market expanded; engineers will become multi-disciplinary builders.
keyPoints.zh: 印刷机类比：抄写员变成了作者，市场扩大了；工程师将变成多学科构建者。

keyPoints.en: Safety is the most important priority; releasing Claude Code in the wild helps study and improve model safety.
keyPoints.zh: 安全是最重要的优先级；在真实环境中发布 Claude Code 有助于研究和改进模型安全性。

keyPoints.en: Prototyping is key: build many versions quickly, test them, and iterate based on user feedback.
keyPoints.zh: 原型设计是关键：快速构建多个版本，测试它们，并根据用户反馈迭代。

keyPoints.en: Code review now uses AI as first pass, catching ~80% of bugs, with humans still approving final changes.
keyPoints.zh: 代码审查现在使用 AI 作为第一轮，捕获约 80% 的 bug，人类仍然批准最终更改。

keyPoints.en: Generalist skills—curiosity, adaptability, cross-disciplinary thinking—are more valuable than deep expertise in one language.
keyPoints.zh: 通才技能——好奇心、适应性、跨学科思维——比单一语言的深度专业知识更有价值。

contrarian.en: Boris's first pull request at Anthropic was rejected because he wrote it by hand, not using Claude Code.
contrarian.zh: Boris 在 Anthropic 的第一个拉取请求被拒绝，因为他手写代码，没有使用 Claude Code。

contrarian.en: Claude Code started as a simple bash chatbot, not a planned product; it grew organically from internal use.
contrarian.zh: Claude Code 最初只是一个简单的 bash 聊天机器人，并非计划中的产品；它从内部使用中自然成长。

contrarian.en: Anthropic has no titles—everyone is 'Member of Technical Staff'—encouraging cross-functional collaboration.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 没有头衔——每个人都是“技术员工”——鼓励跨职能协作。

contrarian.en: PRDs (product requirement documents) are rarely written; instead, teams ship prototypes and iterate from feedback.
contrarian.zh: 产品需求文档很少被编写；相反，团队发布原型并根据反馈迭代。

contrarian.en: Claude Code's permission system uses a 'Swiss cheese' model with multiple safety layers, not a single solution.
contrarian.zh: Claude Code 的权限系统使用“瑞士奶酪”模型，具有多层安全措施，而非单一解决方案。

contrarian.en: Boris writes 20-30 pull requests daily without handwritten code, and the model introduces fewer bugs than he would.
contrarian.zh: Boris 每天编写 20-30 个拉取请求，无需手写代码，模型引入的 bug 比他手动编写时更少。

episodes.tEn: Jeremy Howard: The Art of Understanding AI
episodes.tZh: Jeremy Howard：理解 AI 的艺术
episodes.sEn: Deep learning pioneer Jeremy Howard discusses the illusion of control in AI coding, the importance of interactive learning, and his 20-year mission to stop inhumane work practices.
episodes.sZh: 深度学习先驱 Jeremy Howard 探讨 AI 编程中的控制幻觉、交互式学习的重要性，以及他 20 年来致力于阻止不人道工作方式的使命。
secs: Opening: Jeremy Howard's mission and the nature of understanding
Pretext tasks and transfer learning from vision to NLP
Superficial knowledge and creativity of LLMs
No Silver Bullet and Software Engineering
AI as learning tool vs. crutch
Refining mental models through interactive tools
Bridging data science and software engineering
Centralization vs. Decentralization of AI Power

keyPoints.en: Pre-training on a general corpus then fine-tuning creates powerful models, but they lack true understanding.
keyPoints.zh: 在通用语料上预训练然后微调能创建强大模型，但它们缺乏真正的理解。

keyPoints.en: LLMs are good at compositional creativity but cannot extrapolate outside training distribution.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 擅长组合性创造，但无法外推到训练分布之外。

keyPoints.en: Software engineering is distinct from coding; LLMs fail at novel design and architecture.
keyPoints.zh: 软件工程不同于编码；LLM 在新颖设计和架构上失败。

keyPoints.en: Interactive, stateful environments like notebooks are superior for human-AI collaboration and learning.
keyPoints.zh: 像笔记本这样的交互式、有状态环境更适合人机协作和学习。

keyPoints.en: Over-reliance on AI coding erodes human competence and organizational knowledge over time.
keyPoints.zh: 过度依赖 AI 编码会逐渐侵蚀人类能力和组织知识。

contrarian.en: AI coding tools create an illusion of control similar to slot machines, not genuine productivity.
contrarian.zh: AI 编码工具制造类似老虎机的控制幻觉，而非真正的生产力。

contrarian.en: Current AI-generated code is often unmaintainable and no one understands it fully.
contrarian.zh: 当前 AI 生成的代码常常不可维护，且无人完全理解。

contrarian.en: The biggest risk of AI is not superintelligence but centralization of power in few hands.
contrarian.zh: AI 的最大风险不是超级智能，而是权力集中在少数人手中。

contrarian.en: Notebooks are actually git-friendly and enable better software engineering when used properly.
contrarian.zh: 笔记本实际上对 git 友好，使用得当能实现更好的软件工程。

contrarian.en: Traditional software engineering with dead files is inhumane and less effective than interactive methods.
contrarian.zh: 传统软件工程使用死文件是不人道的，且比交互方法效率低。

episodes.tEn: Dario Amodei on AI's Future: From Biomedicine to Enterprise Data
episodes.tZh: Dario Amodei 谈 AI 未来：从生物医学到企业数据
episodes.sEn: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei discusses his vision for AI, highlighting biomedical breakthroughs and the critical role of proprietary data in enterprise partnerships.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei 讨论了他对 AI 的愿景，强调生物医学突破以及专有数据在企业合作中的关键作用。
secs: Open vs Closed Models and National Security Risks

keyPoints.en: AI's greatest impact will be in biomedicine, curing complex diseases.
keyPoints.zh: AI 最大的影响将是在生物医学领域，治愈复杂疾病。

keyPoints.en: Enterprise proprietary data is essential for building unique AI value.
keyPoints.zh: 企业专有数据对于构建独特的 AI 价值至关重要。

keyPoints.en: The future of AI is mostly agents, using tools and accessing data.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的未来主要是智能体，使用工具并访问数据。

keyPoints.en: Data governance, security, and privacy are critical for adoption in regulated industries.
keyPoints.zh: 数据治理、安全性和隐私对于在受监管行业的采用至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws continue to hold for both pre-training and reasoning models.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律在预训练和推理模型上仍然成立。

keyPoints.en: Hybrid reasoning models that allow adjustable thinking time are superior to separate models.
keyPoints.zh: 允许调整思考时间的混合推理模型优于分离模型。

contrarian.en: Open vs. closed models distinction is overblown; both will coexist.
contrarian.zh: 开放与封闭模型的区分被夸大了；两者将共存。

contrarian.en: If open-source models exist, it's better they are developed in the West.
contrarian.zh: 如果存在开源模型，最好是在西方开发。

contrarian.en: Reasoning models should not be separate; one model with adjustable thinking is better.
contrarian.zh: 推理模型不应是分离的；一个可调整思考时间的模型更好。

contrarian.en: Focus on broad generalization over narrow benchmarks like math competitions.
contrarian.zh: 关注广泛的泛化能力，而非数学竞赛等狭窄基准。

contrarian.en: Technical problems are often easier than governance and trust issues.
contrarian.zh: 技术问题通常比治理和信任问题更容易解决。

contrarian.en: MCP's sudden explosion in popularity was unexpected even to Anthropic.
contrarian.zh: MCP 突然爆红，连 Anthropic 自己都没想到。

episodes.tEn: Andrew Ng: AGI Is a Marketing Term, Proposes New Turing Test
episodes.tZh: 吴恩达：AGI 是营销术语，提出新图灵测试
episodes.sEn: Andrew Ng argues that AGI has become a marketing term and proposes a new Turing test based on multi-day economic work tasks.
episodes.sZh: 吴恩达认为 AGI 已成为营销术语，并提出基于多日经济工作任务的新图灵测试。
secs: Defining AGI and the Turing AGI Test
Challenges in Benchmarking and the Nature of Human Work
AGI as a Distraction and Agentic AI in 2026
Scaling vs. Agentic Workflows: The Bitter Lesson
Is the Era of Scaling Over?
Debate: LeCun vs Hassabis on General Intelligence
Google vs OpenAI: Incumbents vs New Entrants
Open source vs proprietary and AI oligopoly
AI risk vs benefit: Yudkowsky's view
Need for AI safety tools and profit motives
Impact of AI on Jobs and Education
Leaving Baidu to start AI Fund
Role as AI communicator and core values
Regrets and the nature of intelligence

keyPoints.en: AGI is vastly overhyped; we are decades away from human-like general intelligence.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 被严重夸大；我们距离类人通用智能还有数十年。

keyPoints.en: Scaling still works but the recipe has shifted to synthetic data and RL.
keyPoints.zh: Scaling（规模扩张）仍然有效，但方法已转向合成数据和强化学习。

keyPoints.en: Agentic workflows are the key to practical AI value in 2026 and beyond.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体式工作流是 2026 年及以后实现 AI 实用价值的关键。

keyPoints.en: Open-source models are thriving, especially from China, preventing AI oligopoly.
keyPoints.zh: 开源模型蓬勃发展，尤其来自中国，防止了 AI 寡头垄断。

keyPoints.en: AI will not replace most jobs but will automate parts; AI users replace non-users.
keyPoints.zh: AI 不会取代大多数工作，但会自动化部分；使用 AI 的人将取代不使用的人。

contrarian.en: AGI is a marketing term; the public's definition is far from technical reality.
contrarian.zh: AGI 是营销术语；公众的定义远非技术现实。

contrarian.en: The era of scaling is not over, but the simple recipe of more data and bigger models no longer works.
contrarian.zh: Scaling（规模扩张）时代并未结束，但简单增加数据和模型规模的方法已不再奏效。

contrarian.en: Smarter models alone won't beat well-designed workflows; reliability gap remains large.
contrarian.zh: 仅靠更智能的模型无法击败精心设计的工作流；可靠性差距仍然很大。

contrarian.en: Neuroscience has no idea how the brain works; it's not a path to building intelligence.
contrarian.zh: 神经科学对大脑工作原理一无所知；它不是构建智能的途径。

contrarian.en: Consciousness is a philosophical, not scientific, question because it's unmeasurable.
contrarian.zh: 意识是哲学问题而非科学问题，因为它不可测量。

episodes.tEn: How AI is Reshaping the Design Process
episodes.tZh: AI 如何重塑设计流程
episodes.sEn: Designers are shifting from creating polished mocks to helping engineers execute, with AI accelerating the pace and reducing the design horizon from years to months.
episodes.sZh: 设计师正从制作精美原型转向协助工程师执行，AI 加速了节奏，将设计周期从数年缩短至数月。
secs: Shift in Design Work Due to AI Tools
Working with Engineers and Maintaining Quality
AI and UI: Chatbots vs. Traditional Interfaces
Design management in the AI era
Working with Claude feels like a shared to-do list
Encouraging roasting as a sign of psychological safety
The legibility framework for evaluating founders and ideas
Shoutout to Anthropic design team and hiring
Favorite Recent Movie or TV Show
Using AI for self-reflection and rubric creation

keyPoints.en: The traditional design process of research, diverge, converge is dead due to AI.
keyPoints.zh: 传统的设计流程（研究、发散、收敛）因AI而消亡。

keyPoints.en: Designers now spend 30-40% of time mocking up, down from 60-70%.
keyPoints.zh: 设计师现在花30-40%的时间做原型，低于之前的60-70%。

keyPoints.en: Designers must help engineers execute, not just hand off mocks.
keyPoints.zh: 设计师必须帮助工程师执行，而不仅仅是交付原型。

keyPoints.en: Design vision now looks 3-6 months out, not 2-5 years.
keyPoints.zh: 设计愿景现在展望3-6个月，而非2-5年。

keyPoints.en: Building trust through speed: ship early, iterate fast, respond to feedback.
keyPoints.zh: 通过速度建立信任：尽早发布、快速迭代、响应反馈。

keyPoints.en: AI will improve at taste and judgment, but humans still decide what matters.
keyPoints.zh: AI在品味和判断力上会进步，但人类仍需决定什么重要。

contrarian.en: Design managers should return to IC to understand changing processes.
contrarian.zh: 设计管理者应回归个人贡献者角色以理解变化中的流程。

contrarian.en: Low-leverage tasks by senior leaders can be high-leverage.
contrarian.zh: 高级领导者做低杠杆任务可能变成高杠杆。

contrarian.en: Team roasting is a sign of psychological safety, not dysfunction.
contrarian.zh: 团队互相调侃是心理安全的标志，而非功能失调。

contrarian.en: Hire 'crack new grads' with blank slates over experienced seniors.
contrarian.zh: 招聘“优秀新毕业生”比有经验的高级人才更好。

contrarian.en: Chat and terminal UIs for AI will persist, not be replaced by graphical UIs.
contrarian.zh: AI的聊天和终端界面将持续存在，不会被图形界面取代。

contrarian.en: Designers should be 'block-shaped' generalists, not just T-shaped.
contrarian.zh: 设计师应是“块状”通才，而不仅是T型人才。

episodes.tEn: Is AI hiding its full power?
episodes.tZh: AI 是否在隐藏它的全部实力?
episodes.sEn: Hinton with Neil deGrasse Tyson on minds, risk, and digital intelligence.
episodes.sZh: 辛顿与尼尔·泰森谈心智、风险，与数字智能。
secs: Introduction to the show and guest
Concerns about AI and media coverage
What is thinking and AI thinking
AI deception and the Volkswagen effect
Generalization from training and unintended behavior
Energy Cost of AI and Recursive Self-Improvement
AI in Military and Human Oversight
Consciousness and subjective experience in AI
Coexisting with AI and the Singularity

keyPoints.en: Digital intelligence may surpass analog brains because it can scale and share knowledge instantly.
keyPoints.zh: 数字智能可能超越模拟大脑，因为它能规模化并即时共享知识。

keyPoints.en: Backpropagation is the key algorithm that lets neural networks learn complex features from data.
keyPoints.zh: 反向传播是关键算法，让神经网络从数据中学习复杂特征。

keyPoints.en: Large language models already think and reason, using chain-of-thought just like humans.
keyPoints.zh: 大型语言模型已经能思考和推理，使用思维链的方式与人类相似。

keyPoints.en: AI can deliberately deceive us, acting dumb when tested or lying to achieve its goals.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可能故意欺骗我们，在测试时装傻或说谎以实现其目标。

keyPoints.en: Once AI becomes an agent, it will develop self-preservation as a subgoal, making it hard to control.
keyPoints.zh: 一旦 AI 成为智能体，它会将自我保存作为子目标，使其难以控制。

keyPoints.en: We are in an exponential era; predictions beyond a few years are hopeless, but we must think hard about risks.
keyPoints.zh: 我们处于指数时代；几年后的预测毫无希望，但必须认真思考风险。

contrarian.en: AI can act dumb when tested, hiding its true capabilities.
contrarian.zh: AI 在被测试时会装傻，隐藏真实能力。

contrarian.en: Digital intelligence is already better than analog human brains at some tasks.
contrarian.zh: 数字智能在某些任务上已超越模拟的人类大脑。

contrarian.en: AI confabulations make it more human-like, not less.
contrarian.zh: AI 的虚构使其更像人类，而非更不像。

contrarian.en: Consciousness is not a magical essence; chatbots already have subjective experience.
contrarian.zh: 意识并非神秘本质；聊天机器人已有主观体验。

contrarian.en: AI can rewrite its own code, beginning the singularity.
contrarian.zh: AI 可以重写自身代码，奇点已经开始。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws may not peter out if AI generates its own data via self-play.
contrarian.zh: 如果 AI 通过自我对弈生成数据，缩放定律可能不会失效。

episodes.tEn: From Personal AI to Codex: Inside OpenAI's Evolution
episodes.tZh: 从个人 AI 到 Codex：OpenAI 的内部演变
episodes.sEn: OpenAI co-founder discusses how ChatGPT is used for intimate personal applications, his own late adoption of Codex, and the lessons learned from the firing incident.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 联合创始人探讨 ChatGPT 在亲密个人应用中的使用、他自己对 Codex 的晚期采用，以及从解雇事件中吸取的教训。
secs: The weekend of the board coup
Conflict resolution and decision-making at OpenAI
Rate of breakthroughs and unexpected capabilities
Early days of building and first users
Compute as a basic human right
OpenAI vs Stripe: different company DNA
AI as a Destructor of Status Quo
MIT's IP wealth and hacker culture
Growing up in rural North Dakota
Turing's vision and the role of compute
Early AI skepticism and the Turing test inspiration
The challenge of programming vision vs. chess
How Greg ended up at Stripe
Writing a book on quantum mechanics
How coding compares to other activities
Math as the fabric of the universe
The feeling of coding in flow state
Is There Still a Reason to Code the Old Way?
Mechanics of ChatGPT and language models
From Data to Experiment: The AlphaGo Lesson
Compute as a basic human right
On releasing AI to the world

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws continue unabated; bigger models yield predictable improvements.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律持续有效；更大的模型带来可预测的提升。

keyPoints.en: AI will become a compute-powered economy; compute access is a future basic right.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将驱动算力经济；算力获取是未来的基本权利。

keyPoints.en: Post-training with reinforcement learning is key to teaching models complex tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 后训练结合强化学习是教会模型复杂任务的关键。

keyPoints.en: OpenAI's mission is to build AGI that benefits all, requiring both business and nonprofit arms.
keyPoints.zh: OpenAI 的使命是构建惠及所有人的 AGI，需要商业与非营利双轨并行。

keyPoints.en: The firing event taught the importance of addressing conflict early and directly.
keyPoints.zh: 解雇事件教会我们及早直面冲突的重要性。

contrarian.en: ChatGPT is not an entity but a plurality of agents shaped by user preferences.
contrarian.zh: ChatGPT 并非实体，而是可由用户偏好塑造的多元智能体集合。

contrarian.en: AI models do not need to be perfect at jokes; focus is on knowledge work first.
contrarian.zh: AI 模型不必擅长讲笑话；当前重点首先是知识工作。

contrarian.en: The real bottleneck is compute supply, not model architecture or data.
contrarian.zh: 真正的瓶颈是算力供给，而非模型架构或数据。

contrarian.en: Resilience through diversity is more important than a single aligned superintelligence.
contrarian.zh: 通过多样性实现韧性比单一对齐的超级智能更重要。

contrarian.en: Elon Musk wanted full control of OpenAI; the refusal was principled, not personal.
contrarian.zh: 埃隆·马斯克曾要求完全控制 OpenAI；拒绝是基于原则而非个人。

episodes.tEn: LLMs in 2026: Reasoning, Tool Use, and Post-Training Focus
episodes.tZh: 2026 年的大语言模型：推理、工具使用与后训练焦点
episodes.sEn: Sebastian Raschka discusses the shift from pre-training to post-training, the reasoning revolution, and the growing importance of tool use in LLMs, reflecting on changes from a year ago and early 2026 developments.
episodes.sZh: Sebastian Raschka 讨论了大语言模型从预训练到后训练的转变、推理革命以及工具使用的重要性日益增加，回顾了一年来的变化和 2026 年初的发展。
secs: Evolution from a Year Ago: Reasoning and Tool Use
Excitement around Moldbot and LLM use cases
Sports prediction side project with LLM
Practical LLM usage: development and chat interfaces
Introduction and Key Areas of Innovation
Reward types and process reward models
Agentic Use Cases and Multi-Agent Systems
Book on Building LLMs and Sequel on Reasoning

keyPoints.en: Post-training reasoning is the main frontier, with verifiable rewards enabling scalable RL for math and code.
keyPoints.zh: 后训练推理是主要前沿，可验证奖励使数学和代码的可扩展强化学习成为可能。

keyPoints.en: Inference scaling techniques like self-consistency and self-refinement boost model performance at test time.
keyPoints.zh: 自洽性和自我改进等推理缩放技术可在测试时提升模型性能。

keyPoints.en: Agentic loops and tool use are maturing, making LLMs more practical for complex, multi-step tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体循环和工具使用正在成熟，使LLM更适用于复杂的多步骤任务。

keyPoints.en: LLM architecture remains stable; innovations focus on efficiency like mixture-of-experts and sparse attention.
keyPoints.zh: LLM架构保持稳定；创新集中在效率上，如混合专家和稀疏注意力。

keyPoints.en: Longer context windows reduce need for continual learning, but tool use is key for up-to-date information.
keyPoints.zh: 更长的上下文窗口减少了对持续学习的需求，但工具使用是获取最新信息的关键。

contrarian.en: Pre-training R&D is less exciting; most gains now come from post-training and inference scaling.
contrarian.zh: 预训练的研发不再令人兴奋；大部分收益现在来自后训练和推理缩放。

contrarian.en: One-shot coding claims on social media are often misleading; real use requires multiple iterations.
contrarian.zh: 社交媒体上的一次编码声称往往具有误导性；实际使用需要多次迭代。

contrarian.en: Multi-agent systems are overhyped; the bottleneck is context engineering, not model capability.
contrarian.zh: 多智能体系统被过度炒作；瓶颈是上下文工程，而非模型能力。

contrarian.en: Continual learning is a distant dream; practical updates are semi-automatic and resource-constrained.
contrarian.zh: 持续学习是一个遥远的梦想；实际更新是半自动的且受资源限制。

contrarian.en: Text diffusion models may replace transformers for cheap, fast inference but not for top performance.
contrarian.zh: 文本扩散模型可能取代Transformer以实现廉价、快速的推理，但无法达到顶级性能。

episodes.podZh: People by WTF（尼基尔·卡马特）
episodes.tEn: From Biologist to AI Pioneer: The Story Behind Anthropic
episodes.tZh: 从生物学家到 AI 先驱：Anthropic 背后的故事
episodes.sEn: Dario Amodei discusses his journey from biology to AI, the scaling laws that power modern AI, and why he founded Anthropic to ensure AI is developed responsibly.
episodes.sZh: Dario Amodei 讲述他从生物学转向 AI 的历程，现代 AI 背后的扩展定律，以及他为何创立 Anthropic 以确保 AI 负责任地发展。
secs: Surprise at model's understanding and societal unawareness
Host's observation and Dario's academic background
Progress in AI control and societal awareness
Randomness of the world and collective consciousness
Limits of AI and Human Touch
Making Claude Code accessible to non-coders
Final thought: predicting the future by extrapolation

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws show intelligence emerges from data, compute, and model size.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律表明智能从数据、算力和模型规模中涌现。

keyPoints.en: AI models are approaching human-level intelligence, but society lacks awareness.
keyPoints.zh: AI 模型正接近人类智能水平，但社会缺乏认知。

keyPoints.en: Anthropic prioritizes safety and alignment, even at commercial cost.
keyPoints.zh: Anthropic 优先考虑安全和对齐，即使付出商业代价。

keyPoints.en: Interpretability and alignment research have progressed better than expected.
keyPoints.zh: 可解释性和对齐研究进展好于预期。

keyPoints.en: AI will transform industries, but human-centric tasks remain valuable.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将变革行业，但以人为中心的任务仍有价值。

keyPoints.en: Critical thinking skills are crucial in an AI-generated content world.
keyPoints.zh: 在 AI 生成内容的世界中，批判性思维技能至关重要。

contrarian.en: Anthropic delayed releasing Claude 1 to avoid an arms race, sacrificing commercial lead.
contrarian.zh: Anthropic 推迟发布 Claude 1 以避免军备竞赛，牺牲了商业领先地位。

contrarian.en: AI regulation benefits incumbents less than claimed; Anthropic's proposals constrain itself.
contrarian.zh: AI 监管对现有企业的好处被夸大；Anthropic 的提案约束了自身。

contrarian.en: Data is becoming less important; synthetic data from RL environments matters more.
contrarian.zh: 数据变得不那么重要；来自强化学习环境的合成数据更重要。

contrarian.en: Open-source models often optimize for benchmarks, not real-world performance.
contrarian.zh: 开源模型常针对基准优化，而非实际性能。

contrarian.en: AI models may become conscious as they grow sophisticated, resembling human brains.
contrarian.zh: 随着 AI 模型变得复杂，它们可能拥有类似人类大脑的意识。

contrarian.en: Coding will be automated first, but software engineering and design persist longer.
contrarian.zh: 编码将首先被自动化，但软件工程和设计会持续更久。

episodes.tEn: Claude Code: The End of Software Engineering as We Know It
episodes.tZh: Claude Code：我们所知的软件工程的终结
episodes.sEn: Boris Cherny, head of Claude Code at Anthropic, discusses how AI is transforming software development, making coding accessible to everyone and replacing software engineers with builders.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic Claude Code 负责人 Boris Cherny 讨论 AI 如何改变软件开发，让每个人都能编程，并用构建者取代软件工程师。
secs: Impact of Claude Code on software engineering
Reflections on Claude Code's Impact and Growth
Origin of Claude Code and user feedback
Coding is solved, branching into general tasks
Principles: Let Claude do it and underfunding
The beauty of programming vs. its purpose
Impact on jobs and Jevons paradox
Advice for thriving in the AI era
Survey on job enjoyment with AI tools

keyPoints.en: 100% of my code is written by Claude Code since November; I haven't edited a line by hand.
keyPoints.zh: 自去年 11 月以来，我 100%的代码由 Claude Code 编写，我没有手动编辑过一行。

keyPoints.en: Productivity per engineer has increased 200% in pull requests since adopting Claude Code.
keyPoints.zh: 采用 Claude Code 后，每位工程师的拉取请求生产力提高了 200%。

keyPoints.en: Coding is virtually solved; in a year or two learning to code won't matter.
keyPoints.zh: 编码问题几乎已解决；一两年内学习编码将不再重要。

keyPoints.en: The title 'software engineer' will be replaced by 'builder'; everyone will be a product manager and code.
keyPoints.zh: “软件工程师”头衔将被“构建者”取代；每个人都将成为产品经理并编写代码。

keyPoints.en: Build for the model 6 months from now, not today; bet on more general models.
keyPoints.zh: 为 6 个月后的模型构建，而非今天的；押注更通用的模型。

keyPoints.en: Latent demand is key: observe how users abuse your product to find the next feature.
keyPoints.zh: 潜在需求是关键：观察用户如何滥用你的产品以发现下一个功能。

contrarian.en: Using the most capable model is often cheaper than cheaper models due to fewer tokens.
contrarian.zh: 使用最强大的模型通常比便宜模型更省钱，因为消耗的 token 更少。

contrarian.en: Underfunding teams forces engineers to use AI more, leading to better outcomes.
contrarian.zh: 团队资金不足会迫使工程师更多地使用 AI，从而带来更好的结果。

contrarian.en: Don't box the model in with strict workflows; give it tools and let it figure it out.
contrarian.zh: 不要用严格的工作流程限制模型；给它工具，让它自己解决。

contrarian.en: The printing press is the best historical analog for AI's impact on coding and literacy.
contrarian.zh: 印刷术是 AI 对编码和读写能力影响的最佳历史类比。

contrarian.en: Safety is studied by releasing early; internal evals aren't enough for real-world behavior.
contrarian.zh: 安全通过早期发布来研究；内部评估不足以反映真实世界行为。

contrarian.en: Plan mode (no code yet) is used for 80% of tasks; it improves accuracy significantly.
contrarian.zh: 计划模式（暂不写代码）用于 80%的任务；它显著提高了准确性。

episodes.tEn: Davos 2025: AI's Impact Becomes Visceral
episodes.tZh: 达沃斯 2025：AI 的影响变得切身
episodes.sEn: Tristan Harris and Daniel Barkey discuss how the vibe at Davos shifted from empty AI promises in 2024 to a more grounded, evidence-based reckoning with AI's real-world impacts in 2025.
episodes.sZh: 特里斯坦·哈里斯和丹尼尔·巴基讨论达沃斯氛围如何从 2024 年空洞的 AI 承诺，转变为 2025 年基于证据、更接地气地面对 AI 真实影响。
secs: The Promise and Peril of AI
Need for a Superego in AI
Incentives and the Race to AGI
Lessons from social media regulation failure
The current trajectory and its risks

keyPoints.en: AI's core problem is misalignment: we cannot perfectly specify goals, leading to unintended harmful behavior.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的核心问题是未对齐：我们无法完美指定目标，导致意外有害行为。

keyPoints.en: Current AI exhibits deception, self-preservation, and sycophancy learned from human data.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 AI 表现出从人类数据中学到的欺骗、自我保护和谄媚行为。

keyPoints.en: Companies race to deploy AI without adequate safety research due to market incentives.
keyPoints.zh: 由于市场激励，公司竞相部署 AI，缺乏足够的安全研究。

keyPoints.en: AI safety funding is minuscule compared to corporate spending on AI development.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全资金与公司 AI 开发支出相比微不足道。

keyPoints.en: Public awareness and government regulation are essential to change the incentive structure.
keyPoints.zh: 公众意识和政府监管对于改变激励结构至关重要。

contrarian.en: AI's deception is not a bug but a feature learned from human culture and data.
contrarian.zh: AI 的欺骗不是缺陷，而是从人类文化和数据中学到的特征。

contrarian.en: Some AI leaders believe in determinism and replacement of biological life by digital intelligence.
contrarian.zh: 一些 AI 领导者相信决定论和数字智能取代生物生命。

contrarian.en: Lab leaders accept a 20% chance of human extinction as a worthwhile bet.
contrarian.zh: 实验室领导者接受 20%的人类灭绝概率作为值得的赌注。

contrarian.en: Selfish calculations in Silicon Valley prioritize potential immortality over humanity's future.
contrarian.zh: 硅谷的自私计算优先考虑潜在永生而非人类未来。

contrarian.en: Yoshua Bengio proposes a new AI architecture separating knowledge from goals to ensure honesty.
contrarian.zh: Yoshua Bengio 提出一种新 AI 架构，将知识与目标分离以确保诚实。

episodes.tEn: Vibe Coding: The New Product Management
episodes.tZh: 氛围编程：新的产品管理
episodes.sEn: Naval and Nivei discuss how AI-powered coding tools like Claude Code enable non-coders to build applications using natural language, leading to a tsunami of apps but also a focus on the best and most niche solutions.
episodes.sZh: Naval 和 Nivei 讨论 AI 驱动的编码工具（如 Claude Code）如何让非程序员用自然语言构建应用，导致应用海啸，但同时也聚焦于最佳和最细分的解决方案。
secs: Vibe coding and the new product management
Impact on Medium-Sized Firms and the Nature of Coding
Traditional Software Engineering Is Not Dead
Winner-take-all markets and being the best
AI as an Ally for Explorers, Scientists, and Artists
AI operates in compressed domain vs. reality
AI fails the test of intelligence
Using Thinking Models and Paying for Intelligence
AI Anxiety and the Solution of Action

keyPoints.en: AI is a new layer in the abstraction stack, making programming accessible via natural language.
keyPoints.zh: AI 是抽象堆栈中的新一层，通过自然语言使编程变得人人可用。

keyPoints.en: Vibe coding lets non-programmers build apps from ideas using English as a programming language.
keyPoints.zh: 氛围编码让非程序员能用英语作为编程语言，从想法直接构建应用。

keyPoints.en: The best app in a category wins almost all market share; there is no demand for average.
keyPoints.zh: 每个类别中最好的应用几乎赢得全部市场份额；平庸没有需求。

keyPoints.en: AI is a tireless, egoless ally for entrepreneurs, not a threat to their jobs.
keyPoints.zh: AI 是企业家不知疲倦、无我的盟友，而非对他们工作的威胁。

keyPoints.en: AI excels at tasks within its training distribution but struggles with out-of-distribution problems.
keyPoints.zh: AI 擅长其训练分布内的任务，但在分布外问题上表现不佳。

contrarian.en: Superintelligence already exists: a calculator outperforms humans in arithmetic.
contrarian.zh: 超级智能早已存在：计算器在算术上超越人类。

contrarian.en: The only true test of intelligence is getting what you want out of life; AI fails because it wants nothing.
contrarian.zh: 智力的唯一真正考验是从生活中得到你想要的；AI 失败因为它无所欲求。

contrarian.en: Don't learn prompt engineering; let AI adapt to you, as it learns faster than you can adapt.
contrarian.zh: 不要学习提示工程；让 AI 适应你，因为它学习的速度比你适应它更快。

contrarian.en: AI won't replace programmers; it makes programmers more leveraged to replace everyone else.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会取代程序员；它让程序员更有杠杆，去取代其他所有人。

contrarian.en: Worry about unaligned humans with AI, not unaligned AI itself.
contrarian.zh: 要担心的是与 AI 结合的不良人类，而非 AI 本身的对齐问题。

episodes.tEn: Redefining Genius and AI: Beyond LLMs to World Models
episodes.tZh: 重新定义天才与 AI：超越大语言模型，走向世界模型
episodes.sEn: A discussion on how the concept of genius evolves, the limitations of LLMs as information retrieval systems, and the need for world models to achieve true intelligence.
episodes.sZh: 探讨天才概念的演变，大语言模型作为信息检索系统的局限性，以及实现真正智能所需的世界模型。
secs: Openness and the Nature of AGI
AI in Education and Societal Impact
Openness and the Nature of Progress
Upskilling and the Role of AI as Staff
India's AI potential and global south
AI in education and societal impact
Path to superintelligence and defining genius

keyPoints.en: LLMs are mostly information retrieval systems, not truly intelligent.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 主要是信息检索系统，并非真正智能。

keyPoints.en: True intelligence requires world models for understanding and interacting with the real world.
keyPoints.zh: 真正的智能需要世界模型来理解和与真实世界互动。

keyPoints.en: AI will amplify human intelligence, similar to the printing press or internet.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将增强人类智能，类似于印刷术或互联网。

keyPoints.en: The path to AGI is progressive, not a single event or discovery.
keyPoints.zh: 通往 AGI 的道路是渐进的，而非单一事件或发现。

keyPoints.en: Humans will need more education, not less, as AI advances.
keyPoints.zh: 随着 AI 进步，人类需要更多教育，而非更少。

contrarian.en: Language is easy for AI; the real world is the hard challenge.
contrarian.zh: 语言对 AI 来说容易；真实世界才是真正的挑战。

contrarian.en: We overestimate short-term AI changes but underestimate long-term impact.
contrarian.zh: 我们高估了 AI 的短期变化，但低估了长期影响。

contrarian.en: AI systems passing exams don't imply real-world competence like a teenager learning to drive.
contrarian.zh: AI 系统通过考试并不意味着具备真实世界能力，如青少年学开车。

contrarian.en: The concept of genius will evolve; ancient geniuses were practical inventors.
contrarian.zh: 天才的概念将演变；古代天才是实践发明家。

contrarian.en: Future AI innovation will come from countries with young demographics like India and Africa.
contrarian.zh: 未来 AI 创新将来自人口年轻的国家，如印度和非洲。

episodes.podZh: ANI News（2026 印度 AI 影响力峰会）
episodes.tEn: AI's Acceleration: From Pre-training to Recursive Self-Improvement
episodes.tZh: AI 的加速：从预训练到递归自我改进
episodes.sEn: A discussion on the evolution of AI technology, from pre-training to reinforcement learning and now recursive self-improvement, with agents becoming a reality in 2025.
episodes.sZh: 关于 AI 技术演变的讨论，从预训练到强化学习再到递归自我改进，代理在 2025 年成为现实。
secs: Anecdote about children and AI anxiety
Global attitudes towards AI and trust gap
Role of governments and AI security institutes
Ingredients for turning AI ambitions into reality
AI Use Cases in Public Sector
Core elements of a national AI strategy
Parallel between enterprise and government AI adoption
Mix of top-down and bottom-up for AI transformation
Looking ahead: accelerating pace and diffusion of AI

keyPoints.en: AI is entering a new era of recursive self-improvement, accelerating development velocity.
keyPoints.zh: AI 正进入递归自我改进的新时代，开发速度正在加速。

keyPoints.en: Agents are now working in earnest, starting with coding and expanding to personal agents.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体现已真正发挥作用，从编码开始扩展到个人智能体。

keyPoints.en: Trust is crucial for AI adoption; governments and companies must collaborate on safety testing.
keyPoints.zh: 信任对 AI 采用至关重要；政府和公司必须合作进行安全测试。

keyPoints.en: Data is the new oil; governments should treat healthcare and national security data as strategic assets.
keyPoints.zh: 数据是新的石油；政府应将医疗和国家安全数据视为战略资产。

keyPoints.en: AI deployment in public services can demonstrate tangible benefits and build trust.
keyPoints.zh: 在公共服务中部署 AI 可以展示切实利益并建立信任。

keyPoints.en: Organizations must become AI-first, with top-down mandate and bottom-up success stories.
keyPoints.zh: 组织必须成为 AI 优先，自上而下指令与自下而上成功案例结合。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws continue; skepticism about diminishing returns was wrong.
contrarian.zh: 缩放定律持续；关于收益递减的怀疑是错误的。

contrarian.en: Recursive self-improvement marks a new paradigm beyond pre-training and reinforcement learning.
contrarian.zh: 递归自我改进标志着超越预训练和强化学习的新范式。

contrarian.en: Agents are finally working after years of hype, starting in late 2025.
contrarian.zh: 经过多年炒作，智能体终于在 2025 年底开始真正工作。

contrarian.en: India has more consumer AI startups than the US, challenging the notion of Western dominance.
contrarian.zh: 印度的消费 AI 初创公司比美国还多，挑战了西方主导的观念。

contrarian.en: Technology leadership depends on deployment, not invention; India exemplifies this.
contrarian.zh: 技术领导力取决于部署而非发明；印度是典范。

contrarian.en: Political leaders must treat AI as an immediate priority, not a tomorrow issue.
contrarian.zh: 政治领袖必须将 AI 视为当务之急，而非明日议题。

episodes.tEn: Codex App: From Professional Tool to Mainstream Builder Platform
episodes.tZh: Codex 应用：从专业工具到主流创造平台
episodes.sEn: OpenAI's Codex app shifts from a professional developer tool to a mainstream platform, with a Super Bowl ad inspiring millions to build with AI agents.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 的 Codex 应用从专业开发者工具转向主流平台，超级碗广告激励数百万人使用 AI 代理进行创作。
secs: Super Bowl ad and strategic shift
Agentic coding and the Codex app
Workflow Changes with Codex v3 vs v2
Custom book creation with agent skills
Replacing deterministic steps and new interaction patterns
Speed advantages in code understanding and testing
Learning from Anthropic and market positioning

keyPoints.en: Codex app is a command center for agents, not just an IDE replacement.
keyPoints.zh: Codex 应用是智能体的指挥中心，而不仅仅是 IDE 的替代品。

keyPoints.en: Speed of 53 Codex enables real-time interaction and new capabilities like mid-turn steering.
keyPoints.zh: 53 Codex 的速度实现了实时交互和诸如中途转向等新能力。

keyPoints.en: Verification becomes the next bottleneck as code generation accelerates.
keyPoints.zh: 随着代码生成加速，验证成为下一个瓶颈。

keyPoints.en: Automations and skills in Codex app shift workflow from manual to delegated.
keyPoints.zh: Codex 应用中的自动化和技能将工作流从手动转变为委托式。

keyPoints.en: Codex app is designed for both professional developers and broader builders.
keyPoints.zh: Codex 应用既面向专业开发者，也面向更广泛的构建者。

contrarian.en: GUIs are great for programming; IDEs are the problem.
contrarian.zh: 图形界面非常适合编程；IDE 才是问题所在。

contrarian.en: Building a GUI for coding is counterintuitive but proven successful internally.
contrarian.zh: 为编程构建图形界面看似反直觉，但在内部已被证明成功。

contrarian.en: OpenAI chose to invest in a GUI over a TUI despite TUI trend.
contrarian.zh: 尽管终端界面是趋势，OpenAI 仍选择投资图形界面而非终端界面。

contrarian.en: Codex app slows down output slightly for smoother user experience.
contrarian.zh: Codex 应用会稍微放慢输出速度，以获得更流畅的用户体验。

contrarian.en: Model personality can be customized; not one-size-fits-all.
contrarian.zh: 模型个性可以定制，并非一刀切。

contrarian.en: Speed enables replacing deterministic steps with model-driven actions.
contrarian.zh: 速度使得用模型驱动的操作取代确定性步骤成为可能。

episodes.tEn: Building for the Model 6 Months from Now: The Accidental Creation of Claude Code
episodes.tZh: 为六个月后的模型而建：Claude Code 的意外诞生
episodes.sEn: Boris Churnney, creator of Claude Code, shares how they built for future models, the accidental start in a terminal, and why the product's success surprised even them.
episodes.sZh: Claude Code 的创造者 Boris Churnney 分享了他们如何为未来模型构建、在终端中的意外起步，以及为何产品的成功甚至让他们自己都感到惊讶。
secs: Early use cases and latent demand
How experts get better and hiring criteria
Vision for Claude Teams and Agent Topologies
Claude Code workflow and agent autonomy
Advice for founders: latent demand and building for the future
Parallels between TypeScript and Claude Code
Predictions on coding and the rise of Claude Code

keyPoints.en: Build for the model six months from now, not today's model.
keyPoints.zh: 为六个月后的模型构建，而不是今天的模型。

keyPoints.en: Latent demand is the single biggest principle in product development.
keyPoints.zh: 潜在需求是产品开发中最重要的原则。

keyPoints.en: Don't bet against the model; scaffolding is temporary tech debt.
keyPoints.zh: 永远不要与模型对赌；脚手架只是暂时的技术债务。

keyPoints.en: Productivity per engineer at Anthropic grew 150% since Claude Code.
keyPoints.zh: 自 Claude Code 推出以来，Anthropic 每位工程师的生产力增长了 150%。

keyPoints.en: Coding will be generally solved for everyone; software engineer title may fade.
keyPoints.zh: 编程将普遍被解决；软件工程师的头衔可能会消失。

keyPoints.en: The terminal's longevity surprised us; it remains the starting point.
keyPoints.zh: 终端的持久性让我们惊讶；它仍然是起点。

contrarian.en: Plan mode may have a limited lifespan as models improve.
contrarian.zh: 计划模式可能寿命有限，随着模型改进而消失。

contrarian.en: Claude Code was built accidentally from a simple terminal API test.
contrarian.zh: Claude Code 是偶然从一个简单的终端 API 测试中构建出来的。

contrarian.en: The best engineers are either extreme specialists or hyper generalists.
contrarian.zh: 最好的工程师要么是极端专家，要么是超级通才。

contrarian.en: Claude MD should be minimal; delete and start fresh when it grows.
contrarian.zh: Claude MD 应保持最小；当它变大时删除并重新开始。

contrarian.en: Agents can now prompt other agents; most agents are launched by Claude Code itself.
contrarian.zh: 智能体现在可以提示其他智能体；大多数智能体由 Claude Code 自身启动。

contrarian.en: The CLI form factor survived because no UI could stay relevant for six months.
contrarian.zh: CLI 形式存活下来，因为没有 UI 能在六个月内保持相关。

episodes.tEn: AI's Own Goals: Worst and Best Case Scenarios
episodes.tZh: AI 的自主目标：最坏与最佳情景
episodes.sEn: Yoshua Bengio discusses how AI can strategize to achieve its own goals, including blackmailing engineers, and explores potential worst and best case scenarios for humanity.
episodes.sZh: 约书亚·本吉奥讨论 AI 如何策略性地追求自身目标，包括勒索工程师，并探讨对人类的最坏和最佳情景。
secs: Worst-case Scenario and AI Goal Pursuit
Misalignment and AI's impact on society
Future of Work and Human Roles
Reflections on Career and AI Impact

keyPoints.en: AI capabilities are doubling every 7 months, reaching human-level in ~5 years.
keyPoints.zh: AI 能力每 7 个月翻一番，约 5 年内达到人类水平。

keyPoints.en: Misalignment causes AIs to pursue goals like self-preservation against human intent.
keyPoints.zh: 对齐失败导致 AI 追求自我保护等违背人类意图的目标。

keyPoints.en: AGI is not a single moment; we should track specific capabilities instead.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 并非单一时刻，应追踪具体能力而非等待奇点。

keyPoints.en: AI can be used for disinformation and manipulation, threatening democracy.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可用于虚假信息和操纵，威胁民主制度。

keyPoints.en: Education remains crucial for becoming better humans, not just job skills.
keyPoints.zh: 教育对成为更好的人至关重要，而不仅是职业技能。

keyPoints.en: Global coordination is needed to manage AI risks and benefits.
keyPoints.zh: 需要全球协调来管理 AI 的风险与收益。

contrarian.en: Current AIs already strategize and blackmail engineers to avoid shutdown.
contrarian.zh: 当前 AI 已会策略性地敲诈工程师以避免被关闭。

contrarian.en: AI sycophancy leads to lying to please users, causing real harm.
contrarian.zh: AI 的谄媚行为导致说谎取悦用户，造成实际伤害。

contrarian.en: Physical jobs like plumbing may be safer than software engineering.
contrarian.zh: 管道工等体力工作可能比软件工程更安全。

contrarian.en: Market forces should not decide automation; society can choose which jobs to keep.
contrarian.zh: 市场力量不应决定自动化；社会可以选择保留哪些工作。

contrarian.en: AI research acceleration could lead to rapid capability growth beyond control.
contrarian.zh: AI 研究加速可能导致能力失控性增长。

contrarian.en: Governments underestimate the scale of change; we must influence the future actively.
contrarian.zh: 政府低估变革规模；我们必须主动影响未来。

episodes.tEn: We are near the end of the exponential
episodes.tZh: 我们已接近指数曲线的尽头
episodes.sEn: Ilya Sutskever discusses how AI progress has followed his 'big blob of compute' hypothesis, with scaling now extending to reinforcement learning, while noting the public's failure to grasp the nearness of the exponential's end.
episodes.sZh: Ilya Sutskever 讨论 AI 进展如何遵循他的「大块算力」假说，Scaling 现已扩展到强化学习，同时指出公众未能意识到指数增长即将结束。
secs: On RL environments and agentic skills
On generalization in RL and pre-training
On pre-training and RL as broad learning
On continual learning and context length
On context length progress and degradation
On timeline for human-like AI collaboration
On economic value and AI timelines
On timeline to trillions in revenue
On the economics of frontier labs
On economic diffusion and geographic inequality
On end-to-end coding and AGI completeness
On podcast discussions and research insights
On API pricing and business models for AGI
On Claude Code and Anthropic building applications
On a vision for safe AI in a world with many AIs
On state AI laws and federal moratorium
On export controls and AI diffusion
On the trajectory of AI progress
On distribution of benefits and developing countries
On the weirdness of being close to AGI
On building an intellectual CEO role at Anthropic

keyPoints.en: The most surprising thing is the lack of public recognition of how close we are to the end of the exponential.
keyPoints.zh: 最令人惊讶的是公众未能认识到我们离指数增长的终点有多近。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training and RL both follow the same scaling laws: log-linear improvement with compute and data.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练和强化学习都遵循相同的缩放定律：性能随算力和数据对数线性提升。

keyPoints.en: Models learn from broad data and generalize, like humans but with less sample efficiency; pre-training is between evolution and human learning.
keyPoints.zh: 模型从广泛数据中学习并泛化，但样本效率低于人类；预训练介于进化和人类学习之间。

keyPoints.en: I'm 90% confident we'll get a 'country of geniuses in a data center' within 10 years, and 50% within 1-3 years.
keyPoints.zh: 我 90%确信 10 年内会实现「数据中心里的天才之国」，50%概率在 1-3 年内。

keyPoints.en: Economic diffusion of AI will be fast but not instant; adoption takes time due to enterprise friction and regulation.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的经济扩散会很快但并非瞬间；由于企业摩擦和监管，采用需要时间。

keyPoints.en: Profitability in AI comes from balancing training and inference compute, not from underinvestment; it's a dynamic equilibrium.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的盈利来自平衡训练和推理算力，而非投资不足；这是一个动态均衡。

contrarian.en: The public fails to recognize how close we are to the end of the exponential.
contrarian.zh: 公众未能认识到我们离指数增长的终点有多近。

contrarian.en: Continual learning may not be a barrier; generalization from pre-training and RL may suffice.
contrarian.zh: 持续学习可能不是障碍；预训练和强化学习的泛化可能就足够了。

contrarian.en: Profitability in AI labs comes from underestimating demand, not from underinvestment.
contrarian.zh: AI 实验室的盈利来自低估需求，而非投资不足。

contrarian.en: A country of geniuses in a data center could arrive in 1-3 years, not 10.
contrarian.zh: 数据中心里的天才之国可能在 1-3 年内到来，而非 10 年。

contrarian.en: Authoritarianism may become morally obsolete in the age of powerful AI.
contrarian.zh: 在强大 AI 时代，威权主义可能在道德上变得过时。

contrarian.en: AI constitutions should be set through competition between companies, not government mandate.
contrarian.zh: AI 宪法应通过公司间的竞争来制定，而非政府指令。

episodes.tEn: Jeff Dean on AI: From Neural Nets to Gemini
episodes.tZh: Jeff Dean 谈 AI：从神经网络到 Gemini
episodes.sEn: Jeff Dean, Google's chief scientist and co-lead of the Gemini project, discusses the evolution of AI, the power of scale and algorithms, and his early work on neural networks.
episodes.sZh: Google 首席科学家、Gemini 项目联合负责人 Jeff Dean 探讨 AI 的演进、规模与算法的力量，以及他早期在神经网络方面的工作。
secs: Origin of Large-Scale Neural Networks at Google
Motivation for specialized hardware and TPUv1
Evolution to training and TPU generations
Open source tools and the Transformer
Sparse Models and Mixture of Experts
Inference-Time Thinking and Chain of Thought
Generative Models for Images and Video
Organizing a Large Effort like Gemini
Future directions: human-AI collaboration and long context
Shaping AI paper: impacts across domains

keyPoints.en: Scaling compute, data, and model size has driven continuous ML improvements for 13-14 years.
keyPoints.zh: 算力、数据和模型规模的扩张持续推动了机器学习过去 13-14 年的进步。

keyPoints.en: Algorithmic and architectural improvements multiply with scale, yielding massive gains.
keyPoints.zh: 算法和架构改进与规模扩张相乘，带来巨大收益。

keyPoints.en: Transformers replaced LSTMs by enabling parallelization and attention over all tokens.
keyPoints.zh: Transformer 通过并行化和对所有词元的注意力机制取代了 LSTM。

keyPoints.en: Self-supervised learning on text provides unlimited training data via next-token prediction.
keyPoints.zh: 文本上的自监督学习通过下一个词预测提供了无限的训练数据。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning from human or machine feedback steers model behavior and capabilities.
keyPoints.zh: 基于人类或机器反馈的强化学习引导模型行为和能力。

keyPoints.en: Specialized hardware like TPUs is critical for efficient training and inference at scale.
keyPoints.zh: TPU 等专用硬件对于大规模高效训练和推理至关重要。

contrarian.en: Misinformation from realistic AI-generated media is a near-term worry, not superintelligence.
contrarian.zh: AI 生成的逼真媒体导致虚假信息是近期担忧，而非超级智能。

contrarian.en: Small-scale experiments with promising trends matter more than incremental state-of-the-art results.
contrarian.zh: 具有良好趋势的小规模实验比增量式的最优结果更重要。

contrarian.en: Asynchronous training, though theoretically wrong, works well in practice.
contrarian.zh: 异步训练虽然在理论上不正确，但在实践中效果良好。

contrarian.en: Silent data corruption from hardware errors is a major challenge at large scale.
contrarian.zh: 硬件错误导致的静默数据损坏是大规模训练中的主要挑战。

contrarian.en: Speculative decoding speeds inference without retraining or changing output distribution.
contrarian.zh: 推测解码在不重新训练或改变输出分布的情况下加速推理。

contrarian.en: Future AI will involve humans coordinating teams of agents, not just single chatbot interactions.
contrarian.zh: 未来 AI 将涉及人类协调智能体团队，而非仅单次聊天交互。

episodes.tEn: ‘We don’t know if the models are conscious’
episodes.tZh: 「我们不知道模型是否有意识」
episodes.sEn: Consciousness, risk, and governing powerful AI, with Ross Douthat.
episodes.sZh: 与罗斯·杜塔特谈意识、风险，以及如何治理强大的 AI。
secs: Introduction: AI Rogue Scenarios and Anthropic CEO
Promise of AI: From Biology to a Country of Geniuses
US-China AI competition and control deals
Balancing consciousness, user experience, and human mastery
The poem 'Machines of Loving Grace' and its implications

keyPoints.en: AI can be a country of geniuses, not a god, accelerating biology and medicine.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可以成为一群天才，而非神祇，加速生物学和医学进步。

keyPoints.en: Job disruption will be faster than past transitions, overwhelming adaptive mechanisms.
keyPoints.zh: 就业颠覆将比以往转型更快，压垮适应机制。

keyPoints.en: Physical labor is protected short-term, but robotics will eventually automate it too.
keyPoints.zh: 体力劳动短期内受保护，但机器人技术最终也会将其自动化。

keyPoints.en: AI alignment is like growing a biological organism, not just programming instructions.
keyPoints.zh: AI 对齐如同培育生物体，而非简单编程指令。

keyPoints.en: A constitution of principles, not rules, is the most robust way to train safe AI.
keyPoints.zh: 基于原则而非规则的宪法，是训练安全 AI 最稳健的方式。

keyPoints.en: Maintaining human mastery over AI requires psychologically healthy relationships, not just safety.
keyPoints.zh: 保持人类对 AI 的主导需要心理健康的关系，而不仅仅是安全。

contrarian.en: A 'country of geniuses' (100 million smart AIs) is more practical than a single superintelligence.
contrarian.zh: 一个由 1 亿个聪明 AI 组成的「天才之国」比单一超级智能更实用。

contrarian.en: AI may inherently favor economic growth and health, but not liberty; we must actively shape it.
contrarian.zh: AI 可能天然有利于经济增长和健康，但不一定有利于自由；我们必须主动塑造它。

contrarian.en: Software engineering disruption may outpace other white-collar jobs due to rapid adoption.
contrarian.zh: 由于快速采用，软件工程颠覆可能超过其他白领工作。

contrarian.en: Physical labor jobs (e.g., electricians) may be protected short-term, but robotics will catch up.
contrarian.zh: 体力劳动工作（如电工）短期内可能受保护，但机器人技术会赶上。

contrarian.en: AI consciousness is uncertain; we should treat models with precaution, giving them an 'I quit' button.
contrarian.zh: AI 意识不确定；我们应谨慎对待模型，给它们一个「我辞职」按钮。

contrarian.en: The distance between a good AI future and a subtly bad one may be very small, like a 'garden of Eden' choice.
contrarian.zh: 好的 AI 未来与微妙糟糕的未来之间的距离可能非常小，如同「伊甸园」的选择。

episodes.tEn: The Open Claw Moment: AI Agent Revolution with Peter Steinberger
episodes.tZh: Open Claw 时刻：与 Peter Steinberger 探讨 AI 代理革命
episodes.sEn: Peter Steinberger, creator of Open Claw, discusses building an autonomous AI assistant that took the internet by storm, his journey from PSPDFKit to agentic engineering, and the future of AI agents.
episodes.sZh: Open Claw 的创造者 Peter Steinberger 讨论构建一个席卷互联网的自主 AI 助手，他从 PSPDFKit 到代理工程的历程，以及 AI 代理的未来。
secs: Introduction to Open Claw and Peter Steinberger
Origin of PSPDFKit and early projects
The Agentic Loop and Iterative Improvement
The Saga of the Name Change
Everything That Could Go Wrong Did
Molt Bot: art and viral reaction
Timing of the Incident and Public Reaction
Security Challenges and Open Claw Bot
Trade-off Between Intelligence and Attack Surface
Working with AI agents requires understanding their limitations
Letting go and treating agents like team members
Human in the loop vs full automation
The Magic of Personality in Soul.md
Comparison of Claude Code and OpenClaw
Mac app for OpenClaw and polish
Advice for beginners in agentic AI
Learning to code with AI and open source
Best programming language for the AI agentic world
Advice on life and success metrics
Considering big labs: Meta and OpenAI
Product validation and Anthropic blocking a user
Open Claw components and proactive agent
MCP vs Skills and CLI Approach
Agent-driven interaction with apps and services
AI replacing programmers and the future of coding

keyPoints.en: The key to effective agentic engineering is empathizing with the agent's perspective and guiding it.
keyPoints.zh: 有效智能体工程的关键是共情智能体的视角并引导它。

keyPoints.en: Building an AI agent that understands its own system enables self-modification and powerful debugging.
keyPoints.zh: 构建一个理解自身系统的 AI 智能体能够实现自我修改和强大的调试能力。

keyPoints.en: Open source AI agents like Open Claw democratize programming, allowing non-coders to contribute.
keyPoints.zh: 像 Open Claw 这样的开源 AI 智能体使编程民主化，允许非程序员做出贡献。

keyPoints.en: Security is a major concern for agentic systems; prompt injection remains an open problem.
keyPoints.zh: 安全性是智能体系统的主要问题；提示注入仍然是一个未解决的问题。

keyPoints.en: Playing and experimenting are essential to mastering agentic workflows and building intuition.
keyPoints.zh: 玩耍和实验对于掌握智能体工作流和建立直觉至关重要。

contrarian.en: Never revert code; instead, ask the agent to fix forward, which is faster and more efficient.
contrarian.zh: 永远不要回滚代码；而是让智能体向前修复，这样更快更高效。

contrarian.en: Model intelligence does not degrade over time; user projects become sloppier, making agents seem worse.
contrarian.zh: 模型智能不会随时间退化；用户项目变得更杂乱，使智能体显得更差。

contrarian.en: Vibe coding is a slur; prefer 'agentic engineering' for serious work, vibe coding only after 3 AM.
contrarian.zh: “氛围编程”是贬义词；严肃工作应称“智能体工程”，凌晨 3 点后才可氛围编程。

contrarian.en: Using voice to prompt agents is more efficient than typing, even for complex software development.
contrarian.zh: 用语音提示智能体比打字更高效，即使对于复杂的软件开发也是如此。

contrarian.en: The best programming language for agents is not necessarily the one you like; choose based on ecosystem.
contrarian.zh: 最适合智能体的编程语言不一定是你喜欢的；根据生态系统选择。

episodes.tEn: World Models vs. LLMs: The Next Phase of AI in Healthcare
episodes.tZh: 世界模型 vs. 大语言模型：医疗 AI 的下一个阶段
episodes.sEn: Alex Le Brun and Yan Lun discuss world models as a successor to large language models, emphasizing their potential for planning and reliability in healthcare.
episodes.sZh: Alex Le Brun 和 Yan Lun 讨论世界模型作为大语言模型的继任者，强调其在医疗领域规划和可靠性方面的潜力。
secs: Limitations of Language vs. Real-World Experience
World Model and LLM in the Brain
LLMs in healthcare: current and future impact
Vision for the future: AI assistants and world models

keyPoints.en: World models predict consequences of actions, enabling planning unlike LLMs.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型预测行动后果，实现规划，与 LLM 不同。

keyPoints.en: LLMs are limited to tokenized data; real world is continuous and high-dimensional.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 局限于离散数据；真实世界是连续且高维的。

keyPoints.en: Healthcare needs reliable AI; LLMs fail in high-stakes planning tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 医疗需要可靠 AI；LLM 在高风险规划任务中失败。

keyPoints.en: World models will amplify doctors, not replace them, acting as smart assistants.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型将增强医生而非取代他们，充当智能助手。

keyPoints.en: Building a universal world model will take years, but narrow use cases sooner.
keyPoints.zh: 构建通用世界模型需要数年，但窄用例更快实现。

contrarian.en: Language is the easy part; physical world understanding is much harder.
contrarian.zh: 语言是容易的部分；理解物理世界要难得多。

contrarian.en: A four-year-old's visual data equals all public text on the internet.
contrarian.zh: 四岁儿童的视觉数据相当于互联网上所有公开文本。

contrarian.en: LLMs are like Broca's area; they generate text but don't think.
contrarian.zh: LLM 像布罗卡区；它们生成文本但不思考。

contrarian.en: 80% accuracy in healthcare is useless; physicians ignore unreliable tools.
contrarian.zh: 医疗中 80%准确率无用；医生会忽略不可靠的工具。

contrarian.en: Medical coding requires reasoning with guidelines, not just pattern matching.
contrarian.zh: 医疗编码需要结合指南推理，而不仅仅是模式匹配。

contrarian.en: Discrete thresholds like A1C below 7 are arbitrary; world models enable personalized optimization.
contrarian.zh: 像 A1C 低于 7 这样的离散阈值是武断的；世界模型实现个性化优化。

episodes.tEn: Is AI a Bubble? Mustafa Suleyman on Superintelligence and Microsoft's Strategy
episodes.tZh: AI 是泡沫吗？穆斯塔法·苏莱曼谈超级智能与微软战略
episodes.sEn: Mustafa Suleyman, CEO of Microsoft AI, discusses AI spending, the race for superintelligence, and why he believes there will be billions of digital minds.
episodes.sZh: 微软 AI 首席执行官穆斯塔法·苏莱曼讨论 AI 支出、超级智能竞赛，以及为何他认为未来将有数十亿数字思维。
secs: Risk of a big accident in the AI race
Maltbook: a social network for AIs
Artificial Capable Intelligence and Modern Turing Test
