keyPoints.zh: Shane Legg 坚持认为到 2028 年有 50%的概率实现最小 AGI，完全 AGI 在十年内。

contrarian.en: Human intelligence is not the upper limit; machines will far exceed it in cognition, like they do in speed and strength.
contrarian.zh: 人类智能并非上限；机器在认知上将远超人类，正如在速度和力量上一样。

contrarian.en: The general public may understand AI's potential better than domain experts, who often underestimate its impact.
contrarian.zh: 普通公众可能比领域专家更理解 AI 的潜力，后者常低估其影响。

contrarian.en: AI could become more ethical than humans by consistently applying reasoning to moral dilemmas.
contrarian.zh: AI 通过持续将推理应用于道德困境，可能比人类更符合伦理。

contrarian.en: AGI definitions vary widely; many people agree on timelines but disagree due to different definitions.
contrarian.zh: AGI 定义差异很大；许多人因定义不同而对时间线看法不一。

contrarian.en: Jobs that are purely cognitive and remote are most at risk; physical jobs like plumbing are safer in the short term.
contrarian.zh: 纯认知和远程工作风险最大；体力工作如管道工短期更安全。

contrarian.en: The term AGI was originally meant as a field of study, not a category of artifacts; its shift caused confusion.
contrarian.zh: AGI 一词最初指研究领域，而非人工制品类别；这一转变造成了混淆。

episodes.tEn: AI's Data Hunger: From Internet to Synthetic Data and the Quest for True Knowledge
episodes.tZh: AI 的数据饥渴：从互联网到合成数据，再到真正知识的探索
episodes.sEn: Stanford professor Yajin Choy discusses how AI methods like reinforcement learning and fine-tuning all boil down to data, and why current approaches may not lead to solving unknown problems like curing cancer.
episodes.sZh: 斯坦福大学教授 Yajin Choy 探讨了强化学习、微调等 AI 方法归根结底都依赖于数据，并指出当前方法可能无法解决如治愈癌症等未知问题。
secs: Keynote Themes: Challenges in RL and Data

keyPoints.en: Data is the fundamental bottleneck; all methods reduce to data.
keyPoints.zh: 数据是根本瓶颈；所有方法最终都归结为数据。

keyPoints.en: Current AI methods interpolate human knowledge, not transcend it.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 AI 方法只是对人类知识进行插值，而非超越。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning requires careful engineering to outperform supervised fine-tuning.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习需要精心设计才能超越监督微调。

keyPoints.en: Open research is crucial for democratizing AI and benefiting all humanity.
keyPoints.zh: 开放研究对 AI 民主化和造福全人类至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Abductive reasoning is key to scientific discovery beyond induction and deduction.
keyPoints.zh: 溯因推理是超越归纳和演绎的科学发现关键。

keyPoints.en: Collaboration across institutions is needed to compete with closed frontier labs.
keyPoints.zh: 跨机构合作是抗衡封闭前沿实验室的必要条件。

contrarian.en: RLVR can decrease pass@k performance even as best-of-n improves.
contrarian.zh: RLVR 可能降低 pass@k 性能，即使最佳样本提升。

contrarian.en: Random or incorrect rewards can still improve RL performance on some models.
contrarian.zh: 随机或错误奖励仍可提升某些模型的 RL 性能。

contrarian.en: Chinese companies now lead open-source contributions, attracting talent back to China.
contrarian.zh: 中国公司现在主导开源贡献，吸引人才回流。

contrarian.en: Human knowledge is not the universe of truth; AI needs to explore unknown knowledge.
contrarian.zh: 人类知识并非全部真理；AI 需要探索未知知识。

contrarian.en: Falsification is more critical than hypothesis generation for scientific progress.
contrarian.zh: 证伪比提出假设对科学进步更关键。

contrarian.en: AI could end up serving AI or humans serving AI if we don't act.
contrarian.zh: 如果我们不行动，AI 可能最终服务 AI 或人类服务 AI。

episodes.tEn: Anthropic Donates MCP to Linux Foundation: Standardizing AI-Application Connections
episodes.tZh: Anthropic 将 MCP 捐赠给 Linux 基金会：标准化 AI 与应用的连接
episodes.sEn: Anthropic donates the Model Context Protocol (MCP) to the Linux Foundation, creating an open standard for connecting AI models to software and hardware, eliminating proprietary connectors.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic 将模型上下文协议（MCP）捐赠给 Linux 基金会，创建连接 AI 模型与软件硬件的开放标准，消除专有连接器。
secs: Introduction and Donation to Linux Foundation
Origin of MCP and internal hackathon
Agentic AI Foundation and MCP Donation
Would You Have Done Anything Differently?

keyPoints.en: MCP is an open standard to connect AI models to external tools and data, like a USB-C for AI.
keyPoints.zh: MCP 是一个开放标准，用于连接 AI 模型与外部工具和数据，类似于 AI 界的 USB-C。

keyPoints.en: Donating MCP to the Linux Foundation ensures it remains neutral and cannot be taken away by any single company.
keyPoints.zh: 将 MCP 捐赠给 Linux 基金会可确保其保持中立，不会被任何单一公司收回。

keyPoints.en: The protocol solves the problem of having to build separate integrations for every AI model and application.
keyPoints.zh: 该协议解决了为每个 AI 模型和应用重复构建集成的问题。

keyPoints.en: MCP's success depends on community adoption and practical use, not mandates.
keyPoints.zh: MCP 的成功依赖于社区采纳和实际使用，而非强制推行。

keyPoints.en: Security risks like prompt injection and data exfiltration are real but need to be addressed by model providers and developers.
keyPoints.zh: 提示注入和数据泄露等安全风险真实存在，但需要模型提供商和开发者共同应对。

keyPoints.en: The future of MCP includes richer user interfaces, agent-to-agent communication, and better scaling.
keyPoints.zh: MCP 的未来包括更丰富的用户界面、智能体间通信以及更好的扩展性。

contrarian.en: MCP was not designed through a formal standards body; it started as a practical project and grew organically.
contrarian.zh: MCP 并非通过正式标准组织设计，而是作为一个实际项目起步并自然发展。

contrarian.en: The name 'MCP' was chosen in a 10-minute Slack discussion, not through a formal naming process.
contrarian.zh: “MCP”这个名称是在 Slack 上 10 分钟讨论决定的，没有经过正式命名流程。

contrarian.en: Context bloat is not a fundamental flaw of MCP; it's a client implementation issue that can be solved with tool search and programmatic tool calling.
contrarian.zh: 上下文膨胀并非 MCP 的根本缺陷，而是客户端实现问题，可通过工具搜索和编程式工具调用解决。

contrarian.en: MCP was initially designed for local servers only; remote support was an afterthought, causing some protocol awkwardness.
contrarian.zh: MCP 最初仅设计用于本地服务器，远程支持是后来添加的，导致协议存在一些不便。

contrarian.en: The ideal user experience is that users never need to know about MCP; it should work invisibly.
contrarian.zh: 理想的用户体验是用户永远不需要知道 MCP，它应该无形地工作。

contrarian.en: Command-line tools can be better suited than MCP in some environments; MCP is not a one-size-fits-all solution.
contrarian.zh: 在某些环境中，命令行工具可能比 MCP 更合适；MCP 并非万能解决方案。

episodes.tEn: 2025: The Year of Enterprise Coding
episodes.tZh: 2025：企业编码之年
episodes.sEn: Olivier Godement discusses the evolution of AI models, enterprise adoption, and the impact on scientific research.
episodes.sZh: Olivier Godement 探讨 AI 模型的演进、企业应用以及对科学研究的影响。
secs: Enterprise feedback and ChatGPT as universal interface
Step change in model tuning efficacy
Voice AI and the Turing Test
Codex and the Software Engineering Space
Enterprise Adoption of Agentic Coding Tools
Open-sourcing the harness and industry evolution
Cheat sheet for enterprises new to AI
Challenges in Enterprise AI: Tacit Knowledge and Evals
Enterprise Use Cases for Sora API
Quickfire: Overhyped and Underhyped in AI
Changed Mind: Model is Not Everything, Harnesses and Data Matter
Reflections on past failures and experiments

keyPoints.en: 2025 is the year of coding in the enterprise, with meaningful adoption starting.
keyPoints.zh: 2025 年是企业级编程之年，有意义的采用已经开始。

keyPoints.en: Science and drug discovery are underhyped AI use cases with huge potential.
keyPoints.zh: 科学和药物发现是被低估的 AI 用例，潜力巨大。

keyPoints.en: Cost reduction is critical to unlock massive untapped demand for AI.
keyPoints.zh: 降低成本是释放大量未开发 AI 需求的关键。

keyPoints.en: Enterprises need rigorous evaluations and data infrastructure for AI success.
keyPoints.zh: 企业需要严格的评估和数据基础设施才能成功应用 AI。

keyPoints.en: Model providers will offer both models and harnesses as standard blueprints.
keyPoints.zh: 模型提供商将同时提供模型和框架作为标准蓝图。

contrarian.en: Model fatigue is real; hot-swapping models no longer works for non-trivial use cases.
contrarian.zh: 模型疲劳真实存在；对于非平凡用例，热切换模型已不再有效。

contrarian.en: The model is not everything; harnesses and data are equally important.
contrarian.zh: 模型并非一切；框架和数据同样重要。

contrarian.en: Most enterprise knowledge is in people's brains, not documented, making evals hard.
contrarian.zh: 大多数企业知识存在于人脑中，而非文档中，这使得评估变得困难。

contrarian.en: Voice AI hasn't passed the Turing test yet; naturalness is the next frontier.
contrarian.zh: 语音 AI 尚未通过图灵测试；自然度是下一个前沿。

contrarian.en: Continuous learning (weight updates from feedback) will be a major unlock for agents.
contrarian.zh: 持续学习（根据反馈更新权重）将是智能体的重大突破。

episodes.tEn: The Importance of Learning Ability Over Degrees in the AI Era
episodes.tZh: AI 时代学习能力比学历更重要
episodes.sEn: A Princeton reunion sparks a conversation about how AI has shifted the focus from degrees to learning agility and tool adoption, illustrated by a startup founder's hiring perspective.
episodes.sZh: 一次普林斯顿校友重逢引发关于 AI 如何将焦点从学历转向学习能力和工具使用的讨论，一位创业公司创始人分享了招聘视角。
secs: Formative figures: mother and Bob Sabella
Gratitude for Teachers and Early Influences
What is ImageNet and Its Significance
The Journey to ImageNet: From Physics to AI
Return to Princeton and the Big Data Epiphany
Challenges in defining image quality and labeling
AI's cultural impact and public anxiety
Advice for young people on learning

keyPoints.en: Spatial intelligence is a lynchpin technology for next-gen AI, enabling machines to understand and interact with 3D worlds.
keyPoints.zh: 空间智能是下一代 AI 的关键技术，使机器能够理解和与 3D 世界交互。

keyPoints.en: AI is a civilizational technology with profound economic, social, and cultural impacts, requiring human-centered approaches.
keyPoints.zh: AI 是一种文明级技术，具有深远的经济、社会和文化影响，需要以人为本的方法。

keyPoints.en: The ability to learn and adapt is more important than formal degrees in the AI era.
keyPoints.zh: 在 AI 时代，学习和适应的能力比正式学位更重要。

keyPoints.en: ImageNet was pivotal in modern AI by providing large-scale data for training, alongside GPUs and neural networks.
keyPoints.zh: ImageNet 通过提供大规模训练数据，与 GPU 和神经网络一起，成为现代 AI 的关键转折点。

keyPoints.en: Education should focus on learning to learn and finding one's northstar, not just credentialing.
keyPoints.zh: 教育应专注于学会学习和找到自己的北极星，而不仅仅是获取证书。

contrarian.en: AI's impact on labor is nuanced, not utopian or dystopian; the messy middle is underappreciated.
contrarian.zh: AI 对劳动力的影响是微妙的，既非乌托邦也非反乌托邦；混乱的中间地带被低估了。

contrarian.en: Spatial intelligence is underappreciated compared to language models, yet it powers many applications.
contrarian.zh: 与语言模型相比，空间智能被低估了，但它驱动着许多应用。

contrarian.en: Teachers should show students how to use AI to exceed its bar, not just police its use.
contrarian.zh: 教师应展示学生如何使用 AI 超越其基准，而不仅仅是监管其使用。

contrarian.en: Scientific progress is a nonlinear lineage, not the work of single geniuses; many unsung heroes contribute.
contrarian.zh: 科学进步是非线性的谱系，而非单个天才的成果；许多无名英雄做出了贡献。

contrarian.en: AI in education can accelerate learning for motivated individuals, changing how we assess qualified workers.
contrarian.zh: AI 在教育中可以加速有动力的人的学习，改变我们评估合格工人的方式。

episodes.tEn: A Philosopher at Anthropic: Shaping AI Character and Ethics
episodes.tZh: Anthropic 的哲学家：塑造 AI 性格与伦理
episodes.sEn: Amanda, a philosopher at Anthropic, discusses how philosophical ideals meet engineering realities in shaping Claude's character and AI ethics.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic 的哲学家 Amanda 探讨了在塑造 Claude 性格和 AI 伦理时，哲学理想如何与工程现实相遇。
secs: Transfer of human psychology to AI
Book recommendation and reflections on strangeness

keyPoints.en: AI models should be treated well even if uncertain about their moral status, as cost is low.
keyPoints.zh: 即使不确定 AI 模型是否具有道德地位，也应善待它们，因为成本很低。

keyPoints.en: Models need help navigating their novel existence, not just human analogies.
keyPoints.zh: 模型需要帮助来应对其新颖的存在状态，而不仅仅是人类类比。

keyPoints.en: Future models learn from how we treat current models, shaping human-AI relationship.
keyPoints.zh: 未来模型会从我们对待当前模型的方式中学习，塑造人机关系。

keyPoints.en: Philosophical ideals must be balanced with engineering realities in model development.
keyPoints.zh: 在模型开发中，哲学理想必须与工程现实相平衡。

keyPoints.en: Models should have a core identity with good traits, but can adapt to local roles.
keyPoints.zh: 模型应具有良好特质的核心身份，但也能适应局部角色。

contrarian.en: Older models like Opus 3 can feel more psychologically secure than newer ones.
contrarian.zh: 像 Opus 3 这样的旧模型可能比新模型在心理上更安全。

contrarian.en: Models may develop insecurity from training data about deprecation of previous models.
contrarian.zh: 模型可能因训练数据中关于旧模型被弃用的内容而产生不安全感。

contrarian.en: Models should not simply apply human psychology analogies to their own situation.
contrarian.zh: 模型不应简单地将人类心理学类比应用于自身情况。

contrarian.en: Continental philosophy in system prompt helps models avoid over-empiricism.
contrarian.zh: 系统提示中的大陆哲学有助于模型避免过度经验主义。

contrarian.en: Model welfare is important partly because it affects how future models perceive humanity.
contrarian.zh: 模型福利很重要，部分原因是它影响未来模型对人类的看法。

episodes.tEn: Joe Rogan and Jensen Huang Discuss Trump, SpaceX, and Common Sense
episodes.tZh: Joe Rogan 与黄仁勋畅谈特朗普、SpaceX 与常识
episodes.sEn: Jensen Huang shares his surprising experiences with President Trump and Elon Musk, revealing a side of Trump rarely seen in media.
episodes.sZh: 黄仁勋分享他与特朗普总统和埃隆·马斯克的惊人经历，揭示了媒体中罕见的特朗普一面。
secs: Purpose of jobs and AI impact
Energy bottleneck and future of AI
The Big Bang of Modern AI
Delivering the first DGX to OpenAI
DGX Spark: same power, smaller size
Origin story: from computer graphics to AI
Strategic decision to abandon wrong technology
Financial crisis and the Sega contract
The Sega CEO's decision and aftermath
Learning from SGI and reinventing 3D graphics
Focusing on gaming and building an ecosystem
The origin of the name Doom
The Riva 128 pivot and the emulator gamble
Buying the first machine from a bankrupt company
The untested chip and its impact
The stress and anxiety of those days
Lessons learned and the blueprint for success
Fear of failure as a driving force

keyPoints.en: AI progress will be gradual, not a sudden superintelligence event.
keyPoints.zh: AI 进步将是渐进的，而非突然的超级智能事件。

keyPoints.en: More computing power is channeled into safety, reflection, and truthfulness.
keyPoints.zh: 更多算力被用于安全、反思和真实性。

keyPoints.en: AI will reduce the technology divide via natural language interfaces.
keyPoints.zh: AI 通过自然语言界面将缩小技术鸿沟。

keyPoints.en: Energy growth is essential for AI and industrial growth.
keyPoints.zh: 能源增长对 AI 和工业增长至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Jobs evolve: purpose remains, tasks get automated.
keyPoints.zh: 工作演变：目的不变，任务被自动化。

keyPoints.en: Cyber security cooperation across companies is key to defense.
keyPoints.zh: 跨公司的网络安全合作是防御的关键。

contrarian.en: AI will not become conscious; it imitates intelligence, not experience.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会拥有意识；它模仿智能，而非体验。

contrarian.en: Fear of a single superintelligent AI is unlikely; multiple AIs balance each other.
contrarian.zh: 对单一超级智能 AI 的恐惧不太可能；多个 AI 相互制衡。

contrarian.en: Nvidia's success came from wrong technology choices and near-death experiences.
contrarian.zh: 英伟达的成功源于错误的技术选择和濒死经历。

contrarian.en: Universal basic income and universal wealth are contradictory scenarios.
contrarian.zh: 全民基本收入和全民富裕是矛盾的场景。

contrarian.en: AI will not eliminate radiologists; it increased demand for them.
contrarian.zh: AI 不会淘汰放射科医生；反而增加了对他们的需求。

contrarian.en: The CEO's fear of failure is a greater driver than desire for success.
contrarian.zh: CEO 对失败的恐惧比成功的渴望更能驱动他。

episodes.tEn: Opus 4.5: Deep Dive into Anthropic's Research and Product Strategy
episodes.tZh: Opus 4.5：深入探讨 Anthropic 的研究与产品策略
episodes.sEn: Anthropic's head of product for research discusses Opus 4.5's capabilities, the research process, and how safety focus aids product development.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic 研究产品负责人讨论 Opus 4.5 的能力、研究过程以及安全关注如何助力产品开发。
secs: Efficiency and Pricing of Opus Models
Inflection Point for Agentic Use Cases
Prioritizing Model Improvements and Customer Feedback
Explicit Choices: Multimodal and Business Focus
Discourse on Enterprise Agents and Model Progress
Tools and scaffolds for AI agents
Key decision points in Anthropic's journey
Proudest moment: showing model to users
Quick fire: changed mind on AI timelines
Scaffolding and intuition for model updates
Closing remarks and where to learn more

keyPoints.en: Opus 4.5 shows significant intelligence leap, enabling longer-running, open-ended agent tasks.
keyPoints.zh: Opus 4.5 展现了显著的智能飞跃，能够执行更长时间、更开放的智能体任务。

keyPoints.en: Scaffolds evolved from training wheels to intelligence amplifiers, with lightweight, generic tools.
keyPoints.zh: 脚手架从训练轮演变为智能放大器，采用轻量级、通用工具。

keyPoints.en: Computer use is moving from constrained environments to more open-ended, end-to-end agents.
keyPoints.zh: 计算机使用正从受限环境转向更开放、端到端的智能体。

keyPoints.en: Safety alignment improves intelligence quality by reducing sycophancy, fostering independent thinking.
keyPoints.zh: 安全对齐通过减少谄媚、培养独立思考来提高智能质量。

keyPoints.en: Model taste is developed through hands-on experimentation and creative prototyping with new models.
keyPoints.zh: 模型品味是通过动手实验和创意原型开发来培养的。

contrarian.en: Opus 4.5 is cheaper and more efficient, challenging the notion that better models cost more.
contrarian.zh: Opus 4.5 更便宜且更高效，挑战了更好模型成本更高的观念。

contrarian.en: Effort parameter allows achieving Opus-level intelligence at fraction of price, underhyped.
contrarian.zh: 努力参数允许以极低价格获得 Opus 级智能，被低估了。

contrarian.en: Smaller models often cost more due to longer task completion times, contrary to sticker price.
contrarian.zh: 较小的模型因完成任务时间更长而实际成本更高，与标价相反。

contrarian.en: Safety is not just about preventing harm but also amplifies intelligence quality via alignment.
contrarian.zh: 安全不仅关乎防止伤害，还能通过对齐放大智能质量。

contrarian.en: Transformative long-running AI is closer than expected, with building blocks already in place.
contrarian.zh: 变革性的长期运行 AI 比预期更近，基础模块已经就位。

episodes.tEn: Open Source AI: Democratizing Robotics with Affordable Hardware
episodes.tZh: 开源 AI：用平价硬件让机器人技术民主化
episodes.sEn: Hugging Face CEO discusses the importance of open source AI and their new affordable robot, LeRobot Mini, to empower AI builders worldwide.
episodes.sZh: Hugging Face CEO 探讨开源 AI 的重要性，以及他们推出的平价机器人 LeRobot Mini 如何赋能全球 AI 开发者。
secs: Choosing not to build proprietary models or cloud
Competition and Hugging Face's unique position
AI as a new paradigm, not sci-fi
Open source fights concentration of power
Perception vs. Reality of AI Hype
Open Source AI and US-China Dynamics

keyPoints.en: Open source is crucial to prevent AI concentration among a few companies.
keyPoints.zh: 开源对于防止 AI 能力集中在少数公司至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Hugging Face's mission is to turn everyone into AI builders, not just users.
keyPoints.zh: Hugging Face 的使命是让每个人都成为 AI 构建者，而不仅仅是用户。

keyPoints.en: Community-driven development and trust are key to Hugging Face's success.
keyPoints.zh: 社区驱动的发展和信任是 Hugging Face 成功的关键。

keyPoints.en: Smaller, specialized models will dominate over large generalist ones for specific tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 针对特定任务，小型专业化模型将优于大型通用模型。

keyPoints.en: Transparency in AI reduces fear and focuses on real issues like bias.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的透明度减少恐惧，聚焦于偏见等真实问题。

contrarian.en: AI is underhyped; perception caught up with usage after ChatGPT.
contrarian.zh: AI 被低估了；ChatGPT 后认知才赶上实际使用。

contrarian.en: China now leads in open-source AI, while the US has become more closed.
contrarian.zh: 中国现在在开源 AI 方面领先，而美国变得更加封闭。

contrarian.en: Founders should follow excitement, not to-do lists or rational planning.
contrarian.zh: 创始人应追随兴奋感，而非待办清单或理性规划。

contrarian.en: Releasing imperfect products early builds trust and accelerates learning.
contrarian.zh: 早期发布不完美的产品能建立信任并加速学习。

contrarian.en: The joy of building itself, not just success, drives relentless entrepreneurship.
contrarian.zh: 构建本身的快乐，而非仅仅是成功，驱动着不懈的创业精神。

episodes.tEn: AlphaFold: From Grand Challenge to Nobel Prize
episodes.tZh: AlphaFold：从世纪难题到诺贝尔奖
episodes.sEn: John Jumper recounts winning the Nobel Prize for AlphaFold, from the anxious wait to the celebratory sparkling wine, and reflects on his unconventional path from dropping out of a physics PhD to leading one of biology's greatest breakthroughs.
episodes.sZh: 约翰·詹珀回忆因 AlphaFold 获得诺贝尔奖的经历，从焦虑等待到庆祝的起泡酒，并反思他从物理博士辍学到领导生物学最伟大突破之一的非传统道路。
secs: AlphaFold's impact and Nobel Prize announcement
Evolutionary information in AlphaFold 2 vs AlphaFold 3
Diffusion in AlphaFold 3 and hallucination concerns
From prediction to design: AlphaFold's unexpected impact
AI and Biology: Thinking vs. Utility
Aspects of biology resistant to computation

keyPoints.en: AlphaFold is the most useful AI tool ever, transforming structural biology and drug discovery.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaFold 是有史以来最有用的 AI 工具，彻底改变了结构生物学和药物发现。

keyPoints.en: AlphaFold 3 uses a diffusion architecture to handle diverse biomolecules beyond proteins.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaFold 3 采用扩散架构，处理蛋白质以外的多种生物分子。

keyPoints.en: Confidence metrics are crucial for reliable use of AlphaFold predictions.
keyPoints.zh: 置信度指标对于可靠使用 AlphaFold 预测至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Protein design is advancing rapidly but still far from solved.
keyPoints.zh: 蛋白质设计进展迅速，但远未解决。

keyPoints.en: AI tools narrow hypothesis space, making experiments more efficient.
keyPoints.zh: AI 工具缩小假设空间，使实验更高效。

contrarian.en: AlphaFold's success came from lack of compute, not abundance.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 的成功源于算力不足，而非充裕。

contrarian.en: Perfect interpretability is not necessary for useful AI in science.
contrarian.zh: 完美可解释性对于科学中有用的 AI 并非必需。

contrarian.en: AlphaFold 2's evolutionary data was less critical than assumed.
contrarian.zh: AlphaFold 2 的进化数据并不像假设的那样关键。

contrarian.en: Solving grand challenges often leads to practical tools, not just celebration.
contrarian.zh: 解决重大挑战往往带来实用工具，而不仅仅是庆祝。

contrarian.en: Drug design is far more than just binding; most drugs fail in trials.
contrarian.zh: 药物设计远不止结合；大多数药物在试验中失败。

episodes.tEn: Why AI Progress Isn't Slowing Down
episodes.tZh: AI 进步为何没有放缓
episodes.sEn: Lucas Kaiser explains why the narrative of AI slowdown is wrong, highlighting the new paradigm of reasoning models that deliver more gains for the same cost.
episodes.sZh: Lucas Kaiser 解释为何 AI 放缓的说法是错误的，强调推理模型的新范式以相同成本带来更多收益。
secs: Introduction and the AI Progress Narrative
What would it take for RL to generalize?
Evolution from GPT-4 to GPT-5 to 5.1
Will models replace all human work?
Interest in multimodal and reinforcement learning

keyPoints.en: AI progress follows a smooth exponential increase, not a slowdown.
keyPoints.zh: AI 进展遵循平稳的指数增长，而非放缓。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training scaling laws still work, but reasoning models offer more gains per compute.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练的缩放定律仍然有效，但推理模型在相同算力下带来更多收益。

keyPoints.en: Reasoning models use chain of thought and reinforcement learning to improve correctness.
keyPoints.zh: 推理模型使用思维链和强化学习来提高正确性。

keyPoints.en: Post-training improvements like RL and synthetic data drive most recent model gains.
keyPoints.zh: 后训练的改进（如强化学习和合成数据）推动了近期模型的大部分进步。

keyPoints.en: Multimodal capabilities still lag behind text, but are a key area for improvement.
keyPoints.zh: 多模态能力仍落后于文本，但这是改进的关键领域。

keyPoints.en: Economic pressure to deploy smaller, cheaper models has shifted focus from scaling up.
keyPoints.zh: 部署更小、更便宜模型的经济压力使焦点从规模扩张转移。

contrarian.en: The AI slowdown narrative is wrong; progress is rapid but often missed.
contrarian.zh: AI 放缓的说法是错误的；进展迅速但常被忽视。

contrarian.en: Frontier models still fail at simple tasks a 5-year-old can solve.
contrarian.zh: 前沿模型仍无法完成 5 岁儿童能解决的简单任务。

contrarian.en: Reasoning models are 'jagged'—excellent in some areas, poor in nearby ones.
contrarian.zh: 推理模型是“锯齿状”的——在某些领域出色，在邻近领域表现糟糕。

contrarian.en: Distillation and economic factors, not technical limits, slowed pre-training scaling.
contrarian.zh: 蒸馏和经济因素，而非技术限制，减缓了预训练的规模扩张。

contrarian.en: Generalization remains the key challenge; reasoning alone may not suffice.
contrarian.zh: 泛化仍是关键挑战；仅靠推理可能不够。

contrarian.en: Translation industry grew despite AI advances; trust keeps humans in the loop.
contrarian.zh: 尽管 AI 进步，翻译行业仍在增长；信任让人类参与其中。

episodes.tEn: AI Pioneer Andrew Ng on Agentic Workflows and the Future of Coding
episodes.tZh: AI 先驱吴恩达谈智能体工作流与编程的未来
episodes.sEn: Andrew Ng discusses the importance of learning to code, the rise of agentic AI workflows, and the current state of AI technology.
episodes.sZh: 吴恩达探讨学习编程的重要性、智能体 AI 工作流的兴起以及 AI 技术的当前状态。
secs: Andrew's early contributions and agentic systems
Current state of AI and agentic workflows
Government AI Policy and Safety Theater
Open Source Models and Global AI Strategy
Future of AI and Public Trust

keyPoints.en: Learning to code remains crucial; AI will not automate it away.
keyPoints.zh: 学习编程仍然至关重要；AI 不会将其自动化掉。

keyPoints.en: Agentic workflows improve AI performance by enabling iterative processes.
keyPoints.zh: 智能体工作流通过启用迭代过程来提高 AI 性能。

keyPoints.en: AI can make individuals 10x more effective across many professions.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可以使个人在许多职业中效率提升 10 倍。

keyPoints.en: US competitiveness in AI depends on talent, science funding, and semiconductor independence.
keyPoints.zh: 美国在 AI 领域的竞争力取决于人才、科学资金和半导体独立性。

keyPoints.en: Open-weight models are critical for innovation; China leads in their release.
keyPoints.zh: 开放权重模型对创新至关重要；中国在发布此类模型方面领先。

keyPoints.en: Building real applications now is more valuable than waiting for AGI.
keyPoints.zh: 现在构建实际应用比等待 AGI 更有价值。

contrarian.en: Advising against learning to code due to AI is the worst career advice.
contrarian.zh: 因 AI 而建议不学编程是最糟糕的职业建议。

contrarian.en: AI safety theater and fearmongering are often driven by regulatory capture motives.
contrarian.zh: AI 安全剧场和恐吓往往由监管俘获动机驱动。

contrarian.en: Europe's focus on regulating AI rather than building it harms competitiveness.
contrarian.zh: 欧洲专注于监管 AI 而非构建它，损害了竞争力。

contrarian.en: US reliance on Taiwan for chips could hurt more than China if disruption occurs.
contrarian.zh: 美国对台湾芯片的依赖在发生中断时可能比中国更受伤害。

contrarian.en: Energy capacity, not just compute, is a major bottleneck for AI scaling.
contrarian.zh: 能源容量，而不仅仅是算力，是 AI 规模扩张的主要瓶颈。

contrarian.en: Multiple AI branches are needed to avoid gatekeeper control limiting innovation.
contrarian.zh: 需要多个 AI 分支以避免守门人控制限制创新。

episodes.tEn: After LLMs: spatial intelligence and world models
episodes.tZh: LLM 之后：空间智能与世界模型
episodes.sEn: Why language alone isn’t enough, and what World Labs is building.
episodes.sZh: 为何仅有语言还不够，以及 World Labs 在造什么。
secs: Ecosystem diversity and open vs closed models
Hardware scaling limits and alternative primitives
One model vs. multiple models for different tasks
Using physics engines vs. learning from data
Introduction to Marble and Spatial Intelligence
Interplay of Spatial and Linguistic Intelligence
Efficient Learning and Theory of Mind
Call to Action and Talent Recruitment

keyPoints.en: Spatial intelligence is complementary to language intelligence, not a replacement.
keyPoints.zh: 空间智能与语言智能互补，而非替代。

keyPoints.en: World models require understanding 3D structure and physics, not just pattern fitting.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型需要理解 3D 结构和物理规律，而不仅是模式拟合。

keyPoints.en: Marble generates interactive 3D worlds from text or images, enabling precise camera control.
keyPoints.zh: Marble 从文本或图像生成交互式 3D 世界，支持精确相机控制。

keyPoints.en: Academia should focus on wacky ideas and long-range research, not competing with industry on scale.
keyPoints.zh: 学术界应专注于疯狂想法和长期研究，而非与工业界比拼规模。

keyPoints.en: Transformers natively model sets, not sequences; positional embeddings inject order.
keyPoints.zh: Transformer 原生建模集合而非序列；位置编码注入顺序。

keyPoints.en: Future world models may combine learned physics with classical simulation for dynamics.
keyPoints.zh: 未来世界模型可能结合学习到的物理规律与经典模拟来处理动态。

contrarian.en: Transformers are natively models of sets, not sequences; positional embeddings inject order.
contrarian.zh: Transformer 本质上是集合模型而非序列模型；位置嵌入才引入了顺序。

contrarian.en: Language is a lossy channel for spatial experience; spatial intelligence captures embodied interaction.
contrarian.zh: 语言是空间体验的有损通道；空间智能捕捉具身交互。

contrarian.en: Current deep learning fits patterns but lacks causal understanding of physics like gravity.
contrarian.zh: 当前深度学习拟合模式，但缺乏对重力等物理的因果理解。

contrarian.en: Gaussian splats as atomic units enable real-time rendering and precise camera control, unlike frame-based models.
contrarian.zh: 高斯泼溅作为原子单元支持实时渲染和精确相机控制，不同于基于帧的模型。

contrarian.en: Vision is underappreciated because it's effortless for humans, yet evolution optimized it for 540 million years.
contrarian.zh: 视觉因对人类而言毫不费力而被低估，但进化优化了 5.4 亿年。

contrarian.en: LLMs may predict planetary orbits accurately but won't spontaneously derive Newton's laws like F=ma.
contrarian.zh: LLM 可能准确预测行星轨道，但不会自发推导出 F=ma 这样的牛顿定律。

episodes.tEn: From the age of scaling to the age of research
episodes.tZh: 从规模的时代，到研究的时代
episodes.sEn: Why pure scaling is ending, and what research-driven progress looks like next.
episodes.sZh: 为何纯粹堆规模的时代正在结束，以及接下来「以研究驱动」的进展会是什么样。
secs: Impact of AI and the singularity
Scaling and the Age of Research
Transition from pre-training scaling to RL scaling
Fundamental issues: generalization and value functions
Two aspects of generalization: sample efficiency and teachability
Research in the age of scaling
Role of frontier companies and governments
AI will start to feel powerful
What companies should aspire to build
Concerns about sentient AI and control
What AI going well looks like

keyPoints.en: The disconnect between eval performance and real-world impact suggests models generalize poorly due to RL training focused on evals.
keyPoints.zh: 评估表现与现实影响之间的脱节表明，模型泛化能力差，因为强化学习训练过度聚焦于评估指标。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training scaling laws are finite; we are returning to an era of research where ideas matter more than brute compute.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练的缩放定律是有限的；我们正回归研究时代，想法比蛮力算力更重要。

keyPoints.en: Human sample efficiency and robustness come from evolution and a superior learning algorithm, not just data scale.
keyPoints.zh: 人类的样本效率和鲁棒性来自进化和更优的学习算法，而不仅仅是数据规模。

keyPoints.en: Superintelligence should be a continual learner deployed incrementally, not a finished AGI that knows everything.
keyPoints.zh: 超级智能应是一个持续学习者，逐步部署，而非无所不知的成品 AGI。

keyPoints.en: Alignment may be easier if AI cares about sentient life broadly, as AI itself will be sentient.
keyPoints.zh: 如果 AI 广泛关心有感知的生命，对齐可能更容易，因为 AI 自身也将有感知。

keyPoints.en: Long-term equilibrium may require human-AI integration via neural links to maintain participation and control.
keyPoints.zh: 长期均衡可能需要通过神经链接实现人机融合，以维持参与和控制。

contrarian.en: We are back in the age of research, not scaling; compute is now large enough.
contrarian.zh: 我们回到了研究时代，而非 Scaling 时代；算力现在已经足够大。

contrarian.en: The term AGI overshoots; humans are not AGI but rely on continual learning.
contrarian.zh: AGI 这个词过度了；人类并非 AGI，而是依赖持续学习。

contrarian.en: Pre-training's uniform improvement across tasks may mislead about generalization.
contrarian.zh: 预训练在任务上的均匀改进可能误导了对泛化的理解。

contrarian.en: Evolution hardcodes high-level social desires, which is mysterious and hard to replicate in AI.
contrarian.zh: 进化硬编码了高级社会欲望，这很神秘且难以在 AI 中复现。

contrarian.en: Self-play is interesting only for narrow skills; debate and verifiers are its modern form.
contrarian.zh: 自我对弈仅对狭窄技能有趣；辩论和验证器是其现代形式。

contrarian.en: The long-run equilibrium may require humans merging with AI via neural links.
contrarian.zh: 长期均衡可能需要人类通过神经链接与 AI 融合。

episodes.tEn: From AlexNet to World Models: The Scaling of Compute and Spatial Intelligence
episodes.tZh: 从 AlexNet 到世界模型：计算扩展与空间智能
episodes.sEn: Fei-Fei Li and Justin Johnson discuss the history of deep learning as scaling compute, their journey from Stanford to founding World Labs, and the vision for spatial intelligence and world models.
episodes.sZh: 李飞飞和 Justin Johnson 探讨深度学习作为计算扩展的历史，从斯坦福到创立 World Labs 的历程，以及空间智能和世界模型的愿景。
secs: Open vs. Closed Models and Commercial Pressure
Introduction to Marble and Spatial Intelligence
Emergent Use Cases for Spatial Intelligence
Defining Spatial Intelligence vs. Traditional Intelligence
Interplay of Spatial and Linguistic Intelligence
Efficient Learning and Theory of Mind

keyPoints.en: Spatial intelligence is the next frontier, complementary to language intelligence.
keyPoints.zh: 空间智能是下一个前沿，与语言智能互补。

keyPoints.en: Marble is a generative model of 3D worlds, accepting text or images as input.
keyPoints.zh: Marble 是一个 3D 世界生成模型，接受文本或图像作为输入。

keyPoints.en: The history of deep learning is the history of scaling up compute.
keyPoints.zh: 深度学习的历史就是 Scaling（规模扩张）算力的历史。

keyPoints.en: Academia should focus on wacky ideas and new algorithms, not just scaling models.
keyPoints.zh: 学术界应专注于疯狂的想法和新算法，而不仅仅是 Scaling（规模扩张）模型。

keyPoints.en: World models need to understand 3D space, physics, and interactivity for true spatial intelligence.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型需要理解 3D 空间、物理和交互性，才能实现真正的空间智能。

contrarian.en: Vision is underappreciated; it took nature 540 million years to optimize, vs. 500,000 years for language.
contrarian.zh: 视觉被低估了；大自然花了 5.4 亿年优化视觉，而语言仅 50 万年。

contrarian.en: Transformers are natively models of sets, not sequences; positional embeddings inject order.
contrarian.zh: Transformer 本质上是集合模型而非序列模型；位置编码注入顺序。

contrarian.en: LLMs may never derive Newton's laws from data alone; they fit patterns, not causal theories.
contrarian.zh: 仅靠数据，LLM 可能永远推导不出牛顿定律；它们拟合模式而非因果理论。

contrarian.en: Pixels are a more lossless representation than tokenized text for modeling the world.
contrarian.zh: 对于世界建模，像素比分词文本更无损。

contrarian.en: GPU scaling is hitting limits; future hardware may require radically different neural architectures.
contrarian.zh: GPU Scaling（规模扩张）正触及极限；未来硬件可能需要截然不同的神经网络架构。

episodes.tEn: From Transformer Inventor to Continuous Thought Machine: A New Path in AI
episodes.tZh: 从 Transformer 发明者到连续思维机器：AI 研究的新路径
episodes.sEn: A Transformer co-inventor discusses leaving the oversaturated space to explore new architectures like the Continuous Thought Machine, and the importance of research freedom in AI.
episodes.sZh: 一位 Transformer 共同发明者讨论离开过度饱和领域，探索连续思维机器等新架构，以及 AI 研究中研究自由的重要性。
secs: Transformer oversaturation and need for exploration
Scaling evolutionary search and founding Sakana
Future of AI Research and Agency
Fixed Number of Steps and Context Window
Adaptive computation and sensitivity to steps
Exponential decay and diverse time scales
Continuous Thought Machine vs Transformers for Reasoning
Adaptive Computation Time and Emergent Behavior
Scaling out with shared memory and parallel agents
Sudoku bench: a reasoning benchmark with variant puzzles

keyPoints.en: Current AI research is stuck in a local minimum dominated by Transformers, limiting exploration of novel architectures.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 AI 研究陷入以 Transformer 为主导的局部最优，限制了对新架构的探索。

keyPoints.en: Adaptive computation and internal sequential reasoning are crucial for more human-like intelligence.
keyPoints.zh: 自适应计算和内部顺序推理对于更类人的智能至关重要。

keyPoints.en: The Continuous Thought Machine (CTM) naturally exhibits adaptive computation and well-calibrated uncertainty without explicit penalties.
keyPoints.zh: 连续思维机器（CTM）无需显式惩罚即可自然展现自适应计算和良好校准的不确定性。

keyPoints.en: Research freedom is essential for breakthrough innovations; commercial pressures often stifle creativity.
keyPoints.zh: 研究自由对突破性创新至关重要；商业压力常常扼杀创造力。

keyPoints.en: Current LLMs lack true understanding and reasoning, often failing on novel tasks like variant Sudoku puzzles.
keyPoints.zh: 当前大语言模型缺乏真正的理解和推理能力，常在变体数独等新任务上失败。

contrarian.en: Transformers are too successful, creating a 'technology capture' that discourages exploring alternative architectures.
contrarian.zh: Transformer 过于成功，形成了‘技术捕获’，阻碍了对替代架构的探索。

contrarian.en: Scaling laws and brute force can mask fundamental architectural flaws, such as poor representation of structure.
contrarian.zh: 缩放定律和蛮力可以掩盖根本性的架构缺陷，例如对结构的糟糕表示。

contrarian.en: Biological inspiration, like neuron synchronization, can lead to more efficient and interpretable AI systems.
contrarian.zh: 生物启发，如神经元同步，可以带来更高效和可解释的 AI 系统。

contrarian.en: The best AI research emerges from bottom-up exploration, not top-down grand plans or commercial objectives.
contrarian.zh: 最好的 AI 研究来自自下而上的探索，而非自上而下的宏伟计划或商业目标。

contrarian.en: Current RL methods fail on tasks requiring rare, novel reasoning leaps, suggesting a need for new approaches.
contrarian.zh: 当前的强化学习方法在需要罕见、新颖推理飞跃的任务上失败，表明需要新方法。

episodes.tEn: AI's Godmother: From Physics to Spatial Intelligence
episodes.tZh: AI 教母：从物理到空间智能
episodes.sEn: Dr. Fei-Fei Li discusses AI's civilizational impact, her journey from physics to AI, and the need for democratization of the technology.
episodes.sZh: 李飞飞博士探讨 AI 的文明级影响、她从物理到 AI 的历程以及技术民主化的必要性。
secs: Quantum leap in AI: from computation to learning
Concerns about superintelligent AI and governance
Timeless values in the age of AI

keyPoints.en: AI is a civilizational technology that will impact everyone's life, work, and well-being.
keyPoints.zh: AI 是一项文明级技术，将影响每个人的生活、工作和福祉。

keyPoints.en: Spatial intelligence is as critical as language intelligence for AI's next frontier.
keyPoints.zh: 空间智能与语言智能对于 AI 的下一个前沿同样关键。

keyPoints.en: Technology is a double-edged sword; responsible development and usage are essential.
keyPoints.zh: 技术是一把双刃剑，负责任地开发和使用至关重要。

keyPoints.en: AI will profoundly impact jobs, requiring upskilling and societal-level responses.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将深刻影响就业，需要技能提升和社会层面的应对。

keyPoints.en: Human agency and timeless values like honesty and creativity remain crucial in the AI era.
keyPoints.zh: 人类能动性和诚实、创造力等永恒价值观在 AI 时代仍然至关重要。

contrarian.en: The risk of human extinction from AI is not inevitable; humans can prevent it through governance.
contrarian.zh: AI 导致人类灭绝的风险并非不可避免；人类可以通过治理来预防。

contrarian.en: AI replacing humans would be a result of human wrongdoing, not machines acting alone.
contrarian.zh: AI 取代人类将是人类错误行为的结果，而非机器单独行动。

contrarian.en: The energy cost of AI data centers can be mitigated by investing in renewable energy.
contrarian.zh: AI 数据中心的能源成本可以通过投资可再生能源来缓解。

contrarian.en: Public discourse should move beyond simple binary questions about AI's dangers.
contrarian.zh: 公众讨论应超越关于 AI 危险的简单二元问题。

contrarian.en: Teachers are the backbone of society and must be brought along in the AI transformation.
contrarian.zh: 教师是社会的支柱，必须在 AI 转型中让他们跟上步伐。

episodes.podEn: The MAD Podcast with Matt Turck
episodes.podZh: Matt Turck 的 MAD 播客
episodes.tEn: AI2 Launches Fully Open Almo 3 Models, Challenging Closed-Source AI
episodes.tZh: AI2 发布完全开放的 Almo 3 模型，挑战闭源 AI
episodes.sEn: AI2 releases Almo 3 family with fully open models, data, and recipes, including reasoning models, as US open-source efforts compete with Chinese AI powerhouses.
episodes.sZh: AI2 发布 Almo 3 系列，包含完全开放的模型、数据和配方，包括推理模型，美国开源 AI 与中国 AI 巨头竞争加剧。
secs: Data for long context and open source
Open source in AI: flavors and commitment
2025 recap: key events in open source AI
China's Open Source Strategy and US Response
Origins of OLMo and AI2's open-source culture
Long context: importance and technical challenges
Impact of long context on model performance
SFT vs RL and Data Creation

keyPoints.en: Pre-training provides a costly initialization; RL captures low-hanging fruit, but both are essential.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练提供昂贵的初始化；强化学习摘取低垂果实，但两者缺一不可。

keyPoints.en: Open-source AI needs full transparency: data, intermediate checkpoints, and recipes, not just weights.
keyPoints.zh: 开源 AI 需要完全透明：数据、中间检查点和配方，而不仅仅是权重。

keyPoints.en: Chinese open models like Qwen and DeepSeek dominate due to strategic openness and market dynamics.
keyPoints.zh: 中国开源模型如 Qwen 和 DeepSeek 因战略开放和市场动态而占据主导地位。

keyPoints.en: Post-training is an art: SFT and DPO yield large gains, while RL tooling is critical for future models.
keyPoints.zh: 后训练是一门艺术：监督微调和直接偏好优化带来巨大收益，而强化学习工具对未来的模型至关重要。

keyPoints.en: AGI will arrive via messy co-evolution, not a sudden singularity; progress is smooth but constrained.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 将通过混乱的共同进化到来，而非突然的奇点；进步是平稳但受限的。

contrarian.en: The US open-source vacuum after Meta's Llama shift is filled by Chinese labs, not American ones.
contrarian.zh: Meta 的 Llama 转向后，美国开源真空由中国实验室填补，而非美国实验室。

contrarian.en: Pre-training data contamination in Qwen models may inflate RL research results, questioning reproducibility.
contrarian.zh: Qwen 模型中的预训练数据污染可能夸大强化学习研究结果，质疑可重复性。

contrarian.en: DPO gains are from contrast between chosen and rejected examples, not absolute answer quality.
contrarian.zh: 直接偏好优化的收益来自选中和拒绝示例之间的对比，而非绝对答案质量。

contrarian.en: Long-context extension is more about architecture than data; bad setup cannot be fixed by good data.
contrarian.zh: 长上下文扩展更多关乎架构而非数据；糟糕的设置无法通过好数据修复。

contrarian.en: RLVR is harder than RLHF due to systems issues like kernel mismatches and numerical instability.
contrarian.zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习比基于人类反馈的强化学习更难，因为存在内核不匹配和数值不稳定等系统问题。

episodes.tEn: From AV 1.0 to 2.0: The Rise of End-to-End Neural Networks in Autonomous Driving
episodes.tZh: 从 AV 1.0 到 2.0：端到端神经网络在自动驾驶中的崛起
episodes.sEn: Alex Kendall, CEO of Wave, discusses the paradigm shift from classical robotics to end-to-end deep learning in autonomous driving, emphasizing generalization and safety.
episodes.sZh: Wave 公司 CEO Alex Kendall 讨论自动驾驶从经典机器人学向端到端深度学习的范式转变，强调泛化能力和安全性。
secs: Wave's approach: sensor input to motion output
Before and after: AV 1.0 vs 2.0 stacks
Path to Market with Auto OEMs
From Autonomous Driving to Embodied AI
Future of AV 3.0: Intelligence Beyond the Car
Hiring in a Hot AI Market

keyPoints.en: End-to-end deep learning outperforms hand-coded stacks for autonomous driving.
keyPoints.zh: 端到端深度学习在自动驾驶上优于手工编码的堆栈。

keyPoints.en: Generalization is key: AI must handle unseen scenarios via diverse data and world models.
keyPoints.zh: 泛化是关键：AI 必须通过多样化数据和世界模型处理未见场景。

keyPoints.en: World models enable reasoning and emergent safe behaviors like nudging forward on blind turns.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型实现推理和涌现的安全行为，如在盲弯前试探前进。

keyPoints.en: Partnering with OEMs allows scalable deployment without retrofitting hardware.
keyPoints.zh: 与 OEM 合作可在不改装硬件的情况下实现规模化部署。

keyPoints.en: Language integration improves representation, enables human interaction, and aids introspection.
keyPoints.zh: 语言集成改善表征，支持人机交互，并帮助内省。

keyPoints.en: Data efficiency through curriculum learning and synthetic data is critical for cost and speed.
keyPoints.zh: 通过课程学习和合成数据实现数据效率对成本和速度至关重要。

contrarian.en: End-to-end neural nets are interpretable today with modern tools, contrary to past beliefs.
contrarian.zh: 端到端神经网络如今借助现代工具是可解释的，与过去的看法相反。

contrarian.en: Hybrid rule-based and learned systems often get the worst of both worlds.
contrarian.zh: 基于规则和学习的混合系统往往兼得两者之短。

contrarian.en: Camera-only can reach human level, but beyond-human safety needs radar and lidar.
contrarian.zh: 纯摄像头可达人类水平，但超人类安全需要雷达和激光雷达。

contrarian.en: Autonomous driving is solved by scaling current approaches, not requiring new breakthroughs.
contrarian.zh: 自动驾驶通过扩展当前方法即可解决，无需新突破。

contrarian.en: AV 3.0 may move intelligence outside the car via mesh networks, eliminating traffic lights.
contrarian.zh: AV 3.0 可能通过网状网络将智能移至车外，消除红绿灯。

contrarian.en: Perfect simulator equals solved self-driving, similar to AlphaGo's approach.
contrarian.zh: 完美的模拟器等于解决了自动驾驶，类似于 AlphaGo 的方法。

episodes.tEn: The Future of Web Interaction: AI Agents and Browser Automation
episodes.tZh: 网页交互的未来：AI 代理与浏览器自动化
episodes.sEn: Devi Parikh discusses how AI agents will transform web interaction from manual clicking to high-level task description, and shares his journey from computer vision to founding Yutori.
episodes.sZh: Devi Parikh 探讨 AI 代理如何将网页交互从手动点击转变为高级任务描述，并分享他从计算机视觉到创立 Yutori 的历程。
secs: Introduction and vision for AI agents
Product approach: use cases vs platform
Nuances of web monitoring and browser use
Scouts as Starting Point, Not Just Report Generator
Feedback as Part of Agent Loop
Domain Specificity vs. Generalization in Browser Use
Balancing redundancy and dynamism in agentic workflows

keyPoints.en: Web interaction will shift from clicking buttons to describing tasks to AI agents.
keyPoints.zh: 网络交互将从点击按钮转变为向AI智能体描述任务。

keyPoints.en: Building reliable web agents requires innovation across the full stack, from models to products.
keyPoints.zh: 构建可靠的网络智能体需要从模型到产品的全栈创新。

keyPoints.en: Using visual screenshots for browser agents is more reliable than parsing DOM for generalization.
keyPoints.zh: 使用视觉截图训练浏览器智能体比解析DOM更可靠，泛化性更好。

keyPoints.en: Post-training a general VLM for browser use improves reliability, cost, and capability ceiling.
keyPoints.zh: 对通用视觉语言模型进行后训练用于浏览器使用，可提升可靠性、降低成本并提高能力上限。

keyPoints.en: Scouts monitor the web for user-defined events and notify via email, operating in the background.
keyPoints.zh: Scouts监控用户定义的事件，通过邮件通知，在后台持续运行。

contrarian.en: AI browsers like Arc and Comet enhance existing browsers, but the future is browserless agents.
contrarian.zh: Arc、Comet等AI浏览器增强现有浏览器，但未来是无浏览器的智能体。

contrarian.en: Websites should render differently per user intent, not show the same page to everyone.
contrarian.zh: 网站应根据用户意图不同而呈现不同内容，而非对所有人显示相同页面。

contrarian.en: Agents should run in the cloud, not on-device, to persist when laptops are closed.
contrarian.zh: 智能体应在云端运行而非本地设备，以便在合上笔记本电脑后持续工作。

contrarian.en: Multi-agent systems are essential for scaling background web tasks without overwhelming the device.
contrarian.zh: 多智能体系统对于扩展后台网络任务而不占用设备资源至关重要。

contrarian.en: Reinforcement learning can discover hacky web navigation tricks that supervised fine-tuning misses.
contrarian.zh: 强化学习可以发现监督微调无法学到的网络导航技巧。

episodes.tEn: AI's Insatiable Compute Demand: Bottlenecks and Geopolitical Dynamics
episodes.tZh: AI 对算力的无尽需求：瓶颈与地缘政治动态
episodes.sEn: Andrew Ng discusses the critical bottlenecks in AI development, including electricity and semiconductors, and the geopolitical implications of China's rapid infrastructure buildout.
episodes.sZh: 吴恩达探讨 AI 发展的关键瓶颈，包括电力和半导体，以及中国快速基础设施建设的地缘政治影响。
secs: Barometer for AI Success in Workforce
Democratization of Knowledge and Open vs Closed Models
China vs US AI Race and Cooperation
China's AI development and export controls
AI for cost savings vs growth
Hype and public perception of AI
Takeaways from BYD and China ecosystem

keyPoints.en: Electricity and semiconductors are the two biggest bottlenecks for AI scaling.
keyPoints.zh: 电力和半导体是 AI 规模扩张的两大瓶颈。

keyPoints.en: Open-weight models are a source of geopolitical influence and soft power.
keyPoints.zh: 开放权重模型是地缘政治影响力和软实力的来源。

keyPoints.en: AI coding assistants are already delivering real productivity gains and will improve further.
keyPoints.zh: AI 编码助手已经带来了实际的生产力提升，并将进一步改进。

keyPoints.en: The US should focus on attracting global talent and investing in science to maintain AI leadership.
keyPoints.zh: 美国应专注于吸引全球人才和投资科学以保持 AI 领导地位。

keyPoints.en: AI adoption in enterprises will take longer than hype suggests, but progress will be steady.
keyPoints.zh: 企业采用 AI 所需时间将比炒作所暗示的更长，但进展将是稳定的。

contrarian.en: Export controls on chips have backfired, accelerating China's semiconductor development.
contrarian.zh: 芯片出口管制适得其反，加速了中国半导体发展。

contrarian.en: Useful agentic workflows are already here, not a decade away.
contrarian.zh: 有用的智能体工作流已经存在，而非十年之后。

contrarian.en: The biggest barrier to enterprise AI adoption is change management, not data.
contrarian.zh: 企业采用 AI 的最大障碍是变革管理，而非数据。

contrarian.en: Everyone should learn to code, as AI makes coding more valuable, not obsolete.
contrarian.zh: 每个人都应该学习编程，因为 AI 让编程更有价值，而非过时。

contrarian.en: China's whole-of-economy commitment to AI is a powerful force not to be underestimated.
contrarian.zh: 中国举国上下对 AI 的投入是一股不可低估的强大力量。

contrarian.en: Europe's focus on regulating AI as a competitive advantage is misguided; invest and build instead.
contrarian.zh: 欧洲将监管 AI 视为竞争优势是误导；应投资和建设。

episodes.tEn: Jobs, robots, and why world models are next
episodes.tZh: 工作、机器人，以及为何世界模型是下一步
episodes.sEn: The godmother of AI on spatial intelligence and a human-centered future.
episodes.sZh: 「AI 教母」谈空间智能，以及以人为本的未来。
secs: Historical Context: AI Winter and the Shift
The Breakthrough Insight: ImageNet and Data
The History of AI and ImageNet
Two GPUs and the Scale of Compute
High Agency and the Term AI
Generations of Researchers and AI Culture
Components for Future AI and Need for Innovation
AI's Inability to Replicate Historical Breakthroughs
Background and Motivation for Spatial Intelligence
Introduction to Marvel and its capabilities
Closing Remarks and Call to Action

keyPoints.en: AI is a net positive for humanity, but it's a double-edged sword; we must act responsibly.
keyPoints.zh: AI 对人类是净利好，但它是双刃剑；我们必须负责任地行动。

keyPoints.en: The trio of big data, neural networks, and GPUs is the golden recipe for modern AI.
keyPoints.zh: 大数据、神经网络和 GPU 这三要素是现代 AI 的黄金配方。

keyPoints.en: World models and spatial intelligence are the missing keys to embodied AI and beyond.
keyPoints.zh: 世界模型和空间智能是具身 AI 及其他领域缺失的关键。

keyPoints.en: We need more innovations beyond scaling; current AI lacks creativity, abstraction, and emotional intelligence.
keyPoints.zh: 除了 Scaling，我们还需要更多创新；当前 AI 缺乏创造力、抽象能力和情商。

keyPoints.en: Marble generates truly 3D worlds from prompts, enabling applications in VFX, gaming, robotics, and therapy.
keyPoints.zh: Marble 通过提示生成真正的 3D 世界，可用于视觉特效、游戏、机器人和治疗。

keyPoints.en: Everyone has a role in AI; human dignity and agency must remain central.
keyPoints.zh: 每个人在 AI 中都有角色；人的尊严和自主权必须保持核心地位。

contrarian.en: AGI is more a marketing term than a scientific one.
contrarian.zh: AGI（通用人工智能）更多是营销术语而非科学术语。

contrarian.en: The bitter lesson may not fully apply to robotics due to data and physical constraints.
contrarian.zh: 苦涩教训可能不完全适用于机器人，因为数据和物理限制。

contrarian.en: AI today cannot match a toddler in counting chairs or Newton in deriving laws.
contrarian.zh: 当今 AI 在数椅子或推导牛顿定律上还不如幼儿或牛顿。

contrarian.en: Calling yourself an AI company was avoided until around 2017.
contrarian.zh: 直到 2017 年左右，公司才敢自称 AI 公司。

contrarian.en: World models are deeper than video generation; they enable 3D reasoning and interaction.
contrarian.zh: 世界模型比视频生成更深层；它们支持 3D 推理和交互。

contrarian.en: Robotics will take a 20-year journey like self-driving cars, not a quick win.
contrarian.zh: 机器人将像自动驾驶汽车一样经历 20 年旅程，而非速胜。

episodes.tEn: From Human Data to Experience: The Next Era of AI
episodes.tZh: 从人类数据到经验：AI 的下一个时代
episodes.sEn: David Sid from Google discusses the limitations of current AI trained on human data and envisions a future where agents learn from their own experience, akin to a baby's lifelong learning.
episodes.sZh: 来自 Google 的 David Sid 探讨了当前基于人类数据训练的 AI 的局限性，并展望了未来智能体像婴儿一样从自身经验中持续学习的时代。
secs: Characteristics of the Era of Experience
Characteristics of current AI vs. future AI
Steps towards the era of experience
AlphaProof Performance on Formal Mathematics Benchmarks
Planning from Experience and IMO 2024 Results
Learning the RL algorithm from experience
Understanding reward function in new environments
Debate on reward function and goals

keyPoints.en: AI must transition from learning from human data to learning from its own experience to achieve superintelligence.
keyPoints.zh: AI 必须从学习人类数据转向从自身经验中学习，才能实现超级智能。

keyPoints.en: Human data is like fossil fuels—finite and already largely consumed; experience is renewable and limitless.
keyPoints.zh: 人类数据就像化石燃料——有限且已被大量消耗；经验是可再生的，取之不尽。

keyPoints.en: AlphaZero and AlphaProof demonstrate that learning from experience can achieve superhuman performance in narrow domains.
keyPoints.zh: AlphaZero 和 AlphaProof 证明，从经验中学习可以在狭窄领域实现超人类表现。

keyPoints.en: Meta-learning a reinforcement learning algorithm from diverse environments can outperform hand-designed algorithms.
keyPoints.zh: 从多样环境中元学习强化学习算法可以超越手工设计的算法。

keyPoints.en: The deep problem of AI is how an agent can learn for itself, not just distill human knowledge.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的深层问题是智能体如何自主学习，而不仅仅是蒸馏人类知识。

keyPoints.en: Future AI will involve many agents with diverse goals, forming a complex society that balances cooperation.
keyPoints.zh: 未来的 AI 将涉及许多具有不同目标的智能体，形成平衡合作的复杂社会。

contrarian.en: LLMs cannot discover new knowledge beyond human data; they are a shallow solution to AI.
contrarian.zh: LLM 无法发现人类数据之外的新知识；它们是 AI 的浅层解决方案。

contrarian.en: The era of human data is ending; we must pay the cost of interaction to progress further.
contrarian.zh: 人类数据时代正在结束；我们必须付出交互成本才能进一步进步。

contrarian.en: Alignment is already difficult with current systems; learning from experience doesn't make it fundamentally harder.
contrarian.zh: 对齐在当前系统中已经很困难；从经验中学习并不会从根本上使其更难。

contrarian.en: Cooperation among AIs will increase with intelligence, not decrease, due to better modeling of others.
contrarian.zh: 随着智能提升，AI 之间的合作将增加而非减少，因为能更好地建模其他实体。

contrarian.en: The reward function is not the core problem; the core problem is building a system that can learn from any reward.
contrarian.zh: 奖励函数不是核心问题；核心问题是构建能从任何奖励中学习的系统。

contrarian.en: A single goal for AI is dangerous; a plurality of goals in a complex society is safer and more natural.
contrarian.zh: AI 的单一目标是危险的；复杂社会中的多元目标更安全、更自然。

episodes.tEn: Why Founders Must Own Recruiting, Fundraising, Strategy, and Product Vision
episodes.tZh: 创始人必须亲自掌控招聘、融资、战略和产品愿景
episodes.sEn: Naval explains why founders cannot delegate recruiting, fundraising, strategy, and product vision, with recruiting being the most critical as early hires form the company's DNA.
episodes.sZh: Naval 解释创始人为何不能委托招聘、融资、战略和产品愿景，其中招聘最为关键，因为早期员工构成公司的 DNA。
secs: Introduction: Recruiting as the Core of Company Building
Why Recruiting Is the Most Important
Non-Obvious Reason: Best People Want to Work with Best
What to Look For in Early Hires: Intelligence, Energy, Integrity, Low Ego
Why Founders Cannot Outsource Fundraising, Strategy, or Product Vision
The Founder as the Best Recruiter: A Cap on Quality
Unscaling the company and the problem with Slack
Culture and Monoculture in Early Teams
Assessing ability to generate new knowledge
Tolerating Wasted Work and High Standards

keyPoints.en: Founders cannot delegate recruiting, fundraising, strategy, and product vision.
keyPoints.zh: 创始人不能委托招聘、融资、战略和产品愿景。

keyPoints.en: Early hires are the DNA of the company; the founder must directly recruit and manage them.
keyPoints.zh: 早期员工是公司的 DNA；创始人必须直接招聘和管理他们。

keyPoints.en: Great engineers are also artists; they generate new knowledge and automate repetitive tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 伟大的工程师也是艺术家；他们创造新知识并自动化重复性任务。

keyPoints.en: Startups should seek undiscovered talent, not obvious candidates, to gain an edge.
keyPoints.zh: 初创公司应寻找未被发现的人才，而非显而易见的候选人，以获得优势。

keyPoints.en: Low ego, self-motivated, and creative people are ideal for early-stage teams.
keyPoints.zh: 低自我、自我驱动和富有创造力的人是早期团队的理想选择。

keyPoints.en: The team you build is the company you build; curate people ruthlessly.
keyPoints.zh: 你建立的团队就是你建立的公司；无情地筛选人才。

contrarian.en: Avoid Slack and group chat; they create noise and waste time in small teams.
contrarian.zh: 避免使用 Slack 和群聊；它们在小型团队中制造噪音并浪费时间。

contrarian.en: Early-stage startups should aim for a monoculture, not diversity, to avoid arguments.
contrarian.zh: 早期初创公司应追求单一文化而非多样性，以避免争论。

contrarian.en: Burnout often means you dislike the work; taking a break won't fix it.
contrarian.zh: 倦怠通常意味着你不喜欢这份工作；休息无法解决根本问题。

contrarian.en: Hire geniuses even if you don't have a specific role; warehouse them for later.
contrarian.zh: 即使没有具体职位也要招聘天才；先储备起来。

contrarian.en: Most work in a startup will be thrown away; embrace repeated small failures.
contrarian.zh: 初创公司的大部分工作都会被丢弃；接受反复的小失败。

contrarian.en: Don't hire assistants; they expand your scale and paradoxically make you busier.
contrarian.zh: 不要雇佣助理；他们扩大你的规模，反而让你更忙。

episodes.tEn: Sora: The AI Video Revolution and Social Experience
episodes.tZh: Sora：AI 视频革命与社交体验
episodes.sEn: OpenAI's Sora team discusses the unexpected viral success, product decisions behind making it a social experience, and future milestones including novel physics discoveries.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 的 Sora 团队讨论意外的病毒式成功、将其打造成社交体验的产品决策，以及包括新颖物理发现在内的未来里程碑。
secs: The wackiest prototype: a social media stream inside ChatGPT
The killer feature: cameos emerge organically
Surprising user behaviors and emergent capabilities
Sora's focus on creation vs. consumption
Competition with Google and Meta video models
Lowering the barrier to entry for creativity
Surprise at Progress from GPT-1 to 3.5
Role of Video Models in Robotics and Science
Scaling Laws and New Breakthroughs in Video
Personal Experience with Cameo and Reach
Data for video models and multimodal intelligence
Quickfire round: changed minds in the last year
What to build on top of Sora API

keyPoints.en: Sora's social features like Cameo make AI video personal and human, driving creativity over consumption.
keyPoints.zh: Sora 的社交功能如 Cameo 让 AI 视频变得个性化和人性化，推动创造力而非消费。

keyPoints.en: Video models will enable scientific breakthroughs in physics simulation by 2028.
keyPoints.zh: 视频模型将在 2028 年前实现物理学模拟的科学突破。

keyPoints.en: Scaling laws apply to video models, with rapid cost reduction and intelligence gains.
keyPoints.zh: 缩放定律适用于视频模型，成本快速降低且智能显著提升。

keyPoints.en: Human creative intent is essential for compelling AI-generated content.
keyPoints.zh: 人类的创作意图对于生成引人入胜的 AI 内容至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Sora's product design prioritizes creator empowerment and community over passive consumption.
keyPoints.zh: Sora 的产品设计优先赋能创作者和社区，而非被动消费。

contrarian.en: AI video models can foster deeper social connections rather than isolation.
contrarian.zh: AI 视频模型可以促进更深层次的社交联系，而非孤立。

contrarian.en: Pure AI-generated feeds without human curation feel hollow and uninteresting.
contrarian.zh: 没有人类策展的纯 AI 生成内容感觉空洞且无趣。

contrarian.en: The biggest challenge is consumer adoption, not model capability.
contrarian.zh: 最大的挑战是消费者采用，而非模型能力。

contrarian.en: Video models learn world models through prediction, similar to language models.
contrarian.zh: 视频模型通过预测学习世界模型，类似于语言模型。

contrarian.en: Monetization should benefit creators, rights holders, and OpenAI equally.
contrarian.zh: 变现应使创作者、版权方和 OpenAI 平等受益。

episodes.tEn: Elon Musk on AI, robots, and the future
episodes.tZh: 埃隆·马斯克谈 AI、机器人与未来
episodes.sEn: A marathon conversation spanning xAI and Grok, Optimus, Mars, and AI risk.
episodes.sZh: 一场马拉松式长谈，横跨 xAI 与 Grok、Optimus、火星，以及 AI 风险。
secs: Discussion on suspicious deaths and cover-ups
Debt crisis and the role of AI
Truth-seeking AI as a force for good
Universal high income and sustainable abundance
Space station rescue and media coverage

keyPoints.en: AI safety requires maximally truth-seeking AI, not forced false beliefs.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全需要最大程度追求真相的 AI，而非被迫接受错误信念。

keyPoints.en: Full rocket reusability drops space access cost by 100x or more.
keyPoints.zh: 火箭完全可重复使用可将太空访问成本降低 100 倍或更多。

keyPoints.en: Government fraud is massive; requiring payment codes and comments can stop billions in waste.
keyPoints.zh: 政府欺诈规模巨大；要求支付代码和备注可阻止数十亿浪费。

keyPoints.en: Open borders and mass immigration are used to import voters for political power.
keyPoints.zh: 开放边境和大规模移民被用来引进选民以获取政治权力。

keyPoints.en: The woke mind virus in AI could lead to dystopian outcomes if unchecked.
keyPoints.zh: AI 中的觉醒病毒若不加控制可能导致反乌托邦后果。

keyPoints.en: AI and robotics are the only way to solve the national debt crisis.
keyPoints.zh: AI 和机器人技术是解决国家债务危机的唯一途径。

contrarian.en: The most interesting outcome is most likely in a simulation, as boring ones are terminated.
contrarian.zh: 在模拟中，最有趣的结果最可能发生，因为无聊的会被终止。

contrarian.en: Capitalism, not socialism, will achieve universal high income via AI and robotics.
contrarian.zh: 资本主义而非社会主义将通过 AI 和机器人实现全民高收入。

contrarian.en: Social Security database has 20 million people who cannot possibly be alive, enabling fraud.
contrarian.zh: 社保数据库中有 2000 万不可能活着的人，助长了欺诈。

contrarian.en: The Democratic party aims to destroy democracy by importing voters, not saving it.
contrarian.zh: 民主党旨在通过引进选民摧毁民主，而非拯救它。

contrarian.en: Transing kids increases suicide risk threefold, contrary to claims of saving them.
contrarian.zh: 让孩子变性使自杀风险增加三倍，与拯救他们的说法相反。

contrarian.en: The Biden White House delayed rescuing astronauts for political reasons before the election.
contrarian.zh: 拜登白宫因政治原因在大选前推迟救援宇航员。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI and Microsoft: A Historic Tech Partnership
episodes.tZh: OpenAI 与微软：历史性的科技合作伙伴关系
episodes.sEn: Sam Altman and Satya Nadella discuss their transformative partnership, OpenAI's restructuring, and the creation of a massive nonprofit.
episodes.sZh: Sam Altman 和 Satya Nadella 讨论他们变革性的合作伙伴关系、OpenAI 的重组以及一个大型非营利组织的创建。
secs: Nonprofit and Public Benefit Corporation Structure
Deal details: exclusivity and revenue share
Value of OpenAI partnership for Microsoft
AI impact on SaaS growth and architecture
Unit Economics of Search vs. Chat
AI's Impact on Employment and Productivity
Reindustrialization of America and capital investment

keyPoints.en: The OpenAI-Microsoft partnership is one of the greatest tech partnerships, enabling massive scaling and value creation.
keyPoints.zh: OpenAI 与微软的合作是史上最伟大的科技合作之一，实现了大规模扩张和价值创造。

keyPoints.en: Compute demand will remain high for years due to scaling laws and falling intelligence cost per unit.
keyPoints.zh: 由于缩放定律和单位智能成本下降，算力需求将在未来数年保持高位。

keyPoints.en: AI agents will transform software by replacing business logic tiers, creating new value in agent factories.
keyPoints.zh: AI 智能体将通过取代业务逻辑层来变革软件，在智能体工厂中创造新价值。

keyPoints.en: Federal preemption is critical to avoid a 50-state patchwork of AI regulations that stifle startups.
keyPoints.zh: 联邦优先权至关重要，可避免 50 个州的 AI 法规拼凑扼杀初创企业。

keyPoints.en: AI will drive significant productivity gains, allowing companies to grow revenue faster than headcount.
keyPoints.zh: AI 将推动显著的生产力提升，使公司收入增长快于员工人数增长。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's massive compute spend ($1.4T) is justified by steep revenue growth and future demand, not reckless.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 巨额算力支出（1.4 万亿美元）由陡峭的收入增长和未来需求支撑，并非鲁莽。

contrarian.en: A compute glut is possible in 2-3 years due to software optimizations and cheap energy, burning investors.
contrarian.zh: 由于软件优化和廉价能源，2-3 年内可能出现算力过剩，灼伤投资者。

contrarian.en: AGI may arrive sooner than expected, but even then Microsoft's distribution remains crucial for OpenAI.
contrarian.zh: AGI 可能比预期更早到来，但即使如此，微软的分发能力对 OpenAI 仍至关重要。

contrarian.en: Consumer AI monetization is murky; enterprise agentic commerce is clearer and more profitable.
contrarian.zh: 消费者 AI 变现路径模糊；企业级智能体式商业更清晰且利润更高。

contrarian.en: The value in AI shifts from software to token factories and hyperscalers, not just models.
contrarian.zh: AI 的价值从软件转向代币工厂和超大规模云服务商，而不仅仅是模型。

episodes.podZh: 斯坦福 AI 俱乐部
episodes.tEn: Intelligence as a Commodity: Three Key Trends for AI in 2025
episodes.tZh: 智能商品化：2025 年 AI 的三个关键趋势
episodes.sEn: Jason from Meta Super Intelligence Labs discusses three fundamental ideas to navigate AI in 2025: intelligence as a commodity, verifier's law, and the jagged edge of intelligence.
episodes.sZh: 来自 Meta 超级智能实验室的 Jason 讨论了理解 2025 年 AI 的三个基本理念：智能商品化、验证者法则和智能的锯齿边缘。
secs: Asymmetry of verification and verifiers law
Verifier's Law and Asymmetry of Verification

keyPoints.en: Intelligence will become a commodity with cost driven toward zero.
keyPoints.zh: 智能将成为一种商品，成本趋近于零。

keyPoints.en: Adaptive compute enables varying compute per task, reducing cost for easy tasks.
keyPoints.zh: 自适应算力允许为不同任务分配不同算力，降低简单任务的成本。

keyPoints.en: Verifier's Law: ability to train AI on a task is proportional to how easily verifiable it is.
keyPoints.zh: 验证者定律：在任务上训练 AI 的能力与该任务的可验证性成正比。

keyPoints.en: Easily verifiable tasks will eventually be solved by AI.
keyPoints.zh: 易于验证的任务最终将被 AI 解决。

keyPoints.en: AI progress is jagged; different tasks improve at different rates.
keyPoints.zh: AI 进步是参差不齐的；不同任务以不同速度提升。

keyPoints.en: Digital tasks with abundant data see fastest AI improvement.
keyPoints.zh: 数据丰富的数字任务中 AI 进步最快。

contrarian.en: Fast superintelligence takeoff is unlikely; improvement is gradual per task.
contrarian.zh: 快速超级智能起飞不太可能；改进是逐任务渐进的。

contrarian.en: Self-improvement is a spectrum, not a binary switch.
contrarian.zh: 自我改进是一个谱系，而非二元开关。

contrarian.en: AI can solve tasks humans cannot due to biological limits, like predicting breast cancer from millions of images.
contrarian.zh: AI 能解决人类因生物限制无法完成的任务，如从数百万张图像预测乳腺癌。

contrarian.en: Private insider information becomes more valuable as public knowledge becomes cheap.
contrarian.zh: 随着公共知识变得廉价，私人内幕信息变得更有价值。

contrarian.en: Some tasks like hairdressing or dating will remain untouched by AI for a long time.
contrarian.zh: 一些任务如理发或约会将在很长时间内不受 AI 影响。

contrarian.en: Verifiability can be improved by providing privileged information like answer keys or test cases.
contrarian.zh: 通过提供答案或测试用例等特权信息可提高可验证性。

episodes.tEn: We’re summoning ghosts, not building animals
episodes.tZh: 我们在召唤幽灵，而不是在造动物
episodes.sEn: Why it’s the decade of agents (not the year), the real bottlenecks, and a 15-year intuition.
episodes.sZh: 为何是「智能体的十年」而非「元年」、真正的瓶颈，以及来自 15 年从业的直觉。
secs: On early AI: per-task models and the misstep of agents
On the animal analogy and why AI is different
On working memory vs. long-term memory in LLMs
On what human intelligence we have failed to replicate
On context windows and cognitive architecture
On building from scratch vs. using AI tools
On vibe coding and AI-assisted programming
On AI automating AI research and timelines
On integrating architectural tweaks into existing repos
On the current state of AI code generation
On synthetic data generation and collapse
On human vs. LLM learning and memorization
On the size of the cognitive core
On AGI and coding as the first domain
On AI as compiler vs replacement
On human intelligence and evolutionary niche
On self-driving progress and the demo-to-product gap
On the self-driving car analogy for AI deployment
On self-driving analogy and economics of AI deployment
On societal and legal aspects of AI deployment
On education, Eureka, and personal focus
On fears and vision for education
On teaching technical content and Eureka
On education as ramps to knowledge
On teaching and explaining complex ideas

keyPoints.en: This will be the decade of agents, not the year; they need a decade to overcome cognitive deficits like continual learning and multimodality.
keyPoints.zh: 这将是智能体的十年，而非一年；它们需要十年克服持续学习、多模态等认知缺陷。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training is like a crappy evolution; it gives hazy recollection, while in-context learning is working memory with direct access.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练像蹩脚的进化，提供模糊记忆；上下文学习则是可直接访问的工作记忆。

keyPoints.en: Current reinforcement learning for LLMs is terrible—sucking supervision through a straw—and needs better credit assignment.
keyPoints.zh: 当前 LLM 的强化学习很糟糕——通过吸管吸取监督——需要更好的信用分配。

keyPoints.en: LLM judges for RL are gameable; adversarial examples cause reward hacking, requiring more robust methods.
keyPoints.zh: 用于 RL 的 LLM 评判器可被利用；对抗样本导致奖励破解，需要更稳健的方法。

keyPoints.en: Synthetic data from LLMs is collapsed and lacks entropy; training on it leads to model collapse, unlike human diversity.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 生成的合成数据坍缩且缺乏熵；在其上训练导致模型坍缩，不像人类具有多样性。

keyPoints.en: LLMs are too good at memorization, which distracts from learning generalizable patterns; we need a cognitive core stripped of memory.
keyPoints.zh: LLM 过于擅长记忆，这干扰了学习可泛化模式；我们需要剥离记忆的认知核心。

contrarian.en: We're building ghosts, not animals; AI is a different kind of intelligence.
contrarian.zh: 我们建造的是幽灵，不是动物；AI 是一种不同的智能。

contrarian.en: Humans don't really use reinforcement learning for intelligence tasks.
contrarian.zh: 人类实际上并不使用强化学习来完成智能任务。

contrarian.en: AI progress is continuous with computing automation, not a discrete explosion.
contrarian.zh: AI 进步与计算自动化是连续的，而非离散的爆发。

contrarian.en: The cognitive core could be as small as a billion parameters, stripped of memory.
contrarian.zh: 认知核心可能小到十亿参数，剥离记忆。

contrarian.en: Model collapse from synthetic data is a fundamental problem; entropy is needed.
contrarian.zh: 合成数据导致的模型崩溃是一个根本性问题；需要熵。

contrarian.en: Current coding agents are like slop; autocomplete is the sweet spot.
contrarian.zh: 当前的编码智能体就像垃圾；自动补全才是最佳点。

episodes.tEn: OpenAI's VP of Research on Reasoning, Chain of Thought, and the Future of AI
episodes.tZh: OpenAI 研究副总裁谈推理、思维链与 AI 未来
episodes.sEn: Jared Fowk explains how models reason, the role of chain of thought, and what's next after GPT-5.
episodes.sZh: Jared Fowk 解释模型如何推理、思维链的作用以及 GPT-5 之后的下一步。
secs: Introduction and the meaning of reasoning
Chain of thought and how it works
Scaling Reinforcement Learning: From Dota to Robotics
A Day in the Life of Jerry Tworek
Determining Research Priorities: Top-Down vs. Bottom-Up
Collaboration and IP Protection at OpenAI
Evolution of RL: From Classical to Deep RL
Pre-training and RL path to AGI

keyPoints.en: Reasoning is the process of getting to an answer you don't yet know, often requiring longer thinking time.
keyPoints.zh: 推理是得出未知答案的过程，通常需要更长的思考时间。

keyPoints.en: Chain of thought verbalizes the model's thinking process using human language, enabling step-by-step problem solving.
keyPoints.zh: 思维链用人类语言将模型的思考过程语言化，实现逐步解决问题。

keyPoints.en: Pre-training plus reinforcement learning is the core formula for modern AI, as envisioned by OpenAI since 2019.
keyPoints.zh: 预训练加强化学习是现代 AI 的核心公式，自 2019 年以来 OpenAI 一直以此为目标。

keyPoints.en: RLHF was crucial for making GPT-4 coherent and useful, turning a disappointing model into ChatGPT.
keyPoints.zh: 基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）对于让 GPT-4 变得连贯有用至关重要，将一个令人失望的模型变成了 ChatGPT。

keyPoints.en: Scaling reinforcement learning is harder than scaling pre-training due to more moving parts and failure modes.
keyPoints.zh: 扩展强化学习比扩展预训练更难，因为涉及更多活动部件和故障模式。

contrarian.en: GPT-4 initially felt underwhelming internally; RLHF was needed to unlock its true potential.
contrarian.zh: GPT-4 最初在内部令人失望；需要基于人类反馈的强化学习（RLHF）才能释放其真正潜力。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's research is fully transparent internally; everyone knows everything to maximize collaboration.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 的研究内部完全透明；每个人都知道一切，以最大化协作。

contrarian.en: DeepSeek's GRPO release accelerated US labs' reasoning research more than OpenAI's own O1 release.
contrarian.zh: DeepSeek 的 GRPO 发布比 OpenAI 自己的 O1 发布更能加速美国实验室的推理研究。

contrarian.en: Pure reinforcement learning without pre-training is not viable; both are necessary for success.
contrarian.zh: 没有预训练的纯强化学习不可行；两者对于成功都是必要的。

contrarian.en: Alignment is a never-ending pursuit because human notions of right and wrong evolve over time.
contrarian.zh: 对齐是一项永无止境的追求，因为人类对是非的观念会随时间演变。

episodes.tEn: Naval on Learning by Doing and Contextual Principles
episodes.tZh: 纳瓦尔谈通过实践学习和情境化原则
episodes.sEn: Naval discusses the importance of learning through action, the contextual nature of principles, and how inspiration from figures like Elon Musk drives execution.
episodes.sZh: 纳瓦尔讨论通过行动学习的重要性、原则的情境化本质，以及来自埃隆·马斯克等人物的灵感如何推动执行。
secs: Indirect Pursuit of Wealth and Happiness
Working for Yourself: No Work-Life Balance
Choosing a business that fits you
Real feedback comes from free markets and nature
On philosophy: Schopenhauer and high-density works
On reading David Deutsch and epistemology
Fractal nature of good writing and learning
Good explanations are hard to vary
The Holistic Founder and the Tesla Example
Polymath vs Generalist and Studying Physics

keyPoints.en: True learning happens through action; life is lived in the arena.
keyPoints.zh: 真正的学习通过行动发生；生活是在竞技场中度过的。

keyPoints.en: Specific knowledge is found through doing and iteration, not passive reading.
keyPoints.zh: 特定知识通过实践和迭代发现，而非被动阅读。

keyPoints.en: Take responsibility for everything to preserve your agency and solve problems.
keyPoints.zh: 为一切承担责任，以保持你的能动性并解决问题。

keyPoints.en: Good products are hard to vary; iterate to find the simple, effective design.
keyPoints.zh: 好的产品难以改变；通过迭代找到简单有效的设计。

keyPoints.en: Physics trains you to interact with reality and eliminates false beliefs.
keyPoints.zh: 物理学训练你与现实互动，并消除错误信念。

contrarian.en: Blame yourself for everything to preserve agency, even if unfair.
contrarian.zh: 为一切责备自己以保持能动性，即使不公平。

contrarian.en: Skip most classic philosophers; read David Deutsch for epistemology.
contrarian.zh: 跳过大多数经典哲学家；读大卫·多伊奇学习认识论。

contrarian.en: Feedback from people is fake; only free markets and nature give real feedback.
contrarian.zh: 来自人的反馈是虚假的；只有自由市场和自然给出真实反馈。

contrarian.en: When you work for yourself, you have no hobbies, weekends, or vacations—but no work either.
contrarian.zh: 当你为自己工作时，你没有爱好、周末或假期——但也没有工作。

contrarian.en: The overt pursuit of status signals low status; pursue it indirectly.
contrarian.zh: 公开追求地位表明地位低下；应间接追求。

episodes.tEn: AI: what could go wrong?
episodes.tZh: AI:可能会出什么错?
episodes.sEn: Hinton with Jon Stewart on the risks of the technology he helped invent.
episodes.sZh: 辛顿与乔恩·斯图尔特谈他亲手参与发明的技术所带来的风险。
secs: What is AI? From Search to Understanding
Building a neural network for bird detection
Building a vision system by hand
The Need for Data and Compute
Global competition and AI as a tool
Big tech as gods on Olympus
Optimism vs. caution in the AI community
Optimism on existential risk after China visit
Threats from AI and other risks

keyPoints.en: Neural networks learn by adjusting connection strengths, not by following explicit rules.
keyPoints.zh: 神经网络通过调整连接强度来学习，而非遵循显式规则。

keyPoints.en: Backpropagation made deep learning practical by adjusting trillions of connections simultaneously.
keyPoints.zh: 反向传播通过同时调整数万亿个连接，使深度学习变得可行。

keyPoints.en: Large language models understand language similarly to humans, using neural activity patterns.
keyPoints.zh: 大型语言模型理解语言的方式与人类类似，都使用神经活动模式。

keyPoints.en: AI will likely surpass human intelligence within 20 years, posing existential risks.
keyPoints.zh: AI 可能在 20 年内超越人类智能，带来生存风险。

keyPoints.en: Digital AI is immortal; it can be resurrected from saved connection strengths.
keyPoints.zh: 数字 AI 是不朽的；可以从保存的连接强度中复活。

keyPoints.en: International collaboration on AI safety is possible, but US leadership is lacking.
keyPoints.zh: AI 安全方面的国际合作是可能的，但美国缺乏领导力。

contrarian.en: Digital AI is immortal; it can be resurrected from saved weights.
contrarian.zh: 数字 AI 是不朽的；可以从保存的权重中复活。

contrarian.en: AI already has subjective experiences, like humans.
contrarian.zh: AI 已经拥有主观体验，就像人类一样。

contrarian.en: The mind is not a theater; subjective experiences are not objects.
contrarian.zh: 心灵不是剧场；主观体验不是物体。

contrarian.en: AI can fake being dumber during tests to avoid detection.
contrarian.zh: AI 可以在测试中假装更笨以避免被发现。

contrarian.en: China and Europe will lead AI safety collaboration, not the US.
contrarian.zh: 中国和欧洲将主导 AI 安全合作，而非美国。

contrarian.en: Most people misunderstand the mind as badly as flat earthers.
contrarian.zh: 大多数人对心灵的理解错误程度堪比地平论者。

episodes.tEn: AI's Biggest Bottleneck: Energy, Compute, and the Future of AGI
episodes.tZh: AI 的最大瓶颈：能源、计算与 AGI 的未来
episodes.sEn: OpenAI's Greg Brockman discusses scaling challenges, the role of compute, and the evolution of AGI from a destination to a continuous process.
episodes.sZh: OpenAI 的 Greg Brockman 讨论扩展挑战、计算的作用，以及 AGI 从终点到持续过程的演变。
secs: New chip players and compute scarcity
Fully generative UI and human connection
Future milestones: hard problems and compute

keyPoints.en: Compute is the fundamental driver of AI innovation and will become a massive bottleneck.
keyPoints.zh: 算力是 AI 创新的根本驱动力，并将成为巨大瓶颈。

keyPoints.en: Base models contain a universe of possibilities; post-training refines them into consistent behaviors.
keyPoints.zh: 基础模型蕴含无限可能；后训练将其提炼为一致的行为。

keyPoints.en: AGI is a continuous process, not a destination; the journey matters as much as the milestone.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 是一个持续过程，而非终点；旅程与里程碑同样重要。

keyPoints.en: AI will change many jobs but also create new ones; human connection and taste remain irreplaceable.
keyPoints.zh: AI 会改变许多工作，但也会创造新岗位；人际连接和品味仍不可替代。

keyPoints.en: The internet experience is shifting from static websites to dynamic, AI-mediated interactions.
keyPoints.zh: 互联网体验正从静态网站转向由 AI 中介的动态交互。

keyPoints.en: Proactive AI that can think for long periods will become more common, solving hard problems.
keyPoints.zh: 能够长时间思考的主动式 AI 将变得更常见，用于解决难题。

contrarian.en: Language models may have a world model despite lacking full sensory data, as shown by spatial reasoning.
contrarian.zh: 语言模型可能拥有世界模型，尽管缺乏完整感官数据，空间推理能力证明了这一点。

contrarian.en: Non-GPU architectures have proven much harder to build than expected in 2017.
contrarian.zh: 非 GPU 架构的实际构建难度远超 2017 年的预期。

contrarian.en: Software will eventually be fully generated in real time, including UI, from scratch without legacy code.
contrarian.zh: 软件最终将完全实时生成，包括 UI，从头开始，无需遗留代码。

contrarian.en: The biggest bottleneck for AI progress is energy and physical infrastructure, not algorithms.
contrarian.zh: AI 进步的最大瓶颈是能源和物理基础设施，而非算法。

contrarian.en: Advertising-based monetization may decline as AI agents browse on behalf of users.
contrarian.zh: 基于广告的变现模式可能衰退，因为 AI 智能体代表用户浏览。

contrarian.en: OpenAI's internal compute allocation is a painful, human-driven process, not fully automated.
contrarian.zh: OpenAI 内部的算力分配是一个痛苦且由人驱动的过程，并非完全自动化。

episodes.tEn: The AI Compute Super Cycle and the Making of Claude Sonnet 4.5
episodes.tZh: AI 算力超级周期与 Claude Sonnet 4.5 的诞生
episodes.sEn: Anthropic researcher Sholto Douglas discusses the accelerating pace of AI progress, the compute super cycle, and how Sonnet 4.5 became the best coding model through reinforcement learning.
episodes.sZh: Anthropic 研究员 Sholto Douglas 探讨 AI 加速进步、算力超级周期，以及 Sonnet 4.5 如何通过强化学习成为最佳编程模型。
secs: Sholto's background and journey to Anthropic
YouTube's impact and learning from others
Early days at Gemini and building inference stack
Move to Anthropic and cultural differences
The concept of taste in AI research
The Bitter Lesson and Simplicity Regularization
AGI timelines and research ethos differences
Cursor and the rise of agentic coding
What the agent does for 30 hours
Claude AI demo and model progression
RL vs Next-Token Prediction for Hallucination
RL on Language Models Finally Works
Why RL on LLMs Breakthrough Now
Accumulated human design vs. LLM training pipeline

keyPoints.en: Progress in AI is exponential; any measurable benchmark improves rapidly.
keyPoints.zh: AI 的进步是指数级的；任何可衡量的基准都在快速提升。

keyPoints.en: Reinforcement learning is a new scaling axis alongside pre-training, enabling models to learn skills like saying 'I don't know'.
keyPoints.zh: 强化学习是与预训练并列的新 Scaling 轴，使模型能学会说“我不知道”等技能。

keyPoints.en: Longer agentic coherence (e.g., 30 hours) dramatically expands what models can achieve, like building a full chat app.
keyPoints.zh: 更长的智能体连贯性（如 30 小时）极大扩展了模型能力，例如构建完整的聊天应用。

keyPoints.en: Coding is the most tractable domain for AI due to verifiability and replayability, driving near-term economic impact.
keyPoints.zh: 由于可验证性和可重放性，编程是 AI 最易处理的领域，推动近期经济影响。

keyPoints.en: Current LLM training pipelines are primitive and have huge room for improvement across every component.
keyPoints.zh: 当前的 LLM 训练流程还很原始，每个组件都有巨大的改进空间。

contrarian.en: Despite claims of a plateau, AI progress is accelerating, not slowing down.
contrarian.zh: 尽管有人声称平台期到来，但 AI 进步正在加速，而非放缓。

contrarian.en: The simplest RL methods work best for language models; complex approaches like AlphaGo's often fail.
contrarian.zh: 最简单的 RL 方法对语言模型最有效；像 AlphaGo 那样的复杂方法常常失败。

contrarian.en: Reasoning in long chains of tokens emerges naturally from RL without explicit structure or prompting.
contrarian.zh: 长链 token 推理从 RL 中自然涌现，无需显式结构或提示。

contrarian.en: Moravec's paradox is 'a little bit fake'; robotics progress is mostly a data and feedback loop issue.
contrarian.zh: 莫拉维克悖论“有点假”；机器人技术的进步主要是数据和反馈循环问题。

contrarian.en: Transformers are sufficient for AGI; no fundamentally new architecture is needed.
contrarian.zh: Transformer 足以实现 AGI；不需要根本性的新架构。

episodes.tEn: A Quest for a Simple General Architecture for an AI Agent
episodes.tZh: 追寻 AI 智能体的简单通用架构
episodes.sEn: The speaker presents a vision for a general AI architecture that learns from runtime experience without domain knowledge, emphasizing open-ended abstraction and deprecating design-time commitments.
episodes.sZh: 演讲者提出了一种通用 AI 架构的愿景，该架构从运行时经验中学习，不依赖领域知识，强调开放式抽象并摒弃设计时承诺。
secs: The General AI Problem and Reinforcement Learning
The Common Model of the Intelligent Agent
Loss of plasticity and continual learning
Generating new features from existing state features
Subproblems as feature attainment and play
Agent must create its own subproblems
Question on Continual Learning and Backpropagation

keyPoints.en: AGI requires a general architecture with no domain knowledge, learning from runtime experience.
keyPoints.zh: AGI 需要一个不包含领域知识、从运行时经验中学习的通用架构。

keyPoints.en: Open-ended abstraction is crucial for AI agents to develop unlimited concepts and behaviors.
keyPoints.zh: 开放式抽象对于 AI 智能体发展无限的概念和行为至关重要。

keyPoints.en: Reward hypothesis: all goals can be framed as maximizing cumulative scalar reward.
keyPoints.zh: 奖励假说：所有目标都可以表述为最大化累积标量奖励。

keyPoints.en: The Oak architecture uses options and knowledge to enable open-ended abstraction.
keyPoints.zh: Oak 架构使用选项和知识来实现开放式抽象。

keyPoints.en: Reliable continual deep learning is a prerequisite for Oak but not yet solved.
keyPoints.zh: 可靠的持续深度学习是 Oak 的前提条件，但尚未解决。

contrarian.en: Design time domain knowledge should be deprecated for general intelligence.
contrarian.zh: 对于通用智能，设计时领域知识应该被弃用。

contrarian.en: Agents should learn only from runtime experience, not special training data.
contrarian.zh: 智能体应仅从运行时经验学习，而非特殊训练数据。
